Processing will still occur\n    37\u2192 * synchronously but it will provide the required notifications that the caller expects.\n    38\u2192 */\n    39\u2192public final class AsyncProcessorConverterHelper {\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192    private AsyncProcessorConverterHelper() {\n    42\u2192        // Helper class\n    43\u2192    }\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192    /**\n    46\u2192     * Creates a {@link AsyncProcessor} that delegates to the given processor. It is important that this implements\n    47\u2192     * {@link DelegateProcessor}\n    48\u2192     */\n    49\u2192    private static class ProcessorToAsyncProcessorBridge\n    50\u2192            implements DelegateProcessor, AsyncProcessor, Navigate<Processor>, Service {\n    51\u2192        protected final Processor processor;\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192        private ProcessorToAsyncProcessorBridge(Processor processor) {\n    54\u2192            this.processor = processor;\n    55\u2192        }\n    56\u2192\n    57\u2192        @Override\n    58\u2192        public boolean process(Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback callback) {\n    59\u2192            if (processor == null) {\n    60\u2192                // no processor then we are done\n    61\u2192                callback.done(true);\n    62\u2192                return true;\n    63\u2192            }\n    64\u2192            try {\n    65\u2192                processor.process(exchange);\n    66\u2192            } catch (Exception e) {\n    67\u2192                // must catch throwable so we catch all\n    68\u2192                exchange.setException(e);\n    69\u2192            } finally {\n    70\u2192                // we are bridging a sync processor as async so callback with true\n    71\u2192                callback.done(true);\n    72\u2192            }\n    73\u2192            return true;\n    74\u2192        }\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192        @Override\n    77\u2192        public CompletableFuture<Exchange> processAsync(Exchange exchange) {\n    78\u2192            AsyncCallbackToCompletableFutureAdapter<Exchange> callback\n    79\u2192                    = new AsyncCallbackToCompletableFutureAdapter<>(exchange);\n    80\u2192            process(exchange, callback);\n    81\u2192            return callback.getFuture();\n    82\u2192        }\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192        @Override\n    85\u2192        public String toString() {\n    86\u2192            if (processor != null) {\n    87\u2192                return processor.toString();\n    88\u2192            } else {\n    89\u2192                return \"Processor is null\";\n    90\u2192            }\n    91\u2192        }\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192        @Override\n    94\u2192        public void process(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n    95\u2192            processNext(exchange);\n    96\u2192        }\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192        protected void processNext(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n    99\u2192            if (processor != null) {\n   100\u2192                processor.process(exchange);\n   101\u2192            }\n   102\u2192        }\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192        @Override\n   105\u2192        public void build() {\n   106\u2192            ServiceHelper.buildService(processor);\n   107\u2192        }\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192        @Override\n   110\u2192        public void init() {\n   111\u2192            ServiceHelper.initService(processor);\n   112\u2192        }\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192        @Override\n   115\u2192        public void start() {\n   116\u2192            ServiceHelper.startService(processor);\n   117\u2192        }\n   118\u2192\n   119\u2192        @Override\n   120\u2192        public void stop() {\n   121\u2192            ServiceHelper.stopService(processor);\n   122\u2192        }\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192        @Override\n   125\u2192        public boolean hasNext() {\n   126\u2192            return processor != null;\n   127\u2192        }\n   128\u2192\n   129\u2192        @Override\n   130\u2192        public List<Processor> next() {\n   131\u2192            if (!hasNext()) {\n   132\u2192                return null;\n   133\u2192            }\n   134\u2192            List<Processor> answer = new ArrayList<>(1);\n   135\u2192            answer.add(processor);\n   136\u2192            return answer;\n   137\u2192        }\n   138\u2192\n   139\u2192        @Override\n   140\u2192        public Processor getProcessor() {\n   141\u2192            return processor;\n   142\u2192        }\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192        @Override\n   145\u2192        public boolean equals(Object o) {\n   146\u2192            if (this == o) {\n   147\u2192                return true;\n   148\u2192            }\n   149\u2192            if (o == null || getClass() != o.getClass()) {\n   150\u2192                return false;\n   151\u2192            }\n   152\u2192\n   153\u2192            if (processor == null) {\n   154\u2192                return false;\n   155\u2192            }\n   156\u2192\n   157\u2192            ProcessorToAsyncProcessorBridge that = (ProcessorToAsyncProcessorBridge) o;\n   158\u2192            return processor.equals(that.processor);\n   159\u2192        }\n   160\u2192\n   161\u2192        @Override\n   162\u2192        public int hashCode() {\n   163\u2192            if (processor != null) {\n   164\u2192                return processor.hashCode();\n   165\u2192            } else {\n   166\u2192                return 0;\n   167\u2192            }\n   168\u2192        }\n   169\u2192    }\n   170\u2192\n   171\u2192    private static class ProducerToAsyncProducerBridge extends ProcessorToAsyncProcessorBridge implements AsyncProducer {\n   172\u2192        ProducerToAsyncProducerBridge(Producer producer) {\n   173\u2192            super(producer);\n   174\u2192        }\n   175\u2192\n   176\u2192        protected Producer producer() {\n   177\u2192            return (Producer) processor;\n   178\u2192        }\n   179\u2192\n   180\u2192        @Override\n   181\u2192        public Endpoint getEndpoint() {\n   182\u2192            return producer().getEndpoint();\n   183\u2192        }\n   184\u2192\n   185\u2192        @Override\n   186\u2192        public boolean isSingleton() {\n   187\u2192            return producer().isSingleton();\n   188\u2192        }\n   189\u2192    }\n   190\u2192\n   191\u2192    public static AsyncProducer convert(Producer value) {\n   192\u2192        if (value instanceof AsyncProducer asyncProducer) {\n   193\u2192            return asyncProducer;\n   194\u2192        }\n   195\u2192        return new ProducerToAsyncProducerBridge(value);\n   196\u2192    }\n   197\u2192\n   198\u2192    public static AsyncProcessor convert(Processor value) {\n   199\u2192        if (value instanceof AsyncProcessor asyncProcessor) {\n   200\u2192            return asyncProcessor;\n   201\u2192        }\n   202\u2192        return new ProcessorToAsyncProcessorBridge(value);\n   203\u2192    }\n   204\u2192}\n   205\u2192"

"     1\u2192/*\n     2\u2192 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more\n     3\u2192 * contributor license agreements. You may obtain a copy of the License at\n     8\u2192 *\n     9\u2192 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n    10\u2192 *\n    11\u2192 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n    12\u2192 * distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n    13\u2192 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n    14\u2192 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n    15\u2192 * limitations under the License.\n    16\u2192 */\n    17\u2192package org.apache.camel.component.log;\n    18\u2192\n    19\u2192import java.util.Locale;\n    20\u2192import java.util.Map;\n    21\u2192\n    22\u2192import org.apache.camel.Endpoint;\n    23\u2192import org.apache.camel.LoggingLevel;\n    24\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.CamelLogger;\n    25\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.ExchangeFormatter;\n    26\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.Metadata;\n    27\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.DefaultComponent;\n    28\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.processor.DefaultExchangeFormatter;\n    29\u2192import org.slf4j.Logger;\n    30\u2192import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\n    31\u2192\n    32\u2192import static org.apache.camel.support.LoggerHelper.getLineNumberLoggerName;\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192/**\n    35\u2192 * The <a href=\"http://camel.apache.org/log.html\">Log Component</a> is for logging message exchanges via the underlying\n    36\u2192 * logging mechanism.\n    37\u2192 */\n    38\u2192@org.apache.camel.spi.annotations.Component(\"log\")\n    39\u2192public class LogComponent extends DefaultComponent {\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192    private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LogComponent.class);\n    42\u2192\n    43\u2192    private ExchangeFormatter defaultExchangeFormatter;\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192    @Metadata(label = \"advanced\", autowired = true)\n    46\u2192    private ExchangeFormatter exchangeFormatter;\n    47\u2192    @Metadata\n    48\u2192    private boolean sourceLocationLoggerName;\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192    public LogComponent() {\n    51\u2192    }\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192    @Override\n    54\u2192    protected Endpoint createEndpoint(String uri, String remaining, Map<String, Object> parameters) throws Exception {\n    55\u2192        LoggingLevel level = getLoggingLevel(parameters);\n    56\u2192        Logger providedLogger = getLogger(parameters);\n    57\u2192\n    58\u2192        if (providedLogger == null) {\n    59\u2192            // try to look up the logger in registry\n    60\u2192            Map<String, Logger> availableLoggers = getCamelContext().getRegistry().findByTypeWithName(Logger.class);\n    61\u2192            if (availableLoggers.size() == 1) {\n    62\u2192                providedLogger = availableLoggers.values().iterator().next();\n    63\u2192                LOG.info(\"Using custom Logger: {}\", providedLogger);\n    64\u2192            } else if (availableLoggers.size() > 1) {\n    65\u2192                LOG.info(\"More than one {} instance found in the registry. Falling back to creating logger from URI {}.\",\n    66\u2192                        Logger.class.getName(), uri);\n    67\u2192            }\n    68\u2192        }\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192        // first, try to pick up the ExchangeFormatter from the registry\n    71\u2192        ExchangeFormatter logFormatter\n    72\u2192                = getCamelContext().getRegistry().lookupByNameAndType(\"logFormatter\", ExchangeFormatter.class);\n    73\u2192        if (logFormatter != null) {\n    74\u2192            setProperties(logFormatter, parameters);\n    75\u2192        } else if (exchangeFormatter != null) {\n    76\u2192            // do not set properties, the exchangeFormatter is explicitly set, therefore the\n    77\u2192            // user would have set its properties explicitly too\n    78\u2192            logFormatter = exchangeFormatter;\n    79\u2192        }\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192        LogEndpoint endpoint = new LogEndpoint(uri, this);\n    82\u2192        endpoint.setLevel(level.name());\n    83\u2192        endpoint.setSourceLocationLoggerName(sourceLocationLoggerName);\n    84\u2192        endpoint.setExchangeFormatter(logFormatter);\n    85\u2192        setProperties(endpoint, parameters);\n    86\u2192\n    87\u2192        if (providedLogger == null) {\n    88\u2192            String loggerName = endpoint.isSourceLocationLoggerName() ? getLineNumberLoggerName(endpoint) : null;\n    89\u2192            if (loggerName == null) {\n    90\u2192                loggerName = remaining;\n    91\u2192            }\n    92\u2192            endpoint.setLoggerName(loggerName);\n    93\u2192        } else {\n    94\u2192            endpoint.setProvidedLogger(providedLogger);\n    95\u2192        }\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192        return endpoint;\n    98\u2192    }\n    99\u2192\n   100\u2192    /**"

   33\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.processor.CamelLogProcessor;\n    34\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.processor.DefaultExchangeFormatter;\n    35\u2192import 41\u2192\n    42\u2192/**\n    43\u2192 * Prints data form the routed message (such as body and headers) to the logger.\n    44\u2192 */\n    45\u2192@UriEndpoint(firstVersion = \"1.1.0\", scheme = \"log\", title = \"Log Data\",\n    46\u2192             remote = false, syntax = \"log:loggerName\", producerOnly = true, category = { Category.CORE, Category.MONITORING })\n    47\u2192public class LogEndpoint extends ProcessorEndpoint implements LineNumberAware {\n    48\u2192\n    49\u2192    private volatile Processor logger;\n    50\u2192    private Logger providedLogger;\n    51\u2192    private ExchangeFormatter localFormatter;\n    52\u2192    private int lineNumber;\n    53\u2192    private String location;\n    54\u2192\n    55\u2192    @UriPath(description = \"Name of the logging category to use\")\n    56\u2192    @Metadata(required = true)\n    57\u2192    private String loggerName;\n    58\u2192    @UriParam(defaultValue = \"INFO\", enums = \"TRACE,DEBUG,INFO,WARN,ERROR,OFF\")\n    59\u2192    private String level;\n    60\u2192    @UriParam\n    61\u2192    private String marker;\n    62\u2192    @UriParam\n    63\u2192    private Integer groupSize;\n    64\u2192    @UriParam\n    65\u2192    private Long groupInterval;\n    66\u2192    @UriParam(defaultValue = \"true\")\n    67\u2192    private boolean groupActiveOnly = true;\n    68\u2192    @UriParam\n    69\u2192    private Long groupDelay;\n    70\u2192    @UriParam\n    71\u2192    private Boolean logMask;\n    72\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"advanced\")\n    73\u2192    private ExchangeFormatter exchangeFormatter;\n    74\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"formatting\", description = \"Show route ID.\")\n    75\u2192    private boolean showRouteId;\n    76\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"formatting\", description = \"Show route Group.\")\n    77\u2192    private boolean showRouteGroup;\n    78\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"formatting\", description = \"Show the unique exchange ID.\")\n    79\u2192    private boolean showExchangeId;\n    80\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"formatting\",\n    81\u2192              description = \"Shows the Message Exchange Pattern (or MEP for short).\")\n    82\u2192    private boolean showExchangePattern;\n    83\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"formatting\",\n    84\u2192              description = \"Show the exchange properties (only custom). Use showAllProperties to show both internal and custom properties.\")\n    85\u2192    private boolean showProperties;\n    86\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"formatting\", description = \"Show all of the exchange properties (both internal and custom).\")\n    87\u2192    private boolean showAllProperties;\n    88\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"formatting\", description = \"Show the variables.\")\n    89\u2192    private boolean showVariables;\n    90\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"formatting\", description = \"Show the message headers.\")\n    91\u2192    private boolean showHeaders;\n    92\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"formatting\", defaultValue = \"true\",\n    93\u2192              description = \"Whether to skip line separators when logging the message body.\"\n    94\u2192                            + \" This allows to log the message body in one line, setting this option to false will preserve any line separators from the body, which then will log the body as is.\")\n    95\u2192    private boolean skipBodyLineSeparator = true;\n    96\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"formatting\", defaultValue = \"true\", description = \"Show the message body.\")\n    97\u2192    private boolean showBody = true;\n    98\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"formatting\", defaultValue = \"true\", description = \"Show the body Java type.\")\n    99\u2192    private boolean showBodyType = true;\n   100\u2192    @UriParam(label = \"formatting\","

79\u2192import org.apache.camel.util.StringHelper;\n    80\u2192import org.apache.camel.util.json.JsonObject;\n    81\u2192import org.slf4j.Logger;\n    82\u2192import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192import static java.util.Objects.requireNonNull;\n    85\u2192import static org.apache.camel.impl.engine.DefaultChannel.getOrCreateBacklogTracer;\n    86\u2192\n    87\u2192/**\n    88\u2192 * Internal {@link Processor} that Camel routing engine used during routing for cross cutting functionality such as:\n    89\u2192 * <ul>\n    90\u2192 * <li>Execute {@link UnitOfWork}</li>\n    91\u2192 * <li>Keeping track which route currently is being routed</li>\n    92\u2192 * <li>Execute {@link RoutePolicy}</li>\n    93\u2192 * <li>Gather JMX performance statics</li>\n    94\u2192 * <li>Tracing</li>\n    95\u2192 * <li>Debugging</li>\n    96\u2192 * <li>Message History</li>\n    97\u2192 * <li>Stream Caching</li>\n    98\u2192 * <li>{@link Transformer}</li>\n    99\u2192 * </ul>\n   100\u2192 * ... and more.\n   101\u2192 * <p/>\n   102\u2192 * This implementation executes this cross cutting functionality as a {@link CamelInternalProcessorAdvice} advice\n   103\u2192 * (before and after advice) by executing the {@link CamelInternalProcessorAdvice#before(org.apache.camel.Exchange)} and\n   104\u2192 * {@link CamelInternalProcessorAdvice#after(org.apache.camel.Exchange, Object)} callbacks in correct order during\n   105\u2192 * routing. This reduces number of stack frames needed during routing, and reduce the number of lines in stacktraces, as\n   106\u2192 * well makes debugging the routing engine easier for end users.\n   107\u2192 * <p/>\n   108\u2192 * <b>Debugging tips:</b> Camel end users whom want to debug their Camel applications with the Camel source code, then\n   109\u2192 * make sure to read the source code of this class about the debugging tips, which you can find in the\n   110\u2192 * {@link #process(org.apache.camel.Exchange, org.apache.camel.AsyncCallback)} method.\n   111\u2192 * <p/>\n   112\u2192 * The added advices can implement {@link Ordered} to control in which order the advices are executed.\n   113\u2192 */\n   114\u2192public class CamelInternalProcessor extends DelegateAsyncProcessor implements InternalProcessor {\n   115\u2192\n   116\u2192    private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CamelInternalProcessor.class);\n   117\u2192\n   118\u2192    private static final Object[] EMPTY_STATES = new Object[0];\n   119\u2192\n   120\u2192    final CamelContext camelContext;\n   121\u2192    private final ReactiveExecutor reactiveExecutor;\n   122\u2192    private final ShutdownStrategy shutdownStrategy;\n   123\u2192    private final List<CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<?>> advices = new ArrayList<>();\n   124\u2192    private byte statefulAdvices;\n   125\u2192    private PooledObjectFactory<CamelInternalTask> taskFactory;\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192    public CamelInternalProcessor(CamelContext camelContext) {\n   128\u2192        this.camelContext = camelContext;\n   129\u2192        this.reactiveExecutor = requireNonNull(camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getReactiveExecutor());\n   130\u2192        this.shutdownStrategy = camelContext.getShutdownStrategy();\n   131\u2192    }\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192    public CamelInternalProcessor(CamelContext camelContext, Processor processor) {\n   134\u2192        super(processor);\n   135\u2192        this.camelContext = camelContext;\n   136\u2192        this.reactiveExecutor = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getReactiveExecutor();\n   137\u2192        this.shutdownStrategy = camelContext.getShutdownStrategy();\n   138\u2192    }\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192    @Override\n   141\u2192    protected void doBuild() throws Exception {\n   142\u2192        boolean pooled = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getExchangeFactory().isPooled();\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192        // only create pooled task factory\n   145\u2192        if (pooled) {\n   146\u2192            taskFactory = new CamelInternalPooledTaskFactory();\n   147\u2192            int capacity = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getExchangeFactory().getCapacity();\n   148\u2192            taskFactory.setCapacity(capacity);\n   149\u2192            LOG.trace(\"Using TaskFactory: {}\", taskFactory);\n   150\u2192        }\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192        ServiceHelper.buildService(taskFactory, processor);\n   153\u2192    }\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192    @Override\n   156\u2192    protected void doShutdown() throws Exception {\n   157\u2192        super.doShutdown();\n   158\u2192        ServiceHelper.stopAndShutdownServices(taskFactory, processor);\n   159\u2192    }\n   160\u2192\n   161\u2192    @Override\n   162\u2192    public void addAdvice(CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<?> advice) {\n   163\u2192        advices.add(advice);\n   164\u2192        // ensure advices are sorted so they are in the order we want\n   165\u2192        advices.sort(OrderedComparator.get());\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192        if (advice.hasState()) {\n   168\u2192            statefulAdvices++;\n   169\u2192        }\n   170\u2192    }\n   171\u2192\n   172\u2192    @Override\n   173\u2192    public void removeAdvice(CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<?> advice) {\n   174\u2192        if (advices.remove(advice) && advice.hasState()) {\n   175\u2192            statefulAdvices--;\n   176\u2192        }\n   177\u2192    }\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192    @Override\n   180\u2192    public <T> T getAdvice(Class<T> type) {\n   181\u2192        for (CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<?> task : advices) {\n   182\u2192            Object advice = unwrap(task);\n   183\u2192            if (type.isInstance(advice)) {\n   184\u2192                return type.cast(advice);\n   185\u2192            }\n   186\u2192        }\n   187\u2192        return null;\n   188\u2192    }\n   189\u2192\n   190\u2192    @Override\n   191\u2192    public void addRoutePolicyAdvice(List<RoutePolicy> routePolicyList) {\n   192\u2192        addAdvice(new CamelInternalProcessor.RoutePolicyAdvice(routePolicyList));\n   193\u2192    }\n   194\u2192\n   195\u2192    @Override\n   196\u2192    public void addRouteInflightRepositoryAdvice(InflightRepository inflightRepository, String routeId) {\n   197\u2192        addAdvice(new CamelInternalProcessor.RouteInflightRepositoryAdvice(camelContext.getInflightRepository(), routeId));\n   198\u2192    }\n   199\u2192\n   200\u2192    @Override\n   201\u2192    public void addRouteLifecycleAdvice(CamelContext camelContext, Route route, NamedRoute node) {\n   202\u2192        addAdvice(new CamelInternalProcessor.RouteLifecycleAdvice());\n   203\u2192        if (camelContext.isBacklogTracingStandby() || route.isBacklogTracing()) {\n   204\u2192            addAdvice(new BacklogTracerRouteAdvice(camelContext, node));\n   205\u2192        }\n   206\u2192    }\n   207\u2192\n   208\u2192    @Override\n   209\u2192    public void addManagementInterceptStrategy(InstrumentationProcessor processor) {\n   210\u2192        addAdvice(CamelInternalProcessor.wrap(processor));\n   211\u2192    }\n   212\u2192\n   213\u2192    @Override\n   214\u2192    public void setRouteOnAdvices(Route route) {\n   215\u2192        RoutePolicyAdvice task = getAdvice(RoutePolicyAdvice.class);\n   216\u2192        if (task != null) {\n   217\u2192            task.setRoute(route);\n   218\u2192        }\n   219\u2192        RouteLifecycleAdvice task2 = getAdvice(RouteLifecycleAdvice.class);\n   220\u2192        if (task2 != null) {\n   221\u2192            task2.setRoute(route);\n   222\u2192        }\n   223\u2192        BacklogTracerRouteAdvice task3 = getAdvice(BacklogTracerRouteAdvice.class);\n   224\u2192        if (task3 != null) {\n   225\u2192            task3.setRoute(route);\n   226\u2192        }\n   227\u2192    }\n   228\u2192\n   229\u2192    /**\n   230\u2192     * Callback task to process the advices after processing.\n   231\u2192     */\n   232\u2192    private final class AsyncAfterTask implements CamelInternalTask {\n   233\u2192\n   234\u2192        private final Object[] states;\n   235\u2192        private Exchange exchange;\n   236\u2192        private AsyncCallback originalCallback;\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192        private AsyncAfterTask(Object[] states) {\n   239\u2192            this.states = states;\n   240\u2192        }\n   241\u2192\n   242\u2192        @Override\n   243\u2192        public void prepare(Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback originalCallback) {\n   244\u2192            this.exchange = exchange;\n   245\u2192            this.originalCallback = originalCallback;\n   246\u2192        }\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192        @Override\n   249\u2192        public Object[] getStates() {\n   250\u2192            return states;\n   251\u2192        }\n   252\u2192\n   253\u2192        @Override\n   254\u2192        public void reset() {\n   255\u2192            Arrays.fill(this.states, null);\n   256\u2192            this.exchange = null;\n   257\u2192            this.originalCallback = null;\n   258\u2192        }\n   259\u2192\n   260\u2192        @Override\n   261\u2192        public void done(boolean doneSync) {\n   262\u2192            try {\n   263\u2192                AdviceIterator.runAfterTasks(advices, states, exchange);\n   264\u2192            } finally {\n   265\u2192                // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   266\u2192                // CAMEL END USER - DEBUG ME HERE +++ START +++\n   267\u2192                // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   268\u2192                // callback must be called\n   269\u2192                if (originalCallback != null) {\n   270\u2192                    reactiveExecutor.schedule(originalCallback);\n   271\u2192                }\n   272\u2192                // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   273\u2192                // CAMEL END USER - DEBUG ME HERE +++ END +++\n   274\u2192                // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   275\u2192\n   276\u2192                // task is done so reset\n   277\u2192                if (taskFactory != null) {\n   278\u2192                    taskFactory.release(this);\n   279\u2192                }\n   280\u2192            }\n   281\u2192        }\n   282\u2192    }\n   283\u2192\n   284\u2192    @Override\n   285\u2192    public boolean process(Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback originalCallback) {\n   286\u2192        // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   287\u2192        // CAMEL END USER - READ ME FOR DEBUGGING TIPS\n   288\u2192        // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   289\u2192        // If you want to debug the Camel routing engine, then there is a lot of internal functionality\n   290\u2192        // the routing engine executes during routing messages. You can skip debugging this internal\n   291\u2192        // functionality and instead debug where the routing engine continues routing to the next node\n   292\u2192        // in the routes. The CamelInternalProcessor is a vital part of the routing engine, as its\n   293\u2192        // being used in between the nodes. As an end user you can just debug the code in this class\n   294\u2192        // in between the:\n   295\u2192        //   CAMEL END USER - DEBUG ME HERE +++ START +++\n   296\u2192        //   CAMEL END USER - DEBUG ME HERE +++ END +++\n   297\u2192        // you can see in the code below within the processTransacted or processNonTransacted methods.\n   298\u2192        // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   299\u2192\n   300\u2192        if (processor == null || exchange.isRouteStop()) {\n   301\u2192            // no processor or we should not continue then we are done\n   302\u2192            originalCallback.done(true);\n   303\u2192            return true;\n   304\u2192        }\n   305\u2192        if (this instanceof Channel ca && ca.getNextProcessor() instanceof DisabledAware da && da.isDisabled()) {\n   306\u2192            // skip because the processor is disabled at runtime (in dev mode)\n   307\u2192            originalCallback.done(true);\n   308\u2192            return true;\n   309\u2192        }\n   310\u2192\n   311\u2192        if (shutdownStrategy.isForceShutdown()) {\n   312\u2192            return processShutdown(exchange, originalCallback);\n   313\u2192        }\n   314\u2192\n   315\u2192        Object[] states;\n   316\u2192\n   317\u2192        // create internal callback which will execute the advices in reverse order when done\n   318\u2192        CamelInternalTask afterTask = taskFactory != null ? taskFactory.acquire() : null;\n   319\u2192        if (afterTask == null) {\n   320\u2192            states = statefulAdvices > 0 ? new Object[statefulAdvices] : EMPTY_STATES;\n   321\u2192            afterTask = new AsyncAfterTask(states);\n   322\u2192        } else {\n   323\u2192            states = afterTask.getStates();\n   324\u2192        }\n   325\u2192        afterTask.prepare(exchange, originalCallback);\n   326\u2192\n   327\u2192        // optimise to use object array for states, and only for the number of advices that keep state\n   328\u2192        // optimise for loop using index access to avoid creating iterator object\n   329\u2192        for (int i = 0, j = 0; i < advices.size(); i++) {\n   330\u2192            CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<?> task = advices.get(i);\n   331\u2192            try {\n   332\u2192                Object state = task.before(exchange);\n   333\u2192                if (task.hasState()) {\n   334\u2192                    states[j++] = state;\n   335\u2192                }\n   336\u2192            } catch (Exception e) {\n   337\u2192                return handleException(exchange, originalCallback, e, afterTask);\n   338\u2192            }\n   339\u2192        }\n   340\u2192\n   341\u2192        // debugger can skip processing the exchange\n   342\u2192        Object skip = exchange.removeProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.SKIP_OVER);\n   343\u2192        if (Boolean.TRUE == skip) {\n   344\u2192            if (LOG.isTraceEnabled()) {\n   345\u2192                LOG.trace(\"Skipping exchange for exchangeId: {} -> {}\", exchange.getExchangeId(), exchange);\n   346\u2192            }\n   347\u2192            List<MessageHistory> list = exchange.getProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.MESSAGE_HISTORY, List.class);\n   348\u2192            if (list != null && !list.isEmpty()) {\n   349\u2192                MessageHistory last = list.get(list.size() - 1);\n   350\u2192                last.setDebugSkipOver(true);\n   351\u2192            }\n   352\u2192            // skip because the processor is specially disabled (such as from debugger)\n   353\u2192            originalCallback.done(true);\n   354\u2192            return true;\n   355\u2192        }\n   356\u2192\n   357\u2192        if (exchange.isTransacted()) {\n   358\u2192            return processTransacted(exchange, afterTask);\n   359\u2192        }\n   360\u2192\n   361\u2192        return processNonTransacted(exchange, afterTask);\n   362\u2192    }\n   363\u2192\n   364\u2192    private static boolean processShutdown(Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback originalCallback) {\n   365\u2192        String msg = \"Run not allowed as ShutdownStrategy is forcing shutting down, will reject executing exchange: \"\n   366\u2192                     + exchange;\n   367\u2192        LOG.debug(msg);\n   368\u2192        if (exchange.getException() == null) {\n   369\u2192            exchange.setException(new RejectedExecutionException(msg));\n   370\u2192        }\n   371\u2192        // force shutdown so we should not continue\n   372\u2192        originalCallback.done(true);\n   373\u2192        return true;\n   374\u2192    }\n   375\u2192\n   376\u2192    private boolean processNonTransacted(Exchange exchange, CamelInternalTask afterTask) {\n   377\u2192        final AsyncCallback async = beforeProcess(exchange, afterTask);\n   378\u2192\n   379\u2192        // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   380\u2192        // CAMEL END USER - DEBUG ME HERE +++ START +++\n   381\u2192        // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   382\u2192        if (LOG.isTraceEnabled()) {\n   383\u2192            LOG.trace(\"Processing exchange for exchangeId: {} -> {}\", exchange.getExchangeId(), exchange);\n   384\u2192        }\n   385\u2192        boolean sync = processor.process(exchange, async);\n   386\u2192        if (!sync) {\n   387\u2192            EventHelper.notifyExchangeAsyncProcessingStartedEvent(camelContext, exchange);\n   388\u2192        }\n   389\u2192\n   390\u2192        // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   391\u2192        // CAMEL END USER - DEBUG ME HERE +++ END +++\n   392\u2192        // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   393\u2192\n   394\u2192        // CAMEL-18255: move uow.afterProcess handling to the callback\n   395\u2192\n   396\u2192        if (LOG.isTraceEnabled()) {\n   397\u2192            logExchangeContinuity(exchange, sync);\n   398\u2192        }\n   399\u2192        return sync;\n   400\u2192    }\n   401\u2192\n   402\u2192    private static void logExchangeContinuity(Exchange exchange, boolean sync) {\n   403\u2192        LOG.trace(\"Exchange processed and is continued routed {} for exchangeId: {} -> {}\",\n   404\u2192                sync ? \"synchronously\" : \"asynchronously\",\n   405\u2192                exchange.getExchangeId(), exchange);\n   406\u2192    }\n   407\u2192\n   408\u2192    private AsyncCallback beforeProcess(Exchange exchange, CamelInternalTask afterTask) {\n   409\u2192        final UnitOfWork uow = exchange.getUnitOfWork();\n   410\u2192\n   411\u2192        // optimize to only do before uow processing if really needed\n   412\u2192        if (uow != null && uow.isBeforeAfterProcess()) {\n   413\u2192            return uow.beforeProcess(processor, exchange, afterTask);\n   414\u2192        }\n   415\u2192        return afterTask;\n   416\u2192    }\n   417\u2192\n   418\u2192    private boolean processTransacted(Exchange exchange, CamelInternalTask afterTask) {\n   419\u2192        // must be synchronized for transacted exchanges\n   420\u2192        if (LOG.isTraceEnabled()) {\n   421\u2192            LOG.trace(\"Transacted Exchange must be routed synchronously for exchangeId: {} -> {}\", exchange.getExchangeId(),\n   422\u2192                    exchange);\n   423\u2192        }\n   424\u2192        try {\n   425\u2192            // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   426\u2192            // CAMEL END USER - DEBUG ME HERE +++ START +++\n   427\u2192            // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   428\u2192            processor.process(exchange);\n   429\u2192            // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   430\u2192            // CAMEL END USER - DEBUG ME HERE +++ END +++\n   431\u2192            // ----------------------------------------------------------\n   432\u2192        } catch (Exception e) {\n   433\u2192            exchange.setException(e);\n   434\u2192        } finally {\n   435\u2192            // processing is done\n   436\u2192            afterTask.done(true);\n   437\u2192        }\n   438\u2192        // we are done synchronously - must return true\n   439\u2192        return true;\n   440\u2192    }\n   441\u2192\n   442\u2192    private boolean handleException(\n   443\u2192            Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback originalCallback, Exception e, CamelInternalTask afterTask) {\n   444\u2192        // error in before so break out\n   445\u2192        exchange.setException(e);\n   446\u2192        try {\n   447\u2192            originalCallback.done(true);\n   448\u2192        } finally {\n   449\u2192            // task is done so reset\n   450\u2192            if (taskFactory != null) {\n   451\u2192                taskFactory.release(afterTask);\n   452\u2192            }\n   453\u2192        }\n   454\u2192        return true;\n   455\u2192    }\n   456\u2192\n   457\u2192    @Override\n   458\u2192    public String toString() {\n   459\u2192        return processor != null ? processor.toString() : super.toString();\n   460\u2192    }\n   461\u2192\n   462\u2192    /**\n   463\u2192     * Advice to invoke callbacks for before and after routing.\n   464\u2192     */\n   465\u2192    public static class RouteLifecycleAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<Object> {\n   466\u2192\n   467\u2192        private Route route;\n   468\u2192\n   469\u2192        public void setRoute(Route route) {\n   470\u2192            this.route = route;\n   471\u2192        }\n   472\u2192\n   473\u2192        @Override\n   474\u2192        public Object before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n   475\u2192            UnitOfWork uow = exchange.getUnitOfWork();\n   476\u2192            if (uow != null) {\n   477\u2192                uow.beforeRoute(exchange, route);\n   478\u2192            }\n   479\u2192            return null;\n   480\u2192        }\n   481\u2192\n   482\u2192        @Override\n   483\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, Object object) throws Exception {\n   484\u2192            UnitOfWork uow = exchange.getUnitOfWork();\n   485\u2192            if (uow != null) {\n   486\u2192                uow.afterRoute(exchange, route);\n   487\u2192            }\n   488\u2192        }\n   489\u2192\n   490\u2192        @Override\n   491\u2192        public boolean hasState() {\n   492\u2192            return false;\n   493\u2192        }\n   494\u2192    }\n   495\u2192\n   496\u2192    /**\n   497\u2192     * Advice to keep the {@link InflightRepository} up to date.\n   498\u2192     */\n   499\u2192    public static class RouteInflightRepositoryAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<Object> {\n   500\u2192\n   501\u2192        private final InflightRepository inflightRepository;\n   502\u2192        private final String id;\n   503\u2192\n   504\u2192        public RouteInflightRepositoryAdvice(InflightRepository inflightRepository, String id) {\n   505\u2192            this.inflightRepository = inflightRepository;\n   506\u2192            this.id = id;\n   507\u2192        }\n   508\u2192\n   509\u2192        @Override\n   510\u2192        public Object before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n   511\u2192            inflightRepository.add(exchange, id);\n   512\u2192            return null;\n   513\u2192        }\n   514\u2192\n   515\u2192        @Override\n   516\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, Object state) throws Exception {\n   517\u2192            inflightRepository.remove(exchange, id);\n   518\u2192        }\n   519\u2192\n   520\u2192        @Override\n   521\u2192        public boolean hasState() {\n   522\u2192            return false;\n   523\u2192        }\n   524\u2192    }\n   525\u2192\n   526\u2192    /**\n   527\u2192     * Advice to execute any {@link RoutePolicy} a route may have been configured with.\n   528\u2192     */\n   529\u2192    public static class RoutePolicyAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<Object> {\n   530\u2192\n   531\u2192        private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(RoutePolicyAdvice.class);\n   532\u2192        private final List<RoutePolicy> routePolicies;\n   533\u2192        private Route route;\n   534\u2192\n   535\u2192        public RoutePolicyAdvice(List<RoutePolicy> routePolicies) {\n   536\u2192            this.routePolicies = routePolicies;\n   537\u2192        }\n   538\u2192\n   539\u2192        public void setRoute(Route route) {\n   540\u2192            this.route = route;\n   541\u2192        }\n   542\u2192\n   543\u2192        /**\n   544\u2192         * Strategy to determine if this policy is allowed to run\n   545\u2192         *\n   546\u2192         * @param  policy the policy\n   547\u2192         * @return        <tt>true</tt> to run\n   548\u2192         */\n   549\u2192        boolean isRoutePolicyRunAllowed(RoutePolicy policy) {\n   550\u2192            if (policy instanceof StatefulService ss) {\n   551\u2192                return ss.isRunAllowed();\n   552\u2192            }\n   553\u2192            return true;\n   554\u2192        }\n   555\u2192\n   556\u2192        @Override\n   557\u2192        public Object before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n   558\u2192            // invoke begin\n   559\u2192            for (RoutePolicy policy : routePolicies) {\n   560\u2192                try {\n   561\u2192                    if (isRoutePolicyRunAllowed(policy)) {\n   562\u2192                        policy.onExchangeBegin(route, exchange);\n   563\u2192                    }\n   564\u2192                } catch (Exception e) {\n   565\u2192                    LOG.warn(\"Error occurred during onExchangeBegin on RoutePolicy: {}. This exception will be ignored\", policy,\n   566\u2192                            e);\n   567\u2192                }\n   568\u2192            }\n   569\u2192            return null;\n   570\u2192        }\n   571\u2192\n   572\u2192        @Override\n   573\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, Object data) throws Exception {\n   574\u2192            // do not invoke it if Camel is stopping as we don't want\n   575\u2192            // the policy to start a consumer during Camel is stopping\n   576\u2192            if (isCamelStopping(exchange.getContext())) {\n   577\u2192                return;\n   578\u2192            }\n   579\u2192\n   580\u2192            for (RoutePolicy policy : routePolicies) {\n   581\u2192                try {\n   582\u2192                    if (isRoutePolicyRunAllowed(policy)) {\n   583\u2192                        policy.onExchangeDone(route, exchange);\n   584\u2192                    }\n   585\u2192                } catch (Exception e) {\n   586\u2192                    LOG.warn(\"Error occurred during onExchangeDone on RoutePolicy: {}. This exception will be ignored\",\n   587\u2192                            policy, e);\n   588\u2192                }\n   589\u2192            }\n   590\u2192        }\n   591\u2192\n   592\u2192        private static boolean isCamelStopping(CamelContext context) {\n   593\u2192            if (context != null) {\n   594\u2192                return context.isStopping() || context.isStopped();\n   595\u2192            }\n   596\u2192            return false;\n   597\u2192        }\n   598\u2192\n   599\u2192        @Override\n   600\u2192        public boolean hasState() {\n   601\u2192            return false;\n   602\u2192        }\n   603\u2192    }\n   604\u2192\n   605\u2192    /**\n   606\u2192     * Advice to invoke callbacks for before and after routing for {@link org.apache.camel.spi.BacklogTracer}.\n   607\u2192     */\n   608\u2192    public static class BacklogTracerRouteAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage> {\n   609\u2192\n   610\u2192        private final CamelContext camelContext;\n   611\u2192        private final NamedRoute routeDefinition;\n   612\u2192        private final BacklogTracer backlogTracer;\n   613\u2192        private final boolean rest;\n   614\u2192        private final boolean template;\n   615\u2192        private final boolean skip;\n   616\u2192        private Route route;\n   617\u2192\n   618\u2192        public BacklogTracerRouteAdvice(CamelContext camelContext, NamedRoute definition) {\n   619\u2192            this.camelContext = camelContext;\n   620\u2192            this.routeDefinition = definition;\n   621\u2192            if (routeDefinition != null) {\n   622\u2192                this.rest = routeDefinition.isCreatedFromRest();\n   623\u2192                this.template = routeDefinition.isCreatedFromTemplate();\n   624\u2192            } else {\n   625\u2192                this.rest = false;\n   626\u2192                this.template = false;\n   627\u2192            }\n   628\u2192            this.backlogTracer = getOrCreateBacklogTracer(camelContext);\n   629\u2192            // optimize whether to skip this route or not\n   630\u2192            if (this.rest && !backlogTracer.isTraceRests()) {\n   631\u2192                this.skip = true;\n   632\u2192            } else if (this.template && !backlogTracer.isTraceTemplates()) {\n   633\u2192                this.skip = true;\n   634\u2192            } else {\n   635\u2192                this.skip = false;\n   636\u2192            }\n   637\u2192        }\n   638\u2192\n   639\u2192        public void setRoute(Route route) {\n   640\u2192            this.route = route;\n   641\u2192        }\n   642\u2192\n   643\u2192        @Override\n   644\u2192        public DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n   645\u2192            if (!skip && backlogTracer.shouldTrace(routeDefinition.getInput(), exchange)) {\n   646\u2192                final long created = exchange.getClock().getCreated();\n   647\u2192                NamedNode input = routeDefinition.getInput();\n   648\u2192                String source = LoggerHelper.getLineNumberLoggerName(input);\n   649\u2192                String exchangeId = exchange.getExchangeId();\n   650\u2192                String correlationExchangeId = exchange.getProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.CORRELATION_ID, String.class);\n   651\u2192                String routeId = routeDefinition.getRouteId();\n   652\u2192                String fromRouteId = exchange.getFromRouteId();\n   653\u2192                int level = 1;\n   654\u2192\n   655\u2192                boolean includeExchangeProperties = backlogTracer.isIncludeExchangeProperties();\n   656\u2192                boolean includeExchangeVariables = backlogTracer.isIncludeExchangeVariables();\n   657\u2192                JsonObject data = MessageHelper.dumpAsJSonObject(exchange.getIn(), includeExchangeProperties,\n   658\u2192                        includeExchangeVariables, true,\n   659\u2192                        true, backlogTracer.isBodyIncludeStreams(), backlogTracer.isBodyIncludeFiles(),\n   660\u2192                        backlogTracer.getBodyMaxChars());\n   661\u2192\n   662\u2192                DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage first = new DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage(\n   663\u2192                        camelContext,\n   664\u2192                        true, false, backlogTracer.incrementTraceCounter(), created, source, fromRouteId, routeId,\n   665\u2192                        input.getId(),\n   666\u2192                        null, null, null,\n   667\u2192                        input.getShortName(), input.getLabel(),\n   668\u2192                        level, exchangeId, correlationExchangeId, rest, template, data);\n   669\u2192                if (exchange.getFromEndpoint() instanceof EndpointServiceLocation esl) {\n   670\u2192                    first.setEndpointServiceUrl(esl.getServiceUrl());\n   671\u2192                    first.setEndpointServiceProtocol(esl.getServiceProtocol());\n   672\u2192                    first.setEndpointServiceMetadata(esl.getServiceMetadata());\n   673\u2192                }\n   674\u2192                backlogTracer.traceEvent(first);\n   675\u2192                return first;\n   676\u2192            }\n   677\u2192            return null;\n   678\u2192        }\n   679\u2192\n   680\u2192        @Override\n   681\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage first) throws Exception {\n   682\u2192            if (first != null) {\n   683\u2192\n   684\u2192                final long created = exchange.getClock().getCreated();\n   685\u2192                NamedNode input = routeDefinition.getInput();\n   686\u2192                String source = LoggerHelper.getLineNumberLoggerName(input);\n   687\u2192                String exchangeId = exchange.getExchangeId();\n   688\u2192                String correlationExchangeId = exchange.getProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.CORRELATION_ID, String.class);\n   689\u2192                String routeId = routeDefinition.getRouteId();\n   690\u2192                String fromRouteId = exchange.getFromRouteId();\n   691\u2192                int level = 1;\n   692\u2192\n   693\u2192                boolean includeExchangeProperties = backlogTracer.isIncludeExchangeProperties();\n   694\u2192                boolean includeExchangeVariables = backlogTracer.isIncludeExchangeVariables();\n   695\u2192                JsonObject data = MessageHelper.dumpAsJSonObject(exchange.getIn(), includeExchangeProperties,\n   696\u2192                        includeExchangeVariables, true,\n   697\u2192                        true, backlogTracer.isBodyIncludeStreams(), backlogTracer.isBodyIncludeFiles(),\n   698\u2192                        backlogTracer.getBodyMaxChars());\n   699\u2192\n   700\u2192                DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage last = new DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage(\n   701\u2192                        camelContext,\n   702\u2192                        false, true, backlogTracer.incrementTraceCounter(), created, source, fromRouteId, routeId,\n   703\u2192                        input.getId(),\n   704\u2192                        null, null, null,\n   705\u2192                        input.getShortName(), input.getLabel(),\n   706\u2192                        level, exchangeId, correlationExchangeId, rest, template, data);\n   707\u2192                if (exchange.getFromEndpoint() instanceof EndpointServiceLocation esl) {\n   708\u2192                    first.setEndpointServiceUrl(esl.getServiceUrl());\n   709\u2192                    first.setEndpointServiceProtocol(esl.getServiceProtocol());\n   710\u2192                    first.setEndpointServiceMetadata(esl.getServiceMetadata());\n   711\u2192                }\n   712\u2192                backlogTracer.traceEvent(last);\n   713\u2192                doneProcessing(exchange, last);\n   714\u2192                doneProcessing(exchange, first);\n   715\u2192                // to not be confused then lets store duration on first/last as (first = 0, last = total time to process)\n   716\u2192                last.setElapsed(first.getElapsed());\n   717\u2192                first.setElapsed(0);\n   718\u2192            }\n   719\u2192        }\n   720\u2192\n   721\u2192        private void doneProcessing(Exchange exchange, DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage data) {\n   722\u2192            data.doneProcessing();\n   723\u2192\n   724\u2192            String uri = null;\n   725\u2192            boolean remote = true;\n   726\u2192            Endpoint endpoint = null;\n   727\u2192            if ((data.isFirst() || data.isLast())) {\n   728\u2192                if (route.getConsumer() != null) {\n   729\u2192                    // get the actual resolved uri\n   730\u2192                    uri = route.getConsumer().getEndpoint().getEndpointUri();\n   731\u2192                    remote = route.getConsumer().getEndpoint().isRemote();\n   732\u2192                    endpoint = route.getEndpoint();\n   733\u2192                } else {\n   734\u2192                    uri = routeDefinition.getEndpointUrl();\n   735\u2192                }\n   736\u2192            }\n   737\u2192            if (uri != null) {\n   738\u2192                data.setEndpointUri(uri);\n   739\u2192            }\n   740\u2192            data.setRemoteEndpoint(remote);\n   741\u2192            if (endpoint instanceof EndpointServiceLocation esl) {\n   742\u2192                data.setEndpointServiceUrl(esl.getServiceUrl());\n   743\u2192                data.setEndpointServiceProtocol(esl.getServiceProtocol());\n   744\u2192                data.setEndpointServiceMetadata(esl.getServiceMetadata());\n   745\u2192            }\n   746\u2192\n   747\u2192            if (!data.isFirst() && backlogTracer.isIncludeException()) {\n   748\u2192                // we want to capture if there was an exception\n   749\u2192                Throwable e = exchange.getException();\n   750\u2192                if (e != null) {\n   751\u2192                    data.setException(e);\n   752\u2192                }\n   753\u2192            }\n   754\u2192        }\n   755\u2192    }\n   756\u2192\n   757\u2192    /**\n   758\u2192     * Special advice for handling aggregate EIP for the {@link org.apache.camel.spi.BacklogTracer}.\n   759\u2192     */\n   760\u2192    public static final class BacklogTracerAggregateAdvice\n   761\u2192            implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage> {\n   762\u2192\n   763\u2192        private final CamelContext camelContext;\n   764\u2192        private final NamedNode processorDefinition;\n   765\u2192        private final BacklogTracer backlogTracer;\n   766\u2192\n   767\u2192        public BacklogTracerAggregateAdvice(CamelContext camelContext, NamedNode definition) {\n   768\u2192            this.camelContext = camelContext;\n   769\u2192            this.processorDefinition = definition;\n   770\u2192            this.backlogTracer = getOrCreateBacklogTracer(camelContext);\n   771\u2192        }\n   772\u2192\n   773\u2192        @Override\n   774\u2192        public DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n   775\u2192            String exchangeId = exchange.getExchangeId();\n   776\u2192            String correlationExchangeId = exchange.getProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.CORRELATION_ID, String.class);\n   777\u2192            int level = processorDefinition.getLevel();\n   778\u2192            String routeId = ExchangeHelper.getAtRouteId(exchange);\n   779\u2192            String fromRouteId = exchange.getFromRouteId();\n   780\u2192            String source = LoggerHelper.getLineNumberLoggerName(processorDefinition);\n   781\u2192\n   782\u2192            boolean includeExchangeProperties = backlogTracer.isIncludeExchangeProperties();\n   783\u2192            boolean includeExchangeVariables = backlogTracer.isIncludeExchangeVariables();\n   784\u2192            JsonObject data = MessageHelper.dumpAsJSonObject(exchange.getIn(), includeExchangeProperties,\n   785\u2192                    includeExchangeVariables, true,\n   786\u2192                    true, backlogTracer.isBodyIncludeStreams(), backlogTracer.isBodyIncludeFiles(),\n   787\u2192                    backlogTracer.getBodyMaxChars());\n   788\u2192\n   789\u2192            DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage event = new DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage(\n   790\u2192                    camelContext,\n   791\u2192                    true, false, backlogTracer.incrementTraceCounter(), exchange.getClock().getCreated(), source,\n   792\u2192                    fromRouteId, routeId,\n   793\u2192                    processorDefinition.getId(),\n   794\u2192                    null, null, null,\n   795\u2192                    processorDefinition.getShortName(), processorDefinition.getLabel(),\n   796\u2192                    level + 1, exchangeId, correlationExchangeId, false, false, data);\n   797\u2192            backlogTracer.traceEvent(event);\n   798\u2192            return event;\n   799\u2192        }\n   800\u2192\n   801\u2192        @Override\n   802\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage first) throws Exception {\n   803\u2192            if (first != null) {\n   804\u2192                final long created = exchange.getClock().getCreated();\n   805\u2192                String source = LoggerHelper.getLineNumberLoggerName(processorDefinition);\n   806\u2192                String exchangeId = exchange.getExchangeId();\n   807\u2192                String correlationExchangeId = exchange.getProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.CORRELATION_ID, String.class);\n   808\u2192                String routeId = ExchangeHelper.getAtRouteId(exchange);\n   809\u2192                String fromRouteId = exchange.getFromRouteId();\n   810\u2192                int level = 1;\n   811\u2192\n   812\u2192                boolean includeExchangeProperties = backlogTracer.isIncludeExchangeProperties();\n   813\u2192                boolean includeExchangeVariables = backlogTracer.isIncludeExchangeVariables();\n   814\u2192                JsonObject data = MessageHelper.dumpAsJSonObject(exchange.getIn(), includeExchangeProperties,\n   815\u2192                        includeExchangeVariables, true,\n   816\u2192                        true, backlogTracer.isBodyIncludeStreams(), backlogTracer.isBodyIncludeFiles(),\n   817\u2192                        backlogTracer.getBodyMaxChars());\n   818\u2192\n   819\u2192                DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage last = new DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage(\n   820\u2192                        camelContext,\n   821\u2192                        false, true, backlogTracer.incrementTraceCounter(), created, source, fromRouteId, routeId,\n   822\u2192                        processorDefinition.getId(),\n   823\u2192                        null, null, null,\n   824\u2192                        processorDefinition.getShortName(), processorDefinition.getLabel(),\n   825\u2192                        level, exchangeId, correlationExchangeId, false, false, data);\n   826\u2192                if (exchange.getFromEndpoint() instanceof EndpointServiceLocation esl) {\n   827\u2192                    first.setEndpointServiceUrl(esl.getServiceUrl());\n   828\u2192                    first.setEndpointServiceProtocol(esl.getServiceProtocol());\n   829\u2192                    first.setEndpointServiceMetadata(esl.getServiceMetadata());\n   830\u2192                }\n   831\u2192                backlogTracer.traceEvent(last);\n   832\u2192                doneProcessing(exchange, last);\n   833\u2192                doneProcessing(exchange, first);\n   834\u2192                // to not be confused then lets store duration on first/last as (first = 0, last = total time to process)\n   835\u2192                last.setElapsed(first.getElapsed());\n   836\u2192                first.setElapsed(0);\n   837\u2192            }\n   838\u2192        }\n   839\u2192\n   840\u2192        private void doneProcessing(Exchange exchange, DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage data) {\n   841\u2192            data.doneProcessing();\n   842\u2192\n   843\u2192            if (!data.isFirst() && backlogTracer.isIncludeException()) {\n   844\u2192                // we want to capture if there was an exception\n   845\u2192                Throwable e = exchange.getException();\n   846\u2192                if (e != null) {\n   847\u2192                    data.setException(e);\n   848\u2192                }\n   849\u2192            }\n   850\u2192        }\n   851\u2192    }\n   852\u2192\n   853\u2192    /**\n   854\u2192     * Advice to execute the {@link BacklogTracer} if enabled.\n   855\u2192     */\n   856\u2192    public static final class BacklogTracerAdvice\n   857\u2192            implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage> {\n   858\u2192\n   859\u2192        private final TraceAdviceEventNotifier notifier;\n   860\u2192        private final CamelContext camelContext;\n   861\u2192        private final BacklogTracer backlogTracer;\n   862\u2192        private final NamedNode processorDefinition;\n   863\u2192        private final NamedRoute routeDefinition;\n   864\u2192        private final boolean rest;\n   865\u2192        private final boolean template;\n   866\u2192        private final boolean skip;\n   867\u2192\n   868\u2192        public BacklogTracerAdvice(CamelContext camelContext, BacklogTracer backlogTracer, NamedNode processorDefinition,\n   869\u2192                                   NamedRoute routeDefinition) {\n   870\u2192            this.camelContext = camelContext;\n   871\u2192            this.backlogTracer = backlogTracer;\n   872\u2192            this.processorDefinition = processorDefinition;\n   873\u2192            this.routeDefinition = routeDefinition;\n   874\u2192\n   875\u2192            if (routeDefinition != null) {\n   876\u2192                this.rest = routeDefinition.isCreatedFromRest();\n   877\u2192                this.template = routeDefinition.isCreatedFromTemplate();\n   878\u2192            } else {\n   879\u2192                this.rest = false;\n   880\u2192                this.template = false;\n   881\u2192            }\n   882\u2192            // optimize whether to skip this route or not\n   883\u2192            if (this.rest && !backlogTracer.isTraceRests()) {\n   884\u2192                this.skip = true;\n   885\u2192            } else if (this.template && !backlogTracer.isTraceTemplates()) {\n   886\u2192                this.skip = true;\n   887\u2192            } else {\n   888\u2192                this.skip = false;\n   889\u2192            }\n   890\u2192            this.notifier = getOrCreateEventNotifier(camelContext);\n   891\u2192        }\n   892\u2192\n   893\u2192        private TraceAdviceEventNotifier getOrCreateEventNotifier(CamelContext camelContext) {\n   894\u2192            // use a single instance of this event notifier\n   895\u2192            for (EventNotifier en : camelContext.getManagementStrategy().getEventNotifiers()) {\n   896\u2192                if (en instanceof TraceAdviceEventNotifier traceAdviceEventNotifier) {\n   897\u2192                    return traceAdviceEventNotifier;\n   898\u2192                }\n   899\u2192            }\n   900\u2192            TraceAdviceEventNotifier answer = new TraceAdviceEventNotifier();\n   901\u2192            camelContext.getManagementStrategy().addEventNotifier(answer);\n   902\u2192            return answer;\n   903\u2192        }\n   904\u2192\n   905\u2192        @Override\n   906\u2192        public DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n   907\u2192            if (!skip && backlogTracer.shouldTrace(processorDefinition, exchange)) {\n   908\u2192\n   909\u2192                // to capture if the exchange was sent to an endpoint during this event\n   910\u2192                notifier.before(exchange);\n   911\u2192\n   912\u2192                long timestamp = System.currentTimeMillis();\n   913\u2192                String toNode = processorDefinition.getId();\n   914\u2192                String toNodeParentId = processorDefinition.getParentId();\n   915\u2192                String toNodeShortName = processorDefinition.getShortName();\n   916\u2192                // special for choice as we want to know which when predicate that was triggered\n   917\u2192                String toNodeParentWhenId = null;\n   918\u2192                String toNodeParentWhenLabel = null;\n   919\u2192                NamedNode pn = processorDefinition.getParent();\n   920\u2192                if (pn != null && \"choice\".equals(pn.getShortName())) {\n   921\u2192                    NamedNode mn = pn.findMatchingWhen(processorDefinition.getId());\n   922\u2192                    if (mn == null) {\n   923\u2192                        mn = pn.findMatchingOtherwise(processorDefinition.getId());\n   924\u2192                    }\n   925\u2192                    if (mn != null) {\n   926\u2192                        toNodeParentWhenId = mn.getId();\n   927\u2192                        toNodeParentWhenLabel = mn.getLabel();\n   928\u2192                    }\n   929\u2192                }\n   930\u2192                String toNodeLabel = StringHelper.limitLength(processorDefinition.getLabel(), 50);\n   931\u2192                String exchangeId = exchange.getExchangeId();\n   932\u2192                String correlationExchangeId = exchange.getProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.CORRELATION_ID, String.class);\n   933\u2192                int level = processorDefinition.getLevel();\n   934\u2192\n   935\u2192                boolean includeExchangeProperties = backlogTracer.isIncludeExchangeProperties();\n   936\u2192                boolean includeExchangeVariables = backlogTracer.isIncludeExchangeVariables();\n   937\u2192                JsonObject data = MessageHelper.dumpAsJSonObject(exchange.getIn(), includeExchangeProperties,\n   938\u2192                        includeExchangeVariables, true,\n   939\u2192                        true, backlogTracer.isBodyIncludeStreams(), backlogTracer.isBodyIncludeFiles(),\n   940\u2192                        backlogTracer.getBodyMaxChars());\n   941\u2192\n   942\u2192                // if first we should add a pseudo trace message as well, so we have a starting message (eg from the route)\n   943\u2192                String routeId = routeDefinition != null ? routeDefinition.getRouteId() : null;\n   944\u2192                String fromRouteId = exchange.getFromRouteId();\n   945\u2192                String source = LoggerHelper.getLineNumberLoggerName(processorDefinition);\n   946\u2192\n   947\u2192                DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage event = new DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage(\n   948\u2192                        camelContext,\n   949\u2192                        false, false, backlogTracer.incrementTraceCounter(), timestamp, source, fromRouteId, routeId, toNode,\n   950\u2192                        toNodeParentId,\n   951\u2192                        toNodeParentWhenId, toNodeParentWhenLabel,\n   952\u2192                        toNodeShortName, toNodeLabel, level,\n   953\u2192                        exchangeId, correlationExchangeId, rest, template, data);\n   954\u2192                backlogTracer.traceEvent(event);\n   955\u2192                return event;\n   956\u2192            }\n   957\u2192\n   958\u2192            return null;\n   959\u2192        }\n   960\u2192\n   961\u2192        private SynchronizationAdapter createAggregateOnCompletion(\n   962\u2192                String source, DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage pseudoFirst) {\n   963\u2192            return new SynchronizationAdapter() {\n   964\u2192                @Override\n   965\u2192                public void onDone(Exchange exchange) {\n   966\u2192                    // create pseudo last for the aggregate\n   967\u2192                    String routeId = routeDefinition != null ? routeDefinition.getRouteId() : null;\n   968\u2192                    String fromRouteId = exchange.getFromRouteId();\n   969\u2192                    String exchangeId = exchange.getExchangeId();\n   970\u2192                    String correlationExchangeId = exchange.getProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.CORRELATION_ID, String.class);\n   971\u2192                    boolean includeExchangeProperties = backlogTracer.isIncludeExchangeProperties();\n   972\u2192                    boolean includeExchangeVariables = backlogTracer.isIncludeExchangeVariables();\n   973\u2192                    long created = exchange.getClock().getCreated();\n   974\u2192                    int level = pseudoFirst.getToNodeLevel();\n   975\u2192                    String toNode = pseudoFirst.getToNode();\n   976\u2192                    String toNodeShortName = pseudoFirst.getToNodeShortName();\n   977\u2192                    String toNodeLabel = pseudoFirst.getToNodeLabel();\n   978\u2192                    JsonObject data = MessageHelper.dumpAsJSonObject(exchange.getIn(), includeExchangeProperties,\n   979\u2192                            includeExchangeVariables, true,\n   980\u2192                            true, backlogTracer.isBodyIncludeStreams(), backlogTracer.isBodyIncludeFiles(),\n   981\u2192                            backlogTracer.getBodyMaxChars());\n   982\u2192                    DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage pseudoLast = new DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage(\n   983\u2192                            camelContext,\n   984\u2192                            false, true, backlogTracer.incrementTraceCounter(), created, source, fromRouteId, routeId, toNode,\n   985\u2192                            null, null,\n   986\u2192                            null, toNodeShortName, toNodeLabel,\n   987\u2192                            level, exchangeId, correlationExchangeId, rest, template, data);\n   988\u2192                    backlogTracer.traceEvent(pseudoLast);\n   989\u2192                    doneProcessing(exchange, pseudoLast);\n   990\u2192                    doneProcessing(exchange, pseudoFirst);\n   991\u2192                    // to not be confused then lets store duration on first/last as (first = 0, last = total time to process)\n   992\u2192                    pseudoLast.setElapsed(pseudoFirst.getElapsed());\n   993\u2192                    pseudoFirst.setElapsed(0);\n   994\u2192                }\n   995\u2192            };\n   996\u2192        }\n   997\u2192\n   998\u2192        @Override\n   999\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage data) throws Exception {\n  1000\u2192            if (data != null) {\n  1001\u2192                doneProcessing(exchange, data);\n  1002\u2192            }\n  1003\u2192        }\n  1004\u2192\n  1005\u2192        private void doneProcessing(Exchange exchange, DefaultBacklogTracerEventMessage data) {\n  1006\u2192            data.doneProcessing();\n  1007\u2192\n  1008\u2192            String uri = null;\n  1009\u2192            boolean remote = true;\n  1010\u2192            Endpoint endpoint = notifier.after(exchange);\n  1011\u2192            if (endpoint != null) {\n  1012\u2192                uri = endpoint.getEndpointUri();\n  1013\u2192                remote = endpoint.isRemote();\n  1014\u2192            } else if ((data.isFirst() || data.isLast()) && !\"aggregate\".equals(data.getToNodeShortName())\n  1015\u2192                    && routeDefinition != null) {\n  1016\u2192                // pseudo first/last event (the from in the route)\n  1017\u2192                Route route = camelContext.getRoute(routeDefinition.getRouteId());\n  1018\u2192                if (route != null && route.getConsumer() != null) {\n  1019\u2192                    // get the actual resolved uri\n  1020\u2192                    uri = route.getConsumer().getEndpoint().getEndpointUri();\n  1021\u2192                    remote = route.getConsumer().getEndpoint().isRemote();\n  1022\u2192                } else {\n  1023\u2192                    uri = routeDefinition.getEndpointUrl();\n  1024\u2192                }\n  1025\u2192            }\n  1026\u2192            if (uri != null) {\n  1027\u2192                data.setEndpointUri(uri);\n  1028\u2192            }\n  1029\u2192            data.setRemoteEndpoint(remote);\n  1030\u2192            if (endpoint instanceof EndpointServiceLocation esl) {\n  1031\u2192                data.setEndpointServiceUrl(esl.getServiceUrl());\n  1032\u2192                data.setEndpointServiceProtocol(esl.getServiceProtocol());\n  1033\u2192                data.setEndpointServiceMetadata(esl.getServiceMetadata());\n  1034\u2192            }\n  1035\u2192\n  1036\u2192            if (!data.isFirst() && backlogTracer.isIncludeException()) {\n  1037\u2192                // we want to capture if there was an exception\n  1038\u2192                Throwable e = exchange.getException();\n  1039\u2192                if (e != null) {\n  1040\u2192                    data.setException(e);\n  1041\u2192                }\n  1042\u2192            }\n  1043\u2192        }\n  1044\u2192    }\n  1045\u2192\n  1046\u2192    /**\n  1047\u2192     * Advice to execute the {@link BacklogDebugger} if enabled.\n  1048\u2192     */\n  1049\u2192    public static final class BacklogDebuggerAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<StopWatch> {\n  1050\u2192\n  1051\u2192        private final BacklogDebugger backlogDebugger;\n  1052\u2192        private final Processor target;\n  1053\u2192        private final NamedNode definition;\n  1054\u2192\n  1055\u2192        public BacklogDebuggerAdvice(BacklogDebugger backlogDebugger, Processor target, NamedNode definition) {\n  1056\u2192            this.backlogDebugger = backlogDebugger;\n  1057\u2192            this.target = target;\n  1058\u2192            this.definition = definition;\n  1059\u2192        }\n  1060\u2192\n  1061\u2192        @Override\n  1062\u2192        public StopWatch before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n  1063\u2192            if (definition.acceptDebugger(exchange)) {\n  1064\u2192                return backlogDebugger.beforeProcess(exchange, target, definition);\n  1065\u2192            }\n  1066\u2192            return null;\n  1067\u2192        }\n  1068\u2192\n  1069\u2192        @Override\n  1070\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, StopWatch stopWatch) throws Exception {\n  1071\u2192            if (stopWatch != null) {\n  1072\u2192                backlogDebugger.afterProcess(exchange, target, definition, stopWatch.taken());\n  1073\u2192            }\n  1074\u2192        }\n  1075\u2192    }\n  1076\u2192\n  1077\u2192    /**\n  1078\u2192     * Advice to execute when using custom debugger.\n  1079\u2192     */\n  1080\u2192    public static final class DebuggerAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<StopWatch> {\n  1081\u2192\n  1082\u2192        private final Debugger debugger;\n  1083\u2192        private final Processor target;\n  1084\u2192        private final NamedNode definition;\n  1085\u2192\n  1086\u2192        public DebuggerAdvice(Debugger debugger, Processor target, NamedNode definition) {\n  1087\u2192            this.debugger = debugger;\n  1088\u2192            this.target = target;\n  1089\u2192            this.definition = definition;\n  1090\u2192        }\n  1091\u2192\n  1092\u2192        @Override\n  1093\u2192        public StopWatch before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n  1094\u2192            if (definition.acceptDebugger(exchange)) {\n  1095\u2192                debugger.beforeProcess(exchange, target, definition);\n  1096\u2192                return new StopWatch();\n  1097\u2192            }\n  1098\u2192            return null;\n  1099\u2192        }\n  1100\u2192\n  1101\u2192        @Override\n  1102\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, StopWatch stopWatch) throws Exception {\n  1103\u2192            if (stopWatch != null) {\n  1104\u2192                debugger.afterProcess(exchange, target, definition, stopWatch.taken());\n  1105\u2192            }\n  1106\u2192        }\n  1107\u2192\n  1108\u2192    }\n  1109\u2192\n  1110\u2192    /**\n  1111\u2192     * Advice to inject new {@link UnitOfWork} to the {@link Exchange} if needed, and as well to ensure the\n  1112\u2192     * {@link UnitOfWork} is done and stopped.\n  1113\u2192     */\n  1114\u2192    public static class UnitOfWorkProcessorAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<UnitOfWork> {\n  1115\u2192\n  1116\u2192        private final Route route;\n  1117\u2192        private String routeId;\n  1118\u2192        private final UnitOfWorkFactory uowFactory;\n  1119\u2192\n  1120\u2192        public UnitOfWorkProcessorAdvice(Route route, CamelContext camelContext) {\n  1121\u2192            this.route = route;\n  1122\u2192            if (route != null) {\n  1123\u2192                this.routeId = route.getRouteId();\n  1124\u2192            }\n  1125\u2192            this.uowFactory = PluginHelper.getUnitOfWorkFactory(camelContext);\n  1126\u2192            // optimize uow factory to initialize it early and once per advice\n  1127\u2192            this.uowFactory.afterPropertiesConfigured(camelContext);\n  1128\u2192        }\n  1129\u2192\n  1130\u2192        @Override\n  1131\u2192        public UnitOfWork before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n  1132\u2192            // if the exchange doesn't have from route id set, then set it if it originated\n  1133\u2192            // from this unit of work\n  1134\u2192            if (route != null && exchange.getFromRouteId() == null) {\n  1135\u2192                if (routeId == null) {\n  1136\u2192                    this.routeId = route.getRouteId();\n  1137\u2192                }\n  1138\u2192                exchange.getExchangeExtension().setFromRouteId(routeId);\n  1139\u2192            }\n  1140\u2192\n  1141\u2192            // only return UnitOfWork if we created a new as then its us that handle the lifecycle to done the created UoW\n  1142\u2192\n  1143\u2192            UnitOfWork uow = exchange.getUnitOfWork();\n  1144\u2192\n  1145\u2192            UnitOfWork created = null;\n  1146\u2192            if (uow == null) {\n  1147\u2192                // If there is no existing UoW, then we should start one and\n  1148\u2192                // terminate it once processing is completed for the exchange.\n  1149\u2192                created = createUnitOfWork(exchange);\n  1150\u2192                exchange.getExchangeExtension().setUnitOfWork(created);\n  1151\u2192                uow = created;\n  1152\u2192            } else {\n  1153\u2192                // reuse existing exchange\n  1154\u2192                if (uow.onPrepare(exchange)) {\n  1155\u2192                    // need to re-attach uow\n  1156\u2192                    exchange.getExchangeExtension().setUnitOfWork(uow);\n  1157\u2192                    // we are prepared for reuse and can regard it as-if we created the unit of work\n  1158\u2192                    // so the after method knows that this is the outer bounds and should done the unit of work\n  1159\u2192                    created = uow;\n  1160\u2192                }\n  1161\u2192            }\n  1162\u2192\n  1163\u2192            // for any exchange we should push/pop route context so we can keep track of which route we are routing\n  1164\u2192            if (route != null) {\n  1165\u2192                uow.pushRoute(route);\n  1166\u2192            }\n  1167\u2192\n  1168\u2192            return created;\n  1169\u2192        }\n  1170\u2192\n  1171\u2192        @Override\n  1172\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, UnitOfWork uow) throws Exception {\n  1173\u2192            UnitOfWork existing = exchange.getUnitOfWork();\n  1174\u2192\n  1175\u2192            // execute done on uow if we created it, and the consumer is not doing it\n  1176\u2192            if (uow != null) {\n  1177\u2192                UnitOfWorkHelper.doneUow(uow, exchange);\n  1178\u2192            }\n  1179\u2192\n  1180\u2192            // after UoW is done lets pop the route context which must be done on every existing UoW\n  1181\u2192            if (route != null && existing != null) {\n  1182\u2192                existing.popRoute();\n  1183\u2192            }\n  1184\u2192        }\n  1185\u2192\n  1186\u2192        protected UnitOfWork createUnitOfWork(Exchange exchange) {\n  1187\u2192            if (uowFactory != null) {\n  1188\u2192                return uowFactory.createUnitOfWork(exchange);\n  1189\u2192            } else {\n  1190\u2192                return PluginHelper.getUnitOfWorkFactory(exchange.getContext()).createUnitOfWork(exchange);\n  1191\u2192            }\n  1192\u2192        }\n  1193\u2192\n  1194\u2192    }\n  1195\u2192\n  1196\u2192    /**\n  1197\u2192     * Advice when Message History has been enabled.\n  1198\u2192     */\n  1199\u2192    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n  1200\u2192    public static class MessageHistoryAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<MessageHistory> {\n  1201\u2192\n  1202\u2192        private final MessageHistoryFactory factory;\n  1203\u2192        private final NamedNode definition;\n  1204\u2192        private final String routeId;\n  1205\u2192\n  1206\u2192        public
