MessageHistoryAdvice(MessageHistoryFactory factory, NamedNode definition) {\n  1207\u2192            this.factory = factory;\n  1208\u2192            this.definition = definition;\n  1209\u2192            this.routeId = CamelContextHelper.getRouteId(definition);\n  1210\u2192        }\n  1211\u2192\n  1212\u2192        @Override\n  1213\u2192        public MessageHistory before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n  1214\u2192            // we may be routing outside a route in an onException or interceptor and if so then grab\n  1215\u2192            // route id from the exchange UoW state\n  1216\u2192            String targetRouteId = this.routeId;\n  1217\u2192            if (targetRouteId == null) {\n  1218\u2192                targetRouteId = ExchangeHelper.getRouteId(exchange);\n  1219\u2192            }\n  1220\u2192\n  1221\u2192            MessageHistory history = factory.newMessageHistory(targetRouteId, definition, exchange);\n  1222\u2192            if (history != null) {\n  1223\u2192                List<MessageHistory> list = exchange.getProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.MESSAGE_HISTORY, List.class);\n  1224\u2192                if (list == null) {\n  1225\u2192                    // use thread-safe list as message history may be accessed concurrently\n  1226\u2192                    list = new CopyOnWriteArrayList<>();\n  1227\u2192                    exchange.setProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.MESSAGE_HISTORY, list);\n  1228\u2192                }\n  1229\u2192                list.add(history);\n  1230\u2192            }\n  1231\u2192            return history;\n  1232\u2192        }\n  1233\u2192\n  1234\u2192        @Override\n  1235\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, MessageHistory history) throws Exception {\n  1236\u2192            if (history != null) {\n  1237\u2192                Long delta = (Long) exchange.removeProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.DEBUGGER_SELF_TIME);\n  1238\u2192                if (delta != null) {\n  1239\u2192                    history.nodeProcessingDone(delta);\n  1240\u2192                } else {\n  1241\u2192                    history.nodeProcessingDone();\n  1242\u2192                }\n  1243\u2192            }\n  1244\u2192        }\n  1245\u2192    }\n  1246\u2192\n  1247\u2192    /**\n  1248\u2192     * Advice that stores the node id and label of the processor that is processing the exchange.\n  1249\u2192     */\n  1250\u2192    public static class NodeHistoryAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<String> {\n  1251\u2192\n  1252\u2192        private final String id;\n  1253\u2192        private final String label;\n  1254\u2192        private final String source;\n  1255\u2192\n  1256\u2192        public NodeHistoryAdvice(NamedNode definition) {\n  1257\u2192            this.id = definition.getId();\n  1258\u2192            this.label = definition.getLabel();\n  1259\u2192            this.source = LoggerHelper.getLineNumberLoggerName(definition);\n  1260\u2192        }\n  1261\u2192\n  1262\u2192        @Override\n  1263\u2192        public String before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n  1264\u2192            exchange.getExchangeExtension().setHistoryNodeId(id);\n  1265\u2192            exchange.getExchangeExtension().setHistoryNodeLabel(label);\n  1266\u2192            exchange.getExchangeExtension().setHistoryNodeSource(source);\n  1267\u2192            return null;\n  1268\u2192        }\n  1269\u2192\n  1270\u2192        @Override\n  1271\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, String data) throws Exception {\n  1272\u2192            exchange.getExchangeExtension().setHistoryNodeId(null);\n  1273\u2192            exchange.getExchangeExtension().setHistoryNodeLabel(null);\n  1274\u2192            exchange.getExchangeExtension().setHistoryNodeSource(null);\n  1275\u2192        }\n  1276\u2192\n  1277\u2192        @Override\n  1278\u2192        public boolean hasState() {\n  1279\u2192            return false;\n  1280\u2192        }\n  1281\u2192    }\n  1282\u2192\n  1283\u2192    /**\n  1284\u2192     * Advice for {@link org.apache.camel.spi.StreamCachingStrategy}\n  1285\u2192     */\n  1286\u2192    public static class StreamCachingAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice, Ordered {\n  1287\u2192\n  1288\u2192        private final StreamCachingStrategy strategy;\n  1289\u2192\n  1290\u2192        public StreamCachingAdvice(StreamCachingStrategy strategy) {\n  1291\u2192            this.strategy = strategy;\n  1292\u2192        }\n  1293\u2192\n  1294\u2192        @Override\n  1295\u2192        public Object before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n  1296\u2192            StreamCachingHelper.convertToStreamCache(strategy, exchange, exchange.getIn());\n  1297\u2192            return null;\n  1298\u2192        }\n  1299\u2192\n  1300\u2192        @Override\n  1301\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, Object data) throws Exception {\n  1302\u2192            // reset cached streams so they can be read again\n  1303\u2192            MessageHelper.resetStreamCache(exchange.getMessage());\n  1304\u2192        }\n  1305\u2192\n  1306\u2192        @Override\n  1307\u2192        public boolean hasState() {\n  1308\u2192            return false;\n  1309\u2192        }\n  1310\u2192\n  1311\u2192        @Override\n  1312\u2192        public int getOrder() {\n  1313\u2192            // we want stream caching first\n  1314\u2192            return Ordered.HIGHEST;\n  1315\u2192        }\n  1316\u2192    }\n  1317\u2192\n  1318\u2192    /**\n  1319\u2192     * Advice for delaying\n  1320\u2192     */\n  1321\u2192    public static class DelayerAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<Object> {\n  1322\u2192\n  1323\u2192        private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DelayerAdvice.class);\n  1324\u2192        private final long delay;\n  1325\u2192\n  1326\u2192        public DelayerAdvice(long delay) {\n  1327\u2192            this.delay = delay;\n  1328\u2192        }\n  1329\u2192\n  1330\u2192        @Override\n  1331\u2192        public Object before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n  1332\u2192            try {\n  1333\u2192                LOG.trace(\"Sleeping for: {} millis\", delay);\n  1334\u2192                Thread.sleep(delay);\n  1335\u2192            } catch (InterruptedException e) {\n  1336\u2192                Thread.currentThread().interrupt();\n  1337\u2192                throw e;\n  1338\u2192            }\n  1339\u2192            return null;\n  1340\u2192        }\n  1341\u2192\n  1342\u2192        @Override\n  1343\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, Object data) throws Exception {\n  1344\u2192            // noop\n  1345\u2192        }\n  1346\u2192\n  1347\u2192        @Override\n  1348\u2192        public boolean hasState() {\n  1349\u2192            return false;\n  1350\u2192        }\n  1351\u2192    }\n  1352\u2192\n  1353\u2192    /**\n  1354\u2192     * Advice for tracing\n  1355\u2192     */\n  1356\u2192    public static class TracingAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<StopWatch> {\n  1357\u2192\n  1358\u2192        private final TraceAdviceEventNotifier notifier;\n  1359\u2192        private final Tracer tracer;\n  1360\u2192        private final NamedNode processorDefinition;\n  1361\u2192        private final NamedRoute routeDefinition;\n  1362\u2192        private final Synchronization tracingAfterRoute;\n  1363\u2192        private final boolean skip;\n  1364\u2192\n  1365\u2192        public TracingAdvice(CamelContext camelContext, Tracer tracer, NamedNode processorDefinition,\n  1366\u2192                             NamedRoute routeDefinition, boolean first) {\n  1367\u2192            this.tracer = tracer;\n  1368\u2192            this.processorDefinition = processorDefinition;\n  1369\u2192            this.routeDefinition = routeDefinition;\n  1370\u2192            this.tracingAfterRoute\n  1371\u2192                    = routeDefinition != null\n  1372\u2192                            ? new TracingAfterRoute(tracer, routeDefinition.getRouteId(), routeDefinition) : null;\n  1373\u2192\n  1374\u2192            boolean rest;\n  1375\u2192            boolean template;\n  1376\u2192            if (routeDefinition != null) {\n  1377\u2192                rest = routeDefinition.isCreatedFromRest();\n  1378\u2192                template = routeDefinition.isCreatedFromTemplate();\n  1379\u2192            } else {\n  1380\u2192                rest = false;\n  1381\u2192                template = false;\n  1382\u2192            }\n  1383\u2192            // optimize whether to skip this route or not\n  1384\u2192            if (rest && !tracer.isTraceRests()) {\n  1385\u2192                this.skip = true;\n  1386\u2192            } else if (template && !tracer.isTraceTemplates()) {\n  1387\u2192                this.skip = true;\n  1388\u2192            } else {\n  1389\u2192                this.skip = false;\n  1390\u2192            }\n  1391\u2192            this.notifier = getOrCreateEventNotifier(camelContext);\n  1392\u2192        }\n  1393\u2192\n  1394\u2192        private TraceAdviceEventNotifier getOrCreateEventNotifier(CamelContext camelContext) {\n  1395\u2192            // use a single instance of this event notifier\n  1396\u2192            for (EventNotifier en : camelContext.getManagementStrategy().getEventNotifiers()) {\n  1397\u2192                if (en instanceof TraceAdviceEventNotifier traceAdviceEventNotifier) {\n  1398\u2192                    return traceAdviceEventNotifier;\n  1399\u2192                }\n  1400\u2192            }\n  1401\u2192            TraceAdviceEventNotifier answer = new TraceAdviceEventNotifier();\n  1402\u2192            camelContext.getManagementStrategy().addEventNotifier(answer);\n  1403\u2192            return answer;\n  1404\u2192        }\n  1405\u2192\n  1406\u2192        @Override\n  1407\u2192        public StopWatch before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n  1408\u2192            if (!skip && tracer.isEnabled()) {\n  1409\u2192\n  1410\u2192                // to capture if the exchange was sent to an endpoint during this event\n  1411\u2192                notifier.before(exchange);\n  1412\u2192\n  1413\u2192                if (tracingAfterRoute != null) {\n  1414\u2192                    // add before route and after route tracing but only once per route, so check if there is already an existing\n  1415\u2192                    boolean contains = exchange.getUnitOfWork().containsSynchronization(tracingAfterRoute);\n  1416\u2192                    if (!contains) {\n  1417\u2192                        tracer.traceBeforeRoute(routeDefinition, exchange);\n  1418\u2192                        exchange.getExchangeExtension().addOnCompletion(tracingAfterRoute);\n  1419\u2192                    }\n  1420\u2192                }\n  1421\u2192                tracer.traceBeforeNode(processorDefinition, exchange);\n  1422\u2192                return new StopWatch();\n  1423\u2192            }\n  1424\u2192            return null;\n  1425\u2192        }\n  1426\u2192\n  1427\u2192        @Override\n  1428\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, StopWatch data) throws Exception {\n  1429\u2192            if (data != null) {\n  1430\u2192                Endpoint endpoint = notifier.after(exchange);\n  1431\u2192                long elapsed = data.taken();\n  1432\u2192                if (endpoint != null) {\n  1433\u2192                    tracer.traceSentNode(processorDefinition, exchange, endpoint, elapsed);\n  1434\u2192                }\n  1435\u2192                tracer.traceAfterNode(processorDefinition, exchange);\n  1436\u2192            }\n  1437\u2192        }\n  1438\u2192\n  1439\u2192        private static final class TracingAfterRoute extends SynchronizationAdapter {\n  1440\u2192\n  1441\u2192            private final Tracer tracer;\n  1442\u2192            private final String routeId;\n  1443\u2192            private final NamedRoute node;\n  1444\u2192\n  1445\u2192            private TracingAfterRoute(Tracer tracer, String routeId, NamedRoute node) {\n  1446\u2192                this.tracer = tracer;\n  1447\u2192                this.routeId = routeId;\n  1448\u2192                this.node = node;\n  1449\u2192            }\n  1450\u2192\n  1451\u2192            @Override\n  1452\u2192            public SynchronizationRouteAware getRouteSynchronization() {\n  1453\u2192                return new SynchronizationRouteAware() {\n  1454\u2192                    @Override\n  1455\u2192                    public void onBeforeRoute(Route route, Exchange exchange) {\n  1456\u2192                        // NO-OP\n  1457\u2192                    }\n  1458\u2192\n  1459\u2192                    @Override\n  1460\u2192                    public void onAfterRoute(Route route, Exchange exchange) {\n  1461\u2192                        if (routeId.equals(route.getId())) {\n  1462\u2192                            tracer.traceAfterRoute(node, exchange);\n  1463\u2192                        }\n  1464\u2192                    }\n  1465\u2192                };\n  1466\u2192            }\n  1467\u2192\n  1468\u2192            @Override\n  1469\u2192            public boolean equals(Object o) {\n  1470\u2192                // only match equals on route id so we can check this from containsSynchronization\n  1471\u2192                // to avoid adding multiple times for the same route id\n  1472\u2192                if (this == o) {\n  1473\u2192                    return true;\n  1474\u2192                }\n  1475\u2192                if (o == null || getClass() != o.getClass()) {\n  1476\u2192                    return false;\n  1477\u2192                }\n  1478\u2192                TracingAfterRoute that = (TracingAfterRoute) o;\n  1479\u2192                return routeId.equals(that.routeId);\n  1480\u2192            }\n  1481\u2192\n  1482\u2192            @Override\n  1483\u2192            public int hashCode() {\n  1484\u2192                return Objects.hash(routeId);\n  1485\u2192            }\n  1486\u2192        }\n  1487\u2192    }\n  1488\u2192\n  1489\u2192    /**\n  1490\u2192     * Wrap an InstrumentationProcessor into a CamelInternalProcessorAdvice\n  1491\u2192     */\n  1492\u2192    public static <T> CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<T> wrap(InstrumentationProcessor<T> instrumentationProcessor) {\n  1493\u2192        if (instrumentationProcessor instanceof CamelInternalProcessorAdvice camelInternalProcessor) {\n  1494\u2192            return camelInternalProcessor;\n  1495\u2192        } else {\n  1496\u2192            return new CamelInternalProcessorAdviceWrapper<>(instrumentationProcessor);\n  1497\u2192        }\n  1498\u2192    }\n  1499\u2192\n  1500\u2192    public static Object unwrap(CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<?> advice) {\n  1501\u2192        if (advice instanceof CamelInternalProcessorAdviceWrapper<?> wrapped) {\n  1502\u2192            return wrapped.unwrap();\n  1503\u2192        } else {\n  1504\u2192            return advice;\n  1505\u2192        }\n  1506\u2192    }\n  1507\u2192\n  1508\u2192    record CamelInternalProcessorAdviceWrapper<T>(\n  1509\u2192            InstrumentationProcessor<T> instrumentationProcessor) implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<T>, Ordered {\n  1510\u2192\n  1511\u2192        InstrumentationProcessor<T> unwrap() {\n  1512\u2192            return instrumentationProcessor;\n  1513\u2192        }\n  1514\u2192\n  1515\u2192        @Override\n  1516\u2192        public int getOrder() {\n  1517\u2192            return instrumentationProcessor.getOrder();\n  1518\u2192        }\n  1519\u2192\n  1520\u2192        @Override\n  1521\u2192        public T before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n  1522\u2192            return instrumentationProcessor.before(exchange);\n  1523\u2192        }\n  1524\u2192\n  1525\u2192        @Override\n  1526\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, T data) throws Exception {\n  1527\u2192            instrumentationProcessor.after(exchange, data);\n  1528\u2192        }\n  1529\u2192    }\n  1530\u2192\n  1531\u2192    /**\n  1532\u2192     * Event notifier for {@link TracingAdvice} and {@link BacklogTracerAdvice} to capture {@link Exchange} sent to\n  1533\u2192     * endpoints during tracing.\n  1534\u2192     */\n  1535\u2192    private static final class TraceAdviceEventNotifier extends SimpleEventNotifierSupport implements NonManagedService {\n  1536\u2192\n  1537\u2192        private final Object dummy = new Object();\n  1538\u2192\n  1539\u2192        private final ConcurrentMap<Exchange, Object> uris = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\n  1540\u2192\n  1541\u2192        public TraceAdviceEventNotifier() {\n  1542\u2192            // only capture sending events\n  1543\u2192            setIgnoreExchangeEvents(false);\n  1544\u2192            setIgnoreExchangeSendingEvents(false);\n  1545\u2192        }\n  1546\u2192\n  1547\u2192        @Override\n  1548\u2192        public void notify(CamelEvent event) throws Exception {\n  1549\u2192            if (event instanceof CamelEvent.ExchangeSendingEvent ess) {\n  1550\u2192                Exchange e = ess.getExchange();\n  1551\u2192                uris.computeIfPresent(e, (key, val) -> ess.getEndpoint());\n  1552\u2192            }\n  1553\u2192        }\n  1554\u2192\n  1555\u2192        public void before(Exchange exchange) {\n  1556\u2192            uris.put(exchange, dummy);\n  1557\u2192        }\n  1558\u2192\n  1559\u2192        public Endpoint after(Exchange exchange) {\n  1560\u2192            Object o = uris.remove(exchange);\n  1561\u2192            if (o == dummy) {\n  1562\u2192                return null;\n  1563\u2192            }\n  1564\u2192            return (Endpoint) o;\n  1565\u2192        }\n  1566\u2192\n  1567\u2192    }\n  1568\u2192}\n  1569\u2192"

This component\n    28\u2192 * does not support the use of consumers.\n    29\u2192 * <p/>\n    30\u2192 * <br/>\n    31\u2192 * Implementors beware that this endpoint creates producers and consumers which do not allow full control of their\n    32\u2192 * lifecycle as {@link org.apache.camel.Service} or {@link org.apache.camel.SuspendableService} would do. If your\n    33\u2192 * producers/consumers need more control over their lifecycle it is advised instead to extend {@link DefaultEndpoint},\n    34\u2192 * {@link DefaultProducer} and {@link DefaultConsumer}.\n    35\u2192 */\n    36\u2192public class ProcessorEndpoint extends DefaultPollingEndpoint {\n    37\u2192    private Processor processor;\n    38\u2192\n    39\u2192    protected ProcessorEndpoint() {\n    40\u2192    }\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192    public ProcessorEndpoint(String endpointUri, CamelContext context, Processor processor) {\n    43\u2192        super(endpointUri, null);\n    44\u2192        this.setCamelContext(context);\n    45\u2192        this.processor = processor;\n    46\u2192    }\n    47\u2192\n    48\u2192    public ProcessorEndpoint(String endpointUri, Component component, Processor processor) {\n    49\u2192        super(endpointUri, component);\n    50\u2192        this.processor = processor;\n    51\u2192    }\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192    protected ProcessorEndpoint(String endpointUri, Component component) {\n    54\u2192        super(endpointUri, component);\n    55\u2192    }\n    56\u2192\n    57\u2192    @Override\n    58\u2192    public Producer createProducer() throws Exception {\n    59\u2192        return new DefaultProducer(this) {\n    60\u2192            public void process(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n    61\u2192                onExchange(exchange);\n    62\u2192            }\n    63\u2192        };\n    64\u2192    }\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192    @Override\n    67\u2192    public PollingConsumer createPollingConsumer() throws Exception {\n    68\u2192        PollingConsumer answer = new ProcessorPollingConsumer(this, getProcessor());\n    69\u2192        configurePollingConsumer(answer);\n    70\u2192        return answer;\n    71\u2192    }\n    72\u2192\n    73\u2192    public Processor getProcessor() throws Exception {\n    74\u2192        if (processor == null) {\n    75\u2192            processor = createProcessor();\n    76\u2192        }\n    77\u2192        return processor;\n    78\u2192    }\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192    public void setProcessor(Processor processor) {\n    81\u2192        this.processor = processor;\n    82\u2192    }\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192    protected Processor createProcessor() throws Exception {\n    85\u2192        return new Processor() {\n    86\u2192            public void process(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n    87\u2192                onExchange(exchange);\n    88\u2192            }\n    89\u2192        };\n    90\u2192    }\n    91\u2192\n    92\u2192    protected void onExchange(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n    93\u2192        getProcessor().process(exchange);\n    94\u2192    }\n    95\u2192\n    96\u2192}\n    97\u2192"

"     1\u2192/*\n     2\u2192 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more\n     3\u2192 * contributor license agreements. in writing, software\n    12\u2192 * distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n    13\u2192 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n    14\u2192 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n    15\u2192 * limitations under the License.\n    16\u2192 */\n    17\u2192package org.apache.camel.processor;\n    18\u2192\n    19\u2192import org.apache.camel.Exchange;\n    20\u2192import org.slf4j.Logger;\n    21\u2192\n    22\u2192/**\n    23\u2192 * Helper for processing {@link org.apache.camel.Exchange} in a\n    24\u2192 * <a href=\"http://camel.apache.org/pipes-and-filters.html\">pipeline</a>.\n    25\u2192 */\n    26\u2192public final class PipelineHelper {\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192    private PipelineHelper() {\n    29\u2192    }\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192    /**\n    32\u2192     * Should we continue processing the exchange?\n    33\u2192     *\n    34\u2192     * @param  exchange the next exchange\n    35\u2192     * @param  message  a message to use when logging that we should not continue processing\n    36\u2192     * @param  log      a logger\n    37\u2192     * @return          <tt>true</tt> to continue processing, <tt>false</tt> to break out, for example if an exception\n    38\u2192     *                  occurred.\n    39\u2192     */\n    40\u2192    public static boolean continueProcessing(Exchange exchange, String message, Logger log) {\n    41\u2192        boolean stop = exchange.isFailed() || exchange.isRollbackOnly() || exchange.isRollbackOnlyLast()\n    42\u2192                || exchange.getExchangeExtension().isErrorHandlerHandledSet()\n    43\u2192                        && exchange.getExchangeExtension().isErrorHandlerHandled();\n    44\u2192        if (stop) {\n    45\u2192            // The errorErrorHandler is only set if satisfactory handling was done\n    46\u2192            // by the error handler. It's still an exception, the exchange still failed.\n    47\u2192            if (log.isDebugEnabled()) {\n    48\u2192                StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(256);\n    49\u2192                sb.append(\"Message exchange has failed: \").append(message).append(\" for exchange: \").append(exchange);\n    50\u2192                if (exchange.isRollbackOnly() || exchange.isRollbackOnlyLast()) {\n    51\u2192                    sb.append(\" Marked as rollback only.\");\n    52\u2192                }\n    53\u2192                if (exchange.getException() != null) {\n    54\u2192                    sb.append(\" Exception: \").append(exchange.getException());\n    55\u2192                }\n    56\u2192                if (exchange.getExchangeExtension().isErrorHandlerHandledSet()\n    57\u2192                        && exchange.getExchangeExtension().isErrorHandlerHandled()) {\n    58\u2192                    sb.append(\" Handled by the error handler.\");\n    59\u2192                }\n    60\u2192                log.debug(sb.toString());\n    61\u2192            }\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192            return false;\n    64\u2192        }\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192        // check for stop\n    67\u2192        if (exchange.isRouteStop()) {\n    68\u2192            if (log.isDebugEnabled()) {\n    69\u2192                log.debug(\"ExchangeId: {} is marked to stop routing: {}\", exchange.getExchangeId(), exchange);\n    70\u2192            }\n    71\u2192            return false;\n    72\u2192        }\n    73\u2192\n    74\u2192        return true;\n    75\u2192    }\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192}\n    78\u2192"

If you are implementing a\n    38\u2192 * EIP pattern please use this as the delegate.\n    39\u2192 *\n    40\u2192 * @see DelegateSyncProcessor\n    41\u2192 * @see DelegateProcessor\n    42\u2192 */\n    43\u2192public class DelegateAsyncProcessor extends AsyncProcessorSupport\n    44\u2192        implements DelegateProcessor, Navigate<Processor>, DisabledAware {\n    45\u2192    protected AsyncProcessor processor;\n    46\u2192    private boolean disabled;\n    47\u2192\n    48\u2192    public DelegateAsyncProcessor() {\n    49\u2192    }\n    50\u2192\n    51\u2192    public DelegateAsyncProcessor(AsyncProcessor processor) {\n    52\u2192        if (processor == this) {\n    53\u2192            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Recursive DelegateAsyncProcessor!\");\n    54\u2192        }\n    55\u2192        this.processor = processor;\n    56\u2192    }\n    57\u2192\n    58\u2192    public DelegateAsyncProcessor(Processor processor) {\n    59\u2192        this(AsyncProcessorConverterHelper.convert(processor));\n    60\u2192    }\n    61\u2192\n    62\u2192    @Override\n    63\u2192    public String toString() {\n    64\u2192        return \"DelegateAsync[\" + processor + \"]\";\n    65\u2192    }\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192    @Override\n    68\u2192    public AsyncProcessor getProcessor() {\n    69\u2192        return processor;\n    70\u2192    }\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192    public void setProcessor(AsyncProcessor processor) {\n    73\u2192        this.processor = processor;\n    74\u2192    }\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192    public void setProcessor(Processor processor) {\n    77\u2192        this.processor = AsyncProcessorConverterHelper.convert(processor);\n    78\u2192    }\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192    @Override\n    81\u2192    public boolean isDisabled() {\n    82\u2192        return disabled;\n    83\u2192    }\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192    @Override\n    86\u2192    public void setDisabled(boolean disabled) {\n    87\u2192        this.disabled = disabled;\n    88\u2192    }\n    89\u2192\n    90\u2192    @Override\n    91\u2192    protected void doBuild() throws Exception {\n    92\u2192        ServiceHelper.buildService(processor);\n    93\u2192    }\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192    @Override\n    96\u2192    protected void doInit() throws Exception {\n    97\u2192        ServiceHelper.initService(processor);\n    98\u2192    }\n    99\u2192\n   100\u2192    @Override\n   101\u2192    protected void doStart() throws Exception {\n   102\u2192        ServiceHelper.startService(processor);\n   103\u2192    }\n   104\u2192\n   105\u2192    @Override\n   106\u2192    protected void doStop() throws Exception {\n   107\u2192        ServiceHelper.stopService(processor);\n   108\u2192    }\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192    @Override\n   111\u2192    protected void doShutdown() throws Exception {\n   112\u2192        ServiceHelper.stopAndShutdownServices(processor);\n   113\u2192    }\n   114\u2192\n   115\u2192    @Override\n   116\u2192    public boolean process(final Exchange exchange, final AsyncCallback callback) {\n   117\u2192        return processor.process(exchange, callback);\n   118\u2192    }\n   119\u2192\n   120\u2192    @Override\n   121\u2192    public boolean hasNext() {\n   122\u2192        return processor != null;\n   123\u2192    }\n   124\u2192\n   125\u2192    @Override\n   126\u2192    public List<Processor> next() {\n   127\u2192        if (!hasNext()) {\n   128\u2192            return null;\n   129\u2192        }\n   130\u2192        List<Processor> answer = new ArrayList<>(1);\n   131\u2192        answer.add(processor);\n   132\u2192        return answer;\n   133\u2192    }\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192}\n   136\u2192"

java.util.List;\n    24\u2192import java.util.Map;\n    25\u2192import java.util.StringTokenizer;\n    26\u2192\n    27\u2192import org.apache.camel.CamelContext;\n    28\u2192import org.apache.camel.Endpoint;\n    29\u2192import org.apache.camel.EndpointConsumerResolver;\n    30\u2192import org.apache.camel.ErrorHandlerFactory;\n    31\u2192import org.apache.camel.Exchange;\n    32\u2192import org.apache.camel.FailedToCreateRouteException;\n    33\u2192import org.apache.camel.Processor;\n    34\u2192import org.apache.camel.Route;\n    35\u2192import org.apache.camel.RouteAware;\n    36\u2192import org.apache.camel.RuntimeCamelException;\n    37\u2192import org.apache.camel.Service;\n    38\u2192import org.apache.camel.ServiceStatus;\n    39\u2192import org.apache.camel.ShutdownRoute;\n    40\u2192import org.apache.camel.ShutdownRunningTask;\n    41\u2192import org.apache.camel.StartupStep;\n    42\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ModelCamelContext;\n    43\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ProcessorDefinition;\n    44\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ProcessorDefinitionHelper;\n    45\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.PropertyDefinition;\n    46\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.RouteDefinition;\n    47\u2192import org.apache.camel.processor.ContractAdvice;\n    48\u2192import org.apache.camel.processor.RoutePipeline;\n    49\u2192import org.apache.camel.reifier.rest.RestBindingReifier;\n    50\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.BeanRepository;\n    51\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.CamelInternalProcessorAdvice;\n    52\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.Contract;\n    53\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.ErrorHandlerAware;\n    54\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.InternalProcessor;\n    55\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.LifecycleStrategy;\n    56\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.ManagementInterceptStrategy;\n    57\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.NodeIdFactory;\n    58\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.RoutePolicy;\n    59\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.RoutePolicyFactory;\n    60\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.ExchangeHelper;\n    61\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.LoggerHelper;\n    62\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.PluginHelper;\n    63\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.service.ServiceSupport;\n    64\u2192import org.apache.camel.util.IOHelper;\n    65\u2192import org.slf4j.Logger;\n    66\u2192import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\n    67\u2192\n    68\u2192public class RouteReifier extends ProcessorReifier<RouteDefinition> {\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192    private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(RouteReifier.class);\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192    private static final String[] RESERVED_PROPERTIES = new String[] {\n    73\u2192            Route.ID_PROPERTY, Route.CUSTOM_ID_PROPERTY, Route.PARENT_PROPERTY,\n    74\u2192            Route.DESCRIPTION_PROPERTY, Route.NOTE_PROPERTY,\n    75\u2192            Route.GROUP_PROPERTY, Route.NODE_PREFIX_ID_PROPERTY,\n    76\u2192            Route.REST_PROPERTY, Route.CONFIGURATION_ID_PROPERTY };\n    77\u2192\n    78\u2192    public RouteReifier(CamelContext camelContext, ProcessorDefinition<?> definition) {\n    79\u2192        super(camelContext, (RouteDefinition) definition);\n    80\u2192    }\n    81\u2192\n    82\u2192    @Override\n    83\u2192    public Processor createProcessor() throws Exception {\n    84\u2192        throw new UnsupportedOperationException(\"Not implemented for RouteDefinition\");\n    85\u2192    }\n    86\u2192\n    87\u2192    public Route createRoute() {\n    88\u2192        try {\n    89\u2192            return doCreateRoute();\n    90\u2192        } catch (FailedToCreateRouteException e) {\n    91\u2192            throw e;\n    92\u2192        } catch (Exception e) {\n    93\u2192            // location on route is stored on input\n    94\u2192            ProcessorDefinitionHelper.prepareSourceLocation(definition.getResource(), definition.getInput());\n    95\u2192            String source = LoggerHelper.getSourceLocationOnly(definition.getInput());\n    96\u2192            throw new FailedToCreateRouteException(definition.getRouteId(), source, definition.toString(), e);\n    97\u2192        }\n    98\u2192    }\n    99\u2192\n   100\u2192    // Implementation methods\n   101\u2192    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   102\u2192    protected Route doCreateRoute() throws Exception {\n   103\u2192        // resolve endpoint\n   104\u2192        Endpoint endpoint = definition.getInput().getEndpoint();\n   105\u2192        if (endpoint == null) {\n   106\u2192            EndpointConsumerResolver def = definition.getInput().getEndpointConsumerBuilder();\n   107\u2192            if (def != null) {\n   108\u2192                endpoint = def.resolve(camelContext);\n   109\u2192            } else {\n   110\u2192                endpoint = resolveEndpoint(definition.getInput().getEndpointUri());\n   111\u2192            }\n   112\u2192        }\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192        // create route\n   115\u2192        String id = definition.idOrCreate(camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getContextPlugin(NodeIdFactory.class));\n   116\u2192        String desc = definition.getDescriptionText();\n   117\u2192        String note = definition.getNote();\n   118\u2192\n   119\u2192        Route route = PluginHelper.getRouteFactory(camelContext).createRoute(camelContext, definition, id,\n   120\u2192                desc, note, endpoint, definition.getResource());\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192        // configure error handler\n   123\u2192        route.setErrorHandlerFactory(definition.getErrorHandlerFactory());\n   124\u2192\n   125\u2192        // configure variable\n   126\u2192        String variable = parseString(definition.getInput().getVariableReceive());\n   127\u2192        if (variable != null) {\n   128\u2192            // when using variable we need to turn on original message\n   129\u2192            route.setAllowUseOriginalMessage(true);\n   130\u2192        }\n   131\u2192\n   132\u2192        // configure tracing\n   133\u2192        if (definition.getTrace() != null) {\n   134\u2192            Boolean isTrace = parseBoolean(definition.getTrace());\n   135\u2192            if (isTrace != null) {\n   136\u2192                route.setTracing(isTrace);\n   137\u2192                if (isTrace) {\n   138\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"Tracing is enabled on route: {}\", definition.getId());\n   139\u2192                    // tracing is added in the DefaultChannel so we can enable\n   140\u2192                    // it on the fly\n   141\u2192                }\n   142\u2192            }\n   143\u2192        }\n   144\u2192\n   145\u2192        // configure message history\n   146\u2192        if (definition.getMessageHistory() != null) {\n   147\u2192            Boolean isMessageHistory = parseBoolean(definition.getMessageHistory());\n   148\u2192            if (isMessageHistory != null) {\n   149\u2192                route.setMessageHistory(isMessageHistory);\n   150\u2192                if (isMessageHistory) {\n   151\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"Message history is enabled on route: {}\", definition.getId());\n   152\u2192                }\n   153\u2192            }\n   154\u2192        }\n   155\u2192\n   156\u2192        // configure Log EIP mask\n   157\u2192        if (definition.getLogMask() != null) {\n   158\u2192            Boolean isLogMask = parseBoolean(definition.getLogMask());\n   159\u2192            if (isLogMask != null) {\n   160\u2192                route.setLogMask(isLogMask);\n   161\u2192                if (isLogMask) {\n   162\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"Security mask for Logging is enabled on route: {}\", definition.getId());\n   163\u2192                }\n   164\u2192            }\n   165\u2192        }\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192        // configure stream caching\n   168\u2192        if (definition.getStreamCache() != null) {\n   169\u2192            Boolean isStreamCache = parseBoolean(definition.getStreamCache());\n   170\u2192            if (isStreamCache != null) {\n   171\u2192                route.setStreamCaching(isStreamCache);\n   172\u2192                if (isStreamCache) {\n   173\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"StreamCaching is enabled on route: {}\", definition.getId());\n   174\u2192                }\n   175\u2192            }\n   176\u2192        }\n   177\u2192\n   178\u2192        // configure delayer\n   179\u2192        if (definition.getDelayer() != null) {\n   180\u2192            Long delayer = parseDuration(definition.getDelayer());\n   181\u2192            if (delayer != null) {\n   182\u2192                route.setDelayer(delayer);\n   183\u2192                if (delayer > 0) {\n   184\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"Delayer is enabled with: {} ms. on route: {}\", delayer, definition.getId());\n   185\u2192                } else {\n   186\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"Delayer is disabled on route: {}\", definition.getId());\n   187\u2192                }\n   188\u2192            }\n   189\u2192        }\n   190\u2192\n   191\u2192        // configure auto startup\n   192\u2192        Boolean isAutoStartup = parseBoolean(definition.getAutoStartup());\n   193\u2192\n   194\u2192        // configure startup order\n   195\u2192        Integer startupOrder = definition.getStartupOrder();\n   196\u2192\n   197\u2192        // configure shutdown\n   198\u2192        if (definition.getShutdownRoute() != null) {\n   199\u2192            LOG.debug(\"Using ShutdownRoute {} on route: {}\", definition.getShutdownRoute(), definition.getId());\n   200\u2192            route.setShutdownRoute(parse(ShutdownRoute.class, definition.getShutdownRoute()));\n   201\u2192        }\n   202\u2192        if (definition.getShutdownRunningTask() != null) {\n   203\u2192            LOG.debug(\"Using ShutdownRunningTask {} on route: {}\", definition.getShutdownRunningTask(), definition.getId());\n   204\u2192            route.setShutdownRunningTask(parse(ShutdownRunningTask.class, definition.getShutdownRunningTask()));\n   205\u2192        }\n   206\u2192\n   207\u2192        // should inherit the intercept strategies we have defined\n   208\u2192        route.getInterceptStrategies().addAll(definition.getInterceptStrategies());\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192        // notify route context created\n   211\u2192        for (LifecycleStrategy strategy : camelContext.getLifecycleStrategies()) {\n   212\u2192            strategy.onRouteContextCreate(route);\n   213\u2192        }\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192        // validate route has output processors\n   216\u2192        if (!hasOutputs(definition.getOutputs(), true)) {\n   217\u2192            String at = definition.getInput().toString();\n   218\u2192            Exception cause = new IllegalArgumentException(\n   219\u2192                    \"Route \" + definition.getId() + \" has no output processors.\"\n   220\u2192                                                           + \" You need to add outputs to the route such as to(\\\"log:foo\\\").\");\n   221\u2192            // location on route is stored on input\n   222\u2192            ProcessorDefinitionHelper.prepareSourceLocation(definition.getResource(), definition.getInput());\n   223\u2192            String source = LoggerHelper.getSourceLocationOnly(definition.getInput());\n   224\u2192            throw new FailedToCreateRouteException(\n   225\u2192                    definition.getRouteId(), source, definition.toString(), at, cause);\n   226\u2192        }\n   227\u2192\n   228\u2192        List<ProcessorDefinition<?>> list = new ArrayList<>(definition.getOutputs());\n   229\u2192        for (ProcessorDefinition<?> output : list) {\n   230\u2192            try {\n   231\u2192                ProcessorReifier<?> reifier = ProcessorReifier.reifier(route, output);\n   232\u2192\n   233\u2192                // ensure node has id assigned\n   234\u2192                String outputId\n   235\u2192                        = output.idOrCreate(camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getContextPlugin(NodeIdFactory.class));\n   236\u2192                String eip = reifier.getClass().getSimpleName().replace(\"Reifier\", \"\");\n   237\u2192                StartupStep step = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder()\n   238\u2192                        .beginStep(ProcessorReifier.class, outputId, \"Create \" + eip + \" Processor\");\n   239\u2192\n   240\u2192                reifier.addRoutes();\n   241\u2192\n   242\u2192                camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder().endStep(step);\n   243\u2192            } catch (Exception e) {\n   244\u2192                // location on route is stored on input\n   245\u2192                String source = LoggerHelper\n   246\u2192                        .getLineNumberLoggerName(definition.getInput() != null ? definition.getInput().getLocation() : null);\n   247\u2192                throw new FailedToCreateRouteException(\n   248\u2192                        definition.getRouteId(), source, definition.toString(), output.toString(), e);\n   249\u2192            }\n   250\u2192        }\n   251\u2192\n   252\u2192        // now lets turn all the event driven consumer processors into a single route\n   253\u2192        List<Processor> eventDrivenProcessors = route.getEventDrivenProcessors();\n   254\u2192        if (eventDrivenProcessors.isEmpty()) {\n   255\u2192            return null;\n   256\u2192        }\n   257\u2192\n   258\u2192        // Set route properties\n   259\u2192        Map<String, Object> routeProperties = computeRouteProperties();\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192        // always use a pipeline even if there are only 1 processor as the pipeline\n   262\u2192        // handles preparing the response from the exchange in regard to IN vs OUT messages etc\n   263\u2192        RoutePipeline target = new RoutePipeline(camelContext, eventDrivenProcessors);\n   264\u2192        target.setRouteId(id);\n   265\u2192\n   266\u2192        // and wrap it in a unit of work so the UoW is on the top, so the entire route will be in the same UoW\n   267\u2192        InternalProcessor internal = PluginHelper.getInternalProcessorFactory(camelContext)\n   268\u2192                .addUnitOfWorkProcessorAdvice(camelContext, target, route);\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192        // configure route policy\n   271\u2192        if (definition.getRoutePolicies() != null && !definition.getRoutePolicies().isEmpty()) {\n   272\u2192            for (RoutePolicy policy : definition.getRoutePolicies()) {\n   273\u2192                LOG.debug(\"RoutePolicy is enabled: {} on route: {}\", policy, definition.getId());\n   274\u2192                route.getRoutePolicyList().add(policy);\n   275\u2192            }\n   276\u2192        }\n   277\u2192        if (definition.getRoutePolicyRef() != null) {\n   278\u2192            StringTokenizer policyTokens = new StringTokenizer(definition.getRoutePolicyRef(), \",\");\n   279\u2192            while (policyTokens.hasMoreTokens()) {\n   280\u2192                String ref = policyTokens.nextToken().trim();\n   281\u2192                RoutePolicy policy = mandatoryLookup(ref, RoutePolicy.class);\n   282\u2192                LOG.debug(\"RoutePolicy is enabled: {} on route: {}\", policy, definition.getId());\n   283\u2192                route.getRoutePolicyList().add(policy);\n   284\u2192            }\n   285\u2192        }\n   286\u2192        if (camelContext.getRoutePolicyFactories() != null) {\n   287\u2192            for (RoutePolicyFactory factory : camelContext.getRoutePolicyFactories()) {\n   288\u2192                RoutePolicy policy = factory.createRoutePolicy(camelContext, definition.getId(), definition);\n   289\u2192                if (policy != null) {\n   290\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"RoutePolicy is enabled: {} on route: {}\", policy, definition.getId());\n   291\u2192                    route.getRoutePolicyList().add(policy);\n   292\u2192                }\n   293\u2192            }\n   294\u2192        }\n   295\u2192        // and then optionally add route policy processor if a custom policy is set\n   296\u2192        List<RoutePolicy> routePolicyList = route.getRoutePolicyList();\n   297\u2192        if (routePolicyList != null && !routePolicyList.isEmpty()) {\n   298\u2192            for (RoutePolicy policy : routePolicyList) {\n   299\u2192                // add policy as service if we have not already done that (eg possible if two routes have the same service)\n   300\u2192                // this ensures Camel can control the lifecycle of the policy\n   301\u2192                if (!camelContext.hasService(policy)) {\n   302\u2192                    try {\n   303\u2192                        // inject route\n   304\u2192                        if (policy instanceof RouteAware ra) {\n   305\u2192                            ra.setRoute(route);\n   306\u2192                        }\n   307\u2192                        camelContext.addService(policy);\n   308\u2192                    } catch (Exception e) {\n   309\u2192                        throw RuntimeCamelException.wrapRuntimeCamelException(e);\n   310\u2192                    }\n   311\u2192                }\n   312\u2192            }\n   313\u2192\n   314\u2192            internal.addRoutePolicyAdvice(routePolicyList);\n   315\u2192        }\n   316\u2192\n   317\u2192        // wrap in route inflight processor to track number of inflight exchanges for the route\n   318\u2192        internal.addRouteInflightRepositoryAdvice(camelContext.getInflightRepository(), route.getRouteId());\n   319\u2192\n   320\u2192        // wrap in JMX instrumentation processor that is used for performance stats\n   321\u2192        ManagementInterceptStrategy managementInterceptStrategy = route.getManagementInterceptStrategy();\n   322\u2192        if (managementInterceptStrategy != null) {\n   323\u2192            internal.addManagementInterceptStrategy(managementInterceptStrategy.createProcessor(\"route\"));\n   324\u2192        }\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192        // wrap in route lifecycle\n   327\u2192        internal.addRouteLifecycleAdvice(camelContext, route, definition);\n   328\u2192\n   329\u2192        // add advices\n   330\u2192        if (definition.getRestBindingDefinition() != null) {\n   331\u2192            try {\n   332\u2192                // when disabling bean or processor we should also disable rest-dsl binding advice\n   333\u2192                boolean disabled\n   334\u2192                        = \"true\".equalsIgnoreCase(route.getCamelContext().getGlobalOption(DISABLE_BEAN_OR_PROCESS_PROCESSORS));\n   335\u2192                if (!disabled) {\n   336\u2192                    internal.addAdvice(\n   337\u2192                            new RestBindingReifier(route, definition.getRestBindingDefinition()).createRestBindingAdvice());\n   338\u2192                }\n   339\u2192            } catch (Exception e) {\n   340\u2192                throw RuntimeCamelException.wrapRuntimeCamelException(e);\n   341\u2192            }\n   342\u2192        }\n   343\u2192\n   344\u2192        // wrap in contract\n   345\u2192        if (definition.getInputType() != null || definition.getOutputType() != null) {\n   346\u2192            Contract contract = new Contract();\n   347\u2192            if (definition.getInputType() != null) {\n   348\u2192                contract.setInputType(parseString(definition.getInputType().getUrn()));\n   349\u2192                contract.setValidateInput(parseBoolean(definition.getInputType().getValidate(), false));\n   350\u2192            }\n   351\u2192            if (definition.getOutputType() != null) {\n   352\u2192                contract.setOutputType(parseString(definition.getOutputType().getUrn()));\n   353\u2192                contract.setValidateOutput(parseBoolean(definition.getOutputType().getValidate(), false));\n   354\u2192            }\n   355\u2192            internal.addAdvice(new ContractAdvice(contract));\n   356\u2192            // make sure to enable data type as its in use when using\n   357\u2192            // input/output types on routes\n   358\u2192            camelContext.setUseDataType(true);\n   359\u2192        }\n   360\u2192\n   361\u2192        // wrap with variable\n   362\u2192        if (variable != null) {\n   363\u2192            internal.addAdvice(new VariableAdvice(variable));\n   364\u2192        }\n   365\u2192\n   366\u2192        // and create the route that wraps all of this\n   367\u2192        route.setProcessor(internal);\n   368\u2192        route.getProperties().putAll(routeProperties);\n   369\u2192        route.setStartupOrder(startupOrder);\n   370\u2192        if (isAutoStartup != null) {\n   371\u2192            LOG.debug(\"Using AutoStartup {} on route: {}\", isAutoStartup, definition.getId());\n   372\u2192            route.setAutoStartup(isAutoStartup);\n   373\u2192        }\n   374\u2192\n   375\u2192        // after the route is created then set the route on the policy processor(s) so we get hold of it\n   376\u2192        internal.setRouteOnAdvices(route);\n   377\u2192\n   378\u2192        // invoke init on route policy\n   379\u2192        if (routePolicyList != null && !routePolicyList.isEmpty()) {\n   380\u2192            for (RoutePolicy policy : routePolicyList) {\n   381\u2192                policy.onInit(route);\n   382\u2192            }\n   383\u2192        }\n   384\u2192\n   385\u2192        // inject the route error handler for processors that are error handler aware\n   386\u2192        // this needs to be done here at the end because the route may be transactional and have a transaction error handler\n   387\u2192        // automatic be configured which some EIPs like Multicast/RecipientList needs to be using for special fine-grained error handling\n   388\u2192        ErrorHandlerFactory builder = route.getErrorHandlerFactory();\n   389\u2192        Processor errorHandler = ((ModelCamelContext) camelContext).getModelReifierFactory().createErrorHandler(route,\n   390\u2192                builder, null);\n   391\u2192        prepareErrorHandlerAware(route, errorHandler);\n   392\u2192\n   393\u2192        // only during startup phase\n   394\u2192        if (camelContext.getStatus().ordinal() < ServiceStatus.Started.ordinal()) {\n   395\u2192            // okay route has been created from the model, then the model is no longer needed, and we can de-reference\n   396\u2192            camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().addBootstrap(route::clearRouteModel);\n   397\u2192        }\n   398\u2192\n   399\u2192        if (definition.getRouteTemplateContext() != null) {\n   400\u2192            // make route stop beans from the local repository (route templates / kamelets)\n   401\u2192            Service wrapper = new ServiceSupport() {\n   402\u2192                @Override\n   403\u2192                protected void doStop() throws Exception {\n   404\u2192                    close();\n   405\u2192                }\n   406\u2192\n   407\u2192                @Override\n   408\u2192                public void close() throws IOException {\n   409\u2192                    BeanRepository repo = definition.getRouteTemplateContext().getLocalBeanRepository();\n   410\u2192                    if (repo instanceof Closeable obj) {\n   411\u2192                        IOHelper.close(obj);\n   412\u2192                    }\n   413\u2192                    super.close();\n   414\u2192                }\n   415\u2192            };\n   416\u2192            route.addService(wrapper, true);\n   417\u2192        }\n   418\u2192\n   419\u2192        return route;\n   420\u2192    }\n   421\u2192\n   422\u2192    private void prepareErrorHandlerAware(Route route, Processor errorHandler) {\n   423\u2192        List<Processor> processors = route.filter(\"*\");\n   424\u2192        for (Processor p : processors) {\n   425\u2192            if (p instanceof ErrorHandlerAware errorHandlerAware) {\n   426\u2192                errorHandlerAware.setErrorHandler(errorHandler);\n   427\u2192            }\n   428\u2192        }\n   429\u2192    }\n   430\u2192\n   431\u2192    protected Map<String, Object> computeRouteProperties() {\n   432\u2192        Map<String, Object> routeProperties = new HashMap<>();\n   433\u2192        routeProperties.put(Route.ID_PROPERTY, definition.getId());\n   434\u2192        routeProperties.put(Route.CUSTOM_ID_PROPERTY, Boolean.toString(definition.hasCustomIdAssigned()));\n   435\u2192        routeProperties.put(Route.PARENT_PROPERTY, Integer.toHexString(definition.hashCode()));\n   436\u2192        routeProperties.put(Route.DESCRIPTION_PROPERTY, definition.getDescriptionText());\n   437\u2192        routeProperties.put(Route.NOTE_PROPERTY, definition.getNote());\n   438\u2192        if (definition.getGroup() != null) {\n   439\u2192            routeProperties.put(Route.GROUP_PROPERTY, definition.getGroup());\n   440\u2192        }\n   441\u2192        if (definition.getNodePrefixId() != null) {\n   442\u2192            routeProperties.put(Route.NODE_PREFIX_ID_PROPERTY, definition.getNodePrefixId());\n   443\u2192        }\n   444\u2192        String rest = Boolean.toString(definition.isRest() != null && definition.isRest());\n   445\u2192        routeProperties.put(Route.REST_PROPERTY, rest);\n   446\u2192        String template = Boolean.toString(definition.isTemplate() != null && definition.isTemplate());\n   447\u2192        routeProperties.put(Route.TEMPLATE_PROPERTY, template);\n   448\u2192        String kamelet = Boolean.toString(definition.isKamelet() != null && definition.isKamelet());\n   449\u2192        routeProperties.put(Route.KAMELET_PROPERTY, kamelet);\n   450\u2192        if (definition.getAppliedRouteConfigurationIds() != null) {\n   451\u2192            routeProperties.put(Route.CONFIGURATION_ID_PROPERTY,\n   452\u2192                    String.join(\",\", definition.getAppliedRouteConfigurationIds()));\n   453\u2192        }\n   454\u2192\n   455\u2192        List<PropertyDefinition> properties = definition.getRouteProperties();\n   456\u2192        if (properties != null) {\n   457\u2192            for (PropertyDefinition prop : properties) {\n   458\u2192                try {\n   459\u2192                    final String key = parseString(prop.getKey());\n   460\u2192                    final String val = parseString(prop.getValue());\n   461\u2192                    for (String property : RESERVED_PROPERTIES) {\n   462\u2192                        if (property.equalsIgnoreCase(key)) {\n   463\u2192                            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\n   464\u2192                                    \"Cannot set route property \" + property + \" as it is a reserved property\");\n   465\u2192                        }\n   466\u2192                    }\n   467\u2192                    routeProperties.put(key, val);\n   468\u2192                } catch (Exception e) {\n   469\u2192                    throw RuntimeCamelException.wrapRuntimeCamelException(e);\n   470\u2192                }\n   471\u2192            }\n   472\u2192        }\n   473\u2192        return routeProperties;\n   474\u2192    }\n   475\u2192\n   476\u2192    /**\n   477\u2192     * Advice for moving message body into a variable when using variableReceive mode\n   478\u2192     */\n   479\u2192    private static class VariableAdvice implements CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<Object> {\n   480\u2192\n   481\u2192        private final String name;\n   482\u2192\n   483\u2192        public VariableAdvice(String name) {\n   484\u2192            this.name = name;\n   485\u2192        }\n   486\u2192\n   487\u2192        @Override\n   488\u2192        public Object before(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {\n   489\u2192            // move body to variable\n   490\u2192            ExchangeHelper.setVariableFromMessageBodyAndHeaders(exchange, name, exchange.getMessage());\n   491\u2192            // remember body\n   492\u2192            Object body = exchange.getMessage().getBody();\n   493\u2192            exchange.getMessage().setBody(null);\n   494\u2192            return body;\n   495\u2192        }\n   496\u2192\n   497\u2192        @Override\n   498\u2192        public void after(Exchange exchange, Object data) throws Exception {\n   499\u2192            // restore body if body has not been changed\n   500\u2192            if (data != null && exchange.getMessage().getBody() == null) {\n   501\u2192                exchange.getMessage().setBody(data);\n   502\u2192            }\n   503\u2192        }\n   504\u2192\n   505\u2192    }\n   506\u2192\n   507\u2192}\n   508\u2192"

18\u2192\n    19\u2192import java.time.Duration;\n    20\u2192import java.util.LinkedHashMap;\n    21\u2192import java.util.LinkedHashSet;\n    22\u2192import java.util.Map;\n    23\u2192import java.util.Set;\n    24\u2192\n    25\u2192import org.apache.camel.CamelContext;\n    26\u2192import org.apache.camel.Endpoint;\n    27\u2192import org.apache.camel.Expression;\n    28\u2192import org.apache.camel.NoSuchBeanException;\n    29\u2192import org.apache.camel.NoSuchEndpointException;\n    30\u2192import org.apache.camel.Predicate;\n    31\u2192import org.apache.camel.Route;\n    32\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ExpressionSubElementDefinition;\n    33\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.language.ExpressionDefinition;\n    34\u2192import org.apache.camel.reifier.language.ExpressionReifier;\n    35\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.BeanRepository;\n    36\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.CamelContextHelper;\n    37\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.EndpointHelper;\n    38\u2192import org.apache.camel.util.ObjectHelper;\n    39\u2192\n    40\u2192public abstract class AbstractReifier implements BeanRepository {\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192    protected final org.apache.camel.Route route;\n    43\u2192    protected final CamelContext camelContext;\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192    public AbstractReifier(Route route) {\n    46\u2192        this.route = ObjectHelper.notNull(route, \"Route\");\n    47\u2192        this.camelContext = route.getCamelContext();\n    48\u2192    }\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192    public AbstractReifier(CamelContext camelContext) {\n    51\u2192        this.route = null;\n    52\u2192        this.camelContext = ObjectHelper.notNull(camelContext, \"CamelContext\");\n    53\u2192    }\n    54\u2192\n    55\u2192    protected CamelContext getCamelContext() {\n    56\u2192        return camelContext;\n    57\u2192    }\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192    protected Map<String, String> parseMap(Map<String, String> map) {\n    60\u2192        if (map == null) {\n    61\u2192            return null;\n    62\u2192        }\n    63\u2192        Map<String, String> answer = new LinkedHashMap<>();\n    64\u2192        for (var e : map.entrySet()) {\n    65\u2192            String newKey = parseString(e.getKey());\n    66\u2192            String newValue = parseString(e.getValue());\n    67\u2192            answer.put(newKey, newValue);\n    68\u2192        }\n    69\u2192        return answer.isEmpty() ? map : answer;\n    70\u2192    }\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192    protected Set<String> parseSet(Set<String> set) {\n    73\u2192        if (set == null) {\n    74\u2192            return null;\n    75\u2192        }\n    76\u2192        Set<String> answer = new LinkedHashSet<>();\n    77\u2192        for (var e : set) {\n    78\u2192            String value = parseString(e);\n    79\u2192            answer.add(value);\n    80\u2192        }\n    81\u2192        return answer.isEmpty() ? set : answer;\n    82\u2192    }\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192    protected String parseString(String text) {\n    85\u2192        return CamelContextHelper.parseText(camelContext, text);\n    86\u2192    }\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192    protected Boolean parseBoolean(String text) {\n    89\u2192        return CamelContextHelper.parseBoolean(camelContext, text);\n    90\u2192    }\n    91\u2192\n    92\u2192    protected boolean parseBoolean(String text, boolean def) {\n    93\u2192        Boolean b = parseBoolean(text);\n    94\u2192        return b != null ? b : def;\n    95\u2192    }\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192    protected Long parseLong(String text) {\n    98\u2192        return CamelContextHelper.parseLong(camelContext, text);\n    99\u2192    }\n   100\u2192\n   101\u2192    protected long parseLong(String text, long def) {\n   102\u2192        Long l = parseLong(text);\n   103\u2192        return l != null ? l : def;\n   104\u2192    }\n   105\u2192\n   106\u2192    protected Long parseDuration(String text) {\n   107\u2192        Duration d = CamelContextHelper.parseDuration(camelContext, text);\n   108\u2192        return d != null ? d.toMillis() : null;\n   109\u2192    }\n   110\u2192\n   111\u2192    protected long parseDuration(String text, long def) {\n   112\u2192        Duration d = CamelContextHelper.parseDuration(camelContext, text);\n   113\u2192        return d != null ? d.toMillis() : def;\n   114\u2192    }\n   115\u2192\n   116\u2192    protected Integer parseInt(String text) {\n   117\u2192        return CamelContextHelper.parseInteger(camelContext, text);\n   118\u2192    }\n   119\u2192\n   120\u2192    protected int parseInt(String text, int def) {\n   121\u2192        Integer i = parseInt(text);\n   122\u2192        return i != null ? i : def;\n   123\u2192    }\n   124\u2192\n   125\u2192    protected Float parseFloat(String text) {\n   126\u2192        return CamelContextHelper.parseFloat(camelContext, text);\n   127\u2192    }\n   128\u2192\n   129\u2192    protected float parseFloat(String text, float def) {\n   130\u2192        Float f = parseFloat(text);\n   131\u2192        return f != null ? f : def;\n   132\u2192    }\n   133\u2192\n   134\u2192    protected <T> T parse(Class<T> clazz, String text) {\n   135\u2192        return CamelContextHelper.parse(camelContext, clazz, text);\n   136\u2192    }\n   137\u2192\n   138\u2192    protected <T> T parse(Class<T> clazz, Object text) {\n   139\u2192        if (text instanceof String string) {\n   140\u2192            text = parseString(string);\n   141\u2192        }\n   142\u2192        return CamelContextHelper.convertTo(camelContext, clazz, text);\n   143\u2192    }\n   144\u2192\n   145\u2192    protected Expression createExpression(ExpressionDefinition expression) {\n   146\u2192        return ExpressionReifier.reifier(camelContext, expression).createExpression();\n   147\u2192    }\n   148\u2192\n   149\u2192    protected Expression createExpression(ExpressionSubElementDefinition expression) {\n   150\u2192        return ExpressionReifier.reifier(camelContext, expression).createExpression();\n   151\u2192    }\n   152\u2192\n   153\u2192    protected Predicate createPredicate(ExpressionDefinition expression) {\n   154\u2192        return ExpressionReifier.reifier(camelContext, expression).createPredicate();\n   155\u2192    }\n   156\u2192\n   157\u2192    protected Predicate createPredicate(ExpressionSubElementDefinition expression) {\n   158\u2192        return ExpressionReifier.reifier(camelContext, expression).createPredicate();\n   159\u2192    }\n   160\u2192\n   161\u2192    protected Object or(Object a, Object b) {\n   162\u2192        return a != null ? a : b;\n   163\u2192    }\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192    protected Object asRef(String s) {\n   166\u2192        return s != null ? s.startsWith(\"#\") ? s : \"#\" + s : null;\n   167\u2192    }\n   168\u2192\n   169\u2192    protected BeanRepository getRegistry() {\n   170\u2192        return camelContext.getRegistry();\n   171\u2192    }\n   172\u2192\n   173\u2192    public <T> T mandatoryLookup(String name, Class<T> type) {\n   174\u2192        name = parseString(name);\n   175\u2192\n   176\u2192        Object obj = lookupByNameAndType(name, type);\n   177\u2192        if (obj == null) {\n   178\u2192            throw new NoSuchBeanException(name, type.getName());\n   179\u2192        }\n   180\u2192        return type.cast(obj);\n   181\u2192    }\n   182\u2192\n   183\u2192    @Override\n   184\u2192    public Object lookupByName(String name) {\n   185\u2192        if (name == null) {\n   186\u2192            return null;\n   187\u2192        }\n   188\u2192        name = parseString(name);\n   189\u2192\n   190\u2192        if (EndpointHelper.isReferenceParameter(name)) {\n   191\u2192            return EndpointHelper.resolveReferenceParameter(camelContext, name, Object.class, false);\n   192\u2192        } else {\n   193\u2192            return getRegistry().lookupByName(name);\n   194\u2192        }\n   195\u2192    }\n   196\u2192\n   197\u2192    public <T> T lookupByNameAndType(String name, Class<T> type) {\n   198\u2192        if (name == null) {\n   199\u2192            return null;\n   200\u2192        }\n   201\u2192        name = parseString(name);\n   202\u2192\n   203\u2192        if (EndpointHelper.isReferenceParameter(name)) {\n   204\u2192            return EndpointHelper.resolveReferenceParameter(camelContext, name, type, false);\n   205\u2192        } else {\n   206\u2192            return getRegistry().lookupByNameAndType(name, type);\n   207\u2192        }\n   208\u2192    }\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192    @Override\n   211\u2192    public <T> Map<String, T> findByTypeWithName(Class<T> type) {\n   212\u2192        return getRegistry().findByTypeWithName(type);\n   213\u2192    }\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192    @Override\n   216\u2192    public <T> Set<T> findByType(Class<T> type) {\n   217\u2192        return getRegistry().findByType(type);\n   218\u2192    }\n   219\u2192\n   220\u2192    @Override\n   221\u2192    public Object unwrap(Object value) {\n   222\u2192        return getRegistry().unwrap(value);\n   223\u2192    }\n   224\u2192\n   225\u2192    public Endpoint resolveEndpoint(String uri) throws NoSuchEndpointException {\n   226\u2192        return CamelContextHelper.getMandatoryEndpoint(camelContext, uri);\n   227\u2192    }\n   228\u2192\n   229\u2192}\n   230\u2192"

org.apache.camel.spi.ResourceAware;\n    52\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.RoutePolicy;\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192/**\n    55\u2192 * A Camel route\n    56\u2192 */\n    57\u2192@Metadata(label = \"configuration\")\n    58\u2192@XmlRootElement(name = \"route\")\n    59\u2192@XmlType(propOrder = { \"routeProperties\", \"errorHandler\", \"input\", \"inputType\", \"outputType\", \"outputs\" })\n Resource resource;\n   101\u2192    private String precondition;\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192    public RouteDefinition() {\n   104\u2192    }\n   105\u2192\n   106\u2192    public RouteDefinition(@AsEndpointUri String uri) {\n   107\u2192        from(uri);\n   108\u2192    }\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192    public RouteDefinition(Endpoint endpoint) {\n   111\u2192 fromRest(@AsEndpointUri String uri) {\n   118\u2192        if (uri != null) {\n   119\u2192            from(uri);\n   120\u2192        }\n   121\u2192        rest = true;\n   122\u2192    }\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192    /**\n   125\u2192     * Check if the route has been prepared\n   126\u2192     *\n   127\u2192     * @return whether the route has been prepared or not\n   128\u2192     * @see    RouteDefinitionHelper#prepareRoute(CamelContext, RouteDefinition)\n   129\u2192     */\n   130\u2192    public boolean isPrepared() {\n   131\u2192        return prepared.get();\n   132\u2192    }\n   133\u2192\n   134\u2192    /**\n   135\u2192     * Marks the route definition as prepared.\n   136\u2192     * <p/>\n   137\u2192     * This is necessary if routes have been created by components such as camel-spring-xml. Usually they share logic in\n   138\u2192     * the camel-core-xml module which prepares the routes.\n   139\u2192     */\n   140\u2192    public void markPrepared() {\n   141\u2192        prepared.set(true);\n   142\u2192    }\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192    /**\n   145\u2192     * Marks the route definition as un-prepared.\n   146\u2192     */\n   147\u2192    public void markUnprepared() {\n   148\u2192        prepared.set(false);\n   149\u2192    }\n   150\u2192\n   151\u2192    /**\n   152\u2192     * Check if the route has been inlined by rest-dsl\n   153\u2192     *\n   154\u2192     * @return whether the route has been inlined by rest-dsl or not\n   155\u2192     */\n   156\u2192    public boolean isInlined() {\n   157\u2192        return inlined.get();\n   158\u2192    }\n   159\u2192\n   160\u2192    /**\n   161\u2192     * Marks the route definition as inlined by rest-dsl\n   162\u2192     */\n   163\u2192    public void markInlined() {\n   164\u2192        inlined.set(true);\n   165\u2192    }\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192    /**\n   168\u2192     * Reset internal state before preparing route\n   169\u2192     */\n   170\u2192    public void resetPrepare() {\n   171\u2192        appliedRouteConfigurationIds = null;\n   172\u2192    }\n   173\u2192\n   174\u2192    @Override\n   175\u2192    public String toString() {\n   176\u2192        if (getId() != null) {\n   177\u2192            return \"Route(\" + getId() + \")[\" + (input != null ? input : \"\") + \" -> \" + outputs + \"]\";\n   178\u2192        } else {\n   179\u2192            return \"Route[\" + input + \" -> \" + outputs + \"]\";\n   180\u2192        }\n   181\u2192    }\n   182\u2192\n   183\u2192    @Override\n   184\u2192    public String getShortName() {\n   185\u2192        return \"route\";\n   186\u2192    }\n   187\u2192\n   188\u2192    @Override\n   189\u2192    public String getLabel() {\n   190\u2192        return \"Route[\" + input.getLabel() + \"]\";\n   191\u2192    }\n   192\u2192\n   193\u2192    @Override\n   194\u2192    public String getRouteId() {\n   195\u2192        return getId();\n   196\u2192    }\n   197\u2192\n   198\u2192    @Override\n   199\u2192    public String getEndpointUrl() {\n   200\u2192        return input != null ? input.getEndpointUri() : null;\n   201\u2192    }\n   202\u2192\n   203\u2192    // Fluent API\n   204\u2192    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------\n   205\u2192\n   206\u2192    /**\n   207\u2192     * Creates an input to the route\n   208\u2192     *\n   209\u2192     * @param  uri the from uri\n   210\u2192     * @return     the builder\n   211\u2192     */\n   212\u2192    public RouteDefinition from(@AsEndpointUri String uri) {\n   213\u2192        setInput(new FromDefinition(uri));\n   214\u2192        return this;\n   215\u2192    }\n   216\u2192\n   217\u2192    /**\n   218\u2192     * Creates an input to the route\n   219\u2192     *\n   220\u2192     * @param  endpoint the from endpoint\n   221\u2192     * @return          the builder\n   222\u2192     */\n   223\u2192    public RouteDefinition from(Endpoint endpoint) {\n   224\u2192        setInput(new FromDefinition(endpoint));\n   225\u2192        return this;\n   226\u2192    }\n   227\u2192\n   228\u2192    /**\n   229\u2192     * Creates an input to the route\n   230\u2192     *\n   231\u2192     * @param  endpoint the from endpoint\n   232\u2192     * @return          the builder\n   233\u2192     */\n   234\u2192    public RouteDefinition from(EndpointConsumerBuilder endpoint) {\n   235\u2192        setInput(new FromDefinition(endpoint));\n   236\u2192        return this;\n   237\u2192    }\n   238\u2192\n   239\u2192    /**\n   240\u2192     * Creates an input to the route, and uses a variable to store a copy of the received message body (only body, not\n   241\u2192     * headers). This is handy for easy access to the received message body via variables.\n   242\u2192     *\n   243\u2192     * @param  uri             the from uri\n   244\u2192     * @param  variableReceive the name of the variable\n   245\u2192     * @return                 the builder\n   246\u2192     */\n   247\u2192    public RouteDefinition fromV(@AsEndpointUri String uri, String variableReceive) {\n   248\u2192        FromDefinition from = new FromDefinition(uri);\n   249\u2192        from.setVariableReceive(variableReceive);\n   250\u2192        setInput(from);\n   251\u2192        return this;\n   252\u2192    }\n   253\u2192\n   254\u2192    /**\n   255\u2192     * Creates an input to the route, and uses a variable to store a copy of the received message body (only body, not\n   256\u2192     * headers). This is handy for easy access to the received message body via variables.\n   257\u2192     *\n   258\u2192     * @param  endpoint        the from endpoint\n   259\u2192     * @param  variableReceive the name of the variable\n   260\u2192     * @return                 the builder\n   261\u2192     */\n   262\u2192    public RouteDefinition fromV(EndpointConsumerBuilder endpoint, String variableReceive) {\n   263\u2192        FromDefinition from = new FromDefinition(endpoint);\n   264\u2192        from.setVariableReceive(variableReceive);\n   265\u2192        setInput(from);\n   266\u2192        return this;\n   267\u2192    }\n   268\u2192\n   269\u2192    /**\n   270\u2192     * The route configuration id or pattern this route should use for configuration. Multiple id/pattern can be\n   271\u2192     * separated by comma.\n   272\u2192     *\n   273\u2192     * @param  routeConfigurationId id or pattern\n   274\u2192     * @return                      the builder\n   275\u2192     */\n   276\u2192    public RouteDefinition routeConfigurationId(String routeConfigurationId) {\n   277\u2192        setRouteConfigurationId(routeConfigurationId);\n   278\u2192        return this;\n   279\u2192    }\n   280\u2192\n   281\u2192    /**\n   282\u2192     * The group name for this route. Multiple routes can belong to the same group.\n   283\u2192     *\n   284\u2192     * @param  name the group name\n   285\u2192     * @return      the builder\n   286\u2192     */\n   287\u2192    public RouteDefinition group(String name) {\n   288\u2192        setGroup(name);\n   289\u2192        return this;\n   290\u2192    }\n   291\u2192\n   292\u2192    /**\n   293\u2192     * The group name for this route. Multiple routes can belong to the same group.\n   294\u2192     *\n   295\u2192     * @param  group the route group\n   296\u2192     * @return       the builder\n   297\u2192     */\n   298\u2192    @Override\n   299\u2192    public RouteDefinition routeGroup(String group) {\n   300\u2192        setGroup(group);\n   301\u2192        return this;\n   302\u2192    }\n   303\u2192\n   304\u2192    /**\n   305\u2192     * Set the route id for this route\n   306\u2192     *\n   307\u2192     * @param  id the route id\n   308\u2192     * @return    the builder\n   309\u2192     */\n   310\u2192    @Override\n   311\u2192    public RouteDefinition routeId(String id) {\n   312\u2192        if (hasCustomIdAssigned()) {\n   313\u2192            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"You can only set routeId one time per route.\");\n   314\u2192        }\n   315\u2192        setId(id);\n   316\u2192        return this;\n   317\u2192    }\n   318\u2192\n   319\u2192    /**\n   320\u2192     * Set the route description for this route\n   321\u2192     *\n   322\u2192     * @param  description the route description\n   323\u2192     * @return             the builder\n   324\u2192     */\n   325\u2192    @Override\n   326\u2192    public RouteDefinition routeDescription(String description) {\n   327\u2192        setDescription(description);\n   328\u2192        return this;\n   329\u2192 builder\n   336\u2192     */\n   337\u2192    @Override\n   338\u2192    public RouteDefinition routeNote(String note) {\n   339\u2192        setNote(note);\n   340\u2192        return this;\n   341\u2192    }\n   342\u2192\n   343\u2192    /**\n   344\u2192     * Sets a prefix to use for all node ids (not route id).\n   345\u2192     *\n   346\u2192     * @param  prefixId the prefix\n @Deprecated(since = \"4.6.0\")\n   374\u2192    public RouteDefinition streamCaching() {\n   375\u2192        setStreamCache(\"true\");\n   376\u2192        return this;\n   377\u2192    }\n the value can be a property placeholder\n   383\u2192     * @return                 the builder\n   384\u2192     * @deprecated             use {@link #streamCache(String)}\n   385\u2192     */\n   386\u2192    @Deprecated(since = \"4.6.0\")\n   387\u2192    public RouteDefinition streamCaching(String streamCache) {\n   388\u2192        setStreamCache(streamCache);\n   389\u2192        return this;\n   390\u2192    }\n   391\u2192\n   392\u2192    /**\n   393\u2192     * Enable or disables stream caching for this route.\n   394\u2192     *\n   395\u2192     * @param  streamCache whether to use stream caching\n   396\u2192     * @return             the builder\n   397\u2192     */\n   398\u2192    public RouteDefinition streamCache(boolean streamCache) {\n   399\u2192        setStreamCache(streamCache ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n   400\u2192        return this;\n   401\u2192    }\n   402\u2192\n   403\u2192    /**\n   404\u2192     * Enable or disables stream caching for this route.\n   405\u2192     *\n   406\u2192     * @param  streamCache whether to use stream caching (true or false), the value can be a property placeholder\n   407\u2192     * @return             the builder\n   408\u2192     */\n   409\u2192    public RouteDefinition streamCache(String streamCache) {\n   410\u2192        setStreamCache(streamCache);\n   411\u2192        return this;\n   412\u2192    }\n   413\u2192\n   414\u2192    /**\n   415\u2192     * Disable tracing for this route.\n   416\u2192     *\n   417\u2192     * @return     the builder\n   418\u2192     * @deprecated use {@link #trace(String)}\n   419\u2192     */\n   420\u2192    @Deprecated(since = \"4.6.0\")\n   421\u2192    public RouteDefinition noTracing() {\n   422\u2192        setTrace(\"false\");\n   423\u2192        return this;\n   424\u2192    }\n   425\u2192\n   426\u2192    /**\n   427\u2192     * Enable tracing for this route.\n   428\u2192     *\n   429\u2192     * @return     the builder\n
