* @deprecated use {@link #delayer(long)}\n   544\u2192     */\n   545\u2192    @Deprecated(since = \"4.6.0\")\n   546\u2192    public RouteDefinition noDelayer() {\n   547\u2192        setDelayer(\"0\");\n   548\u2192        return this;\n   549\u2192    }\n   550\u2192\n   551\u2192    /**\n   552\u2192     * Enable delayer for this route.\n   553\u2192     *\n   554\u2192     * @param  delay delay in millis\n   555\u2192     * @return       the builder\n   556\u2192     */\n   557\u2192    public RouteDefinition delayer(long delay) {\n   558\u2192        setDelayer(Long.toString(delay));\n   559\u2192        return this;\n   560\u2192    }\n   561\u2192\n   562\u2192    /**\n   563\u2192     * Installs the given <a href=\"http://camel.apache.org/error-handler.html\">error handler</a> builder.\n   564\u2192     *\n   565\u2192     * @param  ref reference to existing error handler\n   566\u2192     * @return     the current builder with the error handler configured\n   567\u2192     */\n   568\u2192    public RouteDefinition errorHandler(String ref) {\n   569\u2192        setErrorHandlerRef(ref);\n   570\u2192        // we are now using a route scoped error handler\n   571\u2192        contextScopedErrorHandler = false;\n   572\u2192        return this;\n   573\u2192    }\n   574\u2192\n   575\u2192    /**\n   576\u2192     * Installs the given <a href=\"http://camel.apache.org/error-handler.html\">error handler</a> builder.\n   577\u2192     *\n   578\u2192     * @param  errorHandlerBuilder the error handler to be used by default for all child routes\n   579\u2192     * @return                     the current builder with the error handler configured\n   580\u2192     */\n   581\u2192    public RouteDefinition errorHandler(ErrorHandlerFactory errorHandlerBuilder) {\n   582\u2192        setErrorHandlerFactory(errorHandlerBuilder);\n   583\u2192        // we are now using a route scoped error handler\n   584\u2192        contextScopedErrorHandler = false;\n   585\u2192        return this;\n   586\u2192    }\n   587\u2192\n   588\u2192    /**\n   589\u2192     * Disables this route from being auto started when Camel starts.\n   590\u2192     *\n   591\u2192     * @return the builder\n   592\u2192     */\n   593\u2192    @Deprecated(since = \"4.6.0\")\n   594\u2192    public RouteDefinition noAutoStartup() {\n   595\u2192        setAutoStartup(\"false\");\n   596\u2192        return this;\n   597\u2192    }\n   598\u2192\n   599\u2192    /**\n   600\u2192     * Sets the auto startup property on this route.\n   601\u2192     *\n   602\u2192     * @param  autoStartup whether to auto startup (true or false), the value can be a property placeholder\n   603\u2192     * @return             the builder\n   604\u2192     */\n   605\u2192    public RouteDefinition autoStartup(String autoStartup) {\n   606\u2192        setAutoStartup(autoStartup);\n   607\u2192        return this;\n   608\u2192    }\n   609\u2192\n   610\u2192    /**\n   611\u2192     * Sets the auto startup property on this route.\n   612\u2192     *\n   613\u2192     * @param  autoStartup - boolean indicator\n   614\u2192     * @return             the builder\n   615\u2192     */\n   616\u2192    public RouteDefinition autoStartup(boolean autoStartup) {\n   617\u2192        setAutoStartup(Boolean.toString(autoStartup));\n   618\u2192        return this;\n   619\u2192    }\n   620\u2192\n   621\u2192    /**\n   622\u2192     * Sets the predicate of the precondition in simple language to evaluate in order to determine if this route should\n   623\u2192     * be included or not.\n   624\u2192     *\n   625\u2192     * @param  precondition the predicate corresponding to the test to evaluate.\n   626\u2192     * @return              the builder\n   627\u2192     */\n   628\u2192    public RouteDefinition precondition(String precondition) {\n   629\u2192        setPrecondition(precondition);\n   630\u2192        return this;\n   631\u2192    }\n   632\u2192\n   633\u2192    /**\n   634\u2192     * Configures the startup order for this route\n   635\u2192     * <p/>\n   636\u2192     * Camel will reorder routes and star them ordered by 0..N where 0 is the lowest number and N the highest number.\n   637\u2192     * Camel will stop routes in reverse order when its stopping.\n   638\u2192     *\n   639\u2192     * @param  order the order represented as a number\n   640\u2192     * @return       the builder\n   641\u2192     */\n   642\u2192    @Override\n   643\u2192    public RouteDefinition startupOrder(int order) {\n   644\u2192        setStartupOrder(order);\n   645\u2192        return this;\n   646\u2192    }\n   647\u2192\n   648\u2192    /**\n   649\u2192     * Configures route policies for this route\n   650\u2192     *\n   651\u2192     * @param  policies the route policies\n   652\u2192     * @return          the builder\n   653\u2192     */\n   654\u2192    public RouteDefinition routePolicy(RoutePolicy... policies) {\n   655\u2192        if (routePolicies == null) {\n   656\u2192            routePolicies = new ArrayList<>();\n   657\u2192        }\n   658\u2192        routePolicies.addAll(Arrays.asList(policies));\n   659\u2192        return this;\n   660\u2192    }\n   661\u2192\n   662\u2192    /**\n   663\u2192     * Configures route policy for this route\n   664\u2192     *\n   665\u2192     * @param  policy route policy\n   666\u2192     * @return        the builder\n   667\u2192     */\n   668\u2192    public RouteDefinition routePolicy(Supplier<RoutePolicy> policy) {\n   669\u2192        return routePolicy(policy.get());\n   670\u2192    }\n   671\u2192\n   672\u2192    /**\n   673\u2192     * Configures a route policy for this route\n   674\u2192     *\n   675\u2192     * @param  routePolicyRef reference to a {@link RoutePolicy} to lookup and use. You can specify multiple references\n   676\u2192     *                        by separating using comma.\n   677\u2192     * @return                the builder\n   678\u2192     */\n   679\u2192    public RouteDefinition routePolicyRef(String routePolicyRef) {\n   680\u2192        setRoutePolicyRef(routePolicyRef);\n   681\u2192        return this;\n   682\u2192    }\n   683\u2192\n   684\u2192 692\u2192    }\n   693\u2192\n   694\u2192    /**\n   695\u2192     * Configures a shutdown route option.\n   696\u2192     *\n   697\u2192     * @param  shutdownRoute the option to use when shutting down this route\n   698\u2192     * @return               the builder\n   699\u2192     */\n   700\u2192    public RouteDefinition shutdownRoute(String shutdownRoute) {\n   701\u2192 Declare the expected data type of the input message. The type name consists of two\n   729\u2192     * parts, 'scheme' and 'name' connected with ':'. For Java type 'name' is a fully qualified class name. For example\n   730\u2192     * {@code java:java.lang.String}, {@code json:ABCOrder}.\n   731\u2192     *\n   732\u2192     * @see        org.apache.camel.spi.Transformer\n   733\u2192     * @param  urn input type URN\n   734\u2192     * @return     the builder\n   735\u2192     */\n   736\u2192    public RouteDefinition inputType(String urn) {\n   737\u2192        inputType = new InputTypeDefinition().urn(urn).validate(false);\n   738\u2192        return this;\n   739\u2192    }\n   740\u2192\n   741\u2192    /**\n   742\u2192     * Declare the expected data type of the input message with content validation enabled. The type name consists of two parts, 'scheme'\n   745\u2192     * and 'name' connected with ':'. For Java type 'name' is a fully qualified class name. For example\n   746\u2192     * {@code java:java.lang.String}, {@code json:ABCOrder}.\n   747\u2192     *\n   748\u2192     * @see        org.apache.camel.spi.Transformer\n   749\u2192     * @see        org.apache.camel.spi.Validator\n   750\u2192     * @param  urn input type URN\n   751\u2192     * @return     the builder\n   752\u2192     */\n   753\u2192    public RouteDefinition inputTypeWithValidate(String urn) {\n   754\u2192        inputType = new InputTypeDefinition().urn(urn).validate(true);\n   755\u2192        return this;\n   756\u2192    }\n   757\u2192\n   758\u2192    /**\n   759\u2192     * Declare the expected data type of the input message by Java class. PropertyDefinition();\n   855\u2192        prop.setKey(key);\n   856\u2192        prop.setValue(value);\n   857\u2192\n   858\u2192        routeProperties.add(prop);\n   859\u2192\n   860\u2192 input;\n   905\u2192    }\n   906\u2192\n   907\u2192    /**\n   908\u2192     * Input to the route.\n   909\u2192     */\n   910\u2192    @XmlElementRef(required = false)\n   911\u2192    public void setInput(FromDefinition input) {\n   912\u2192        if (this.input != null && input != null && this.input != input) {\n   913\u2192            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Only one input is allowed per route. 50\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.EnrichDefinition;\n    51\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ExecutorServiceAwareDefinition;\n    52\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.FilterDefinition;\n    53\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.FinallyDefinition;\n    54\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.IdempotentConsumerDefinition;\n    55\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.InterceptDefinition;\n org.apache.camel.model.KameletDefinition;\n    59\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.LoadBalanceDefinition;\n    60\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.LogDefinition;\n    61\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.LoopDefinition;\n    62\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.MarshalDefinition;\n    63\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ModelCamelContext;\n    64\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.MulticastDefinition;\n    65\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.OnCompletionDefinition;\n    66\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.OnExceptionDefinition;\n    67\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.OptionalIdentifiedDefinition;\n    68\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.PausableDefinition;\n    69\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.PipelineDefinition;\n    70\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.PolicyDefinition;\n    71\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.PollDefinition;\n    72\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.PollEnrichDefinition;\n    73\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ProcessDefinition;\n    74\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ProcessorDefinition;\n    75\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ProcessorDefinitionHelper;\n    76\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.RecipientListDefinition;\n    77\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.RemoveHeaderDefinition;\n    78\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.RemoveHeadersDefinition;\n org.apache.camel.model.RemoveVariableDefinition;\n    82\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ResequenceDefinition;\n    83\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ResumableDefinition;\n    84\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.RoutingSlipDefinition;\n    88\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.SagaDefinition;\n    89\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.SamplingDefinition;\n    90\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ScriptDefinition;\n    91\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.SetBodyDefinition;\n    92\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.SetExchangePatternDefinition;\n    93\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.SetHeaderDefinition;\n    94\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.SetHeadersDefinition;\n    95\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.SetPropertyDefinition;\n    96\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.SetVariableDefinition;\n    97\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.SetVariablesDefinition;\n    98\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.SortDefinition;\n    99\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.SplitDefinition;\n   100\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.StepDefinition;\n   101\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.StopDefinition;\n   102\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ThreadsDefinition;\n   103\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ThrottleDefinition;\n   104\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ThrowExceptionDefinition;\n   105\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ToDefinition;\n   106\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ToDynamicDefinition;\n   107\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.TokenizerDefinition;\n   108\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.TransactedDefinition;\n   109\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.TransformDataTypeDefinition;\n   110\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.TransformDefinition;\n   111\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.TryDefinition;\n   112\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.UnmarshalDefinition;\n   113\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ValidateDefinition;\n   114\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.WireTapDefinition;\n   115\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.cloud.ServiceCallDefinition;\n   116\u2192import org.apache.camel.processor.InterceptEndpointProcessor;\n   117\u2192import org.apache.camel.processor.Pipeline;\n   118\u2192import org.apache.camel.processor.aggregate.AggregationStrategyBeanAdapter;\n   119\u2192import org.apache.camel.processor.aggregate.AggregationStrategyBiFunctionAdapter;\n   120\u2192import org.apache.camel.reifier.tokenizer.TokenizerReifier;\n   121\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.ErrorHandlerAware;\n   122\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.ExecutorServiceManager;\n   123\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.IdAware;\n   124\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.InterceptStrategy;\n   125\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.NodeIdFactory;\n   126\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.ProcessorFactory;\n   127\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.ReifierStrategy;\n   128\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.RouteIdAware;\n   129\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.CamelContextHelper;\n   130\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.PluginHelper;\n   131\u2192import org.apache.camel.util.ObjectHelper;\n   132\u2192import org.slf4j.Logger;\n   133\u2192import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192public abstract class ProcessorReifier<T extends ProcessorDefinition<?>> extends AbstractReifier {\n   136\u2192\n   137\u2192    /**\n   138\u2192     * Global option on {@link CamelContext#getGlobalOptions()} that tooling can use to disable all route processors,\n   139\u2192     * which allows to startup Camel without wiring up and initializing all route EIPs that may use custom processors,\n   140\u2192     * beans, and other services that may not be available, or is unwanted to be in use; for example to have fast\n   141\u2192     * startup, and being able to introspect CamelContext and the route models.\n   142\u2192     */\n   143\u2192    public static final String DISABLE_ALL_PROCESSORS = \"DisableAllProcessors\";\n   144\u2192\n   145\u2192    /**\n   146\u2192     * Global option on {@link CamelContext#getGlobalOptions()} that tooling can use to disable route processors (bean\n   147\u2192     * and custom process), which allows to startup Camel without wiring up and initializing using custom\n   148\u2192     * bean/processors, that may not be available, or is unwanted to be in use; for example to have fast startup, and\n   149\u2192     * being able to introspect CamelContext and the route models.\n   150\u2192     */\n   151\u2192    public static final String DISABLE_BEAN_OR_PROCESS_PROCESSORS = \"DisableBeanOrProcessProcessors\";\n   152\u2192\n   153\u2192    private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ProcessorReifier.class);\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192    // for custom reifiers\n   156\u2192    private static final Map<Class<?>, BiFunction<Route, ProcessorDefinition<?>, ProcessorReifier<? extends ProcessorDefinition<?>>>> PROCESSORS\n   157\u2192            = new HashMap<>(0);\n   158\u2192\n   159\u2192    protected final T definition;\n   160\u2192\n   161\u2192    public ProcessorReifier(Route route, T definition) {\n   162\u2192        super(route);\n   163\u2192        this.definition = definition;\n   164\u2192    }\n   165\u2192\n   166\u2192    public ProcessorReifier(CamelContext camelContext, T definition) {\n   167\u2192        super(camelContext);\n   168\u2192        this.definition = definition;\n   169\u2192    }\n   170\u2192\n   171\u2192    public static void registerReifier(\n   172\u2192            Class<?> processorClass,\n   173\u2192            BiFunction<Route, ProcessorDefinition<?>, ProcessorReifier<? extends ProcessorDefinition<?>>> creator) {\n   174\u2192        if (PROCESSORS.isEmpty()) {\n   175\u2192            ReifierStrategy.addReifierClearer(ProcessorReifier::clearReifiers);\n   176\u2192        }\n   177\u2192        PROCESSORS.put(processorClass, creator);\n   178\u2192    }\n   179\u2192\n   180\u2192    public static void clearReifiers() {\n   181\u2192        PROCESSORS.clear();\n   182\u2192    }\n   183\u2192\n   184\u2192    public static ProcessorReifier<? extends ProcessorDefinition<?>> reifier(Route route, ProcessorDefinition<?> definition) {\n   185\u2192        ProcessorReifier<? extends ProcessorDefinition<?>> answer = null;\n   186\u2192\n   187\u2192        if (!PROCESSORS.isEmpty()) {\n   188\u2192            // custom take precedence\n   189\u2192            BiFunction<Route, ProcessorDefinition<?>, ProcessorReifier<? extends ProcessorDefinition<?>>> reifier\n   190\u2192                    = PROCESSORS.get(definition.getClass());\n   191\u2192            if (reifier != null) {\n   192\u2192                answer = reifier.apply(route, definition);\n   193\u2192            }\n   194\u2192        }\n   195\u2192        if (answer == null) {\n   196\u2192            answer = coreReifier(route, definition);\n   197\u2192        }\n   198\u2192        if (answer == null) {\n   199\u2192            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Unsupported definition: \" + definition);\n   200\u2192        }\n   201\u2192        return answer;\n   202\u2192    }\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192    public static ProcessorReifier<? extends ProcessorDefinition<?>> coreReifier(\n   205\u2192            Route route, ProcessorDefinition<?> definition) {\n   206\u2192\n   207\u2192        if (definition instanceof AggregateDefinition) {\n   208\u2192            return new AggregateReifier(route, definition);\n   209\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof BeanDefinition) {\n   210\u2192            return new BeanReifier(route, definition);\n   211\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof CatchDefinition) {\n   212\u2192            return new CatchReifier(route, definition);\n   213\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ChoiceDefinition) {\n   214\u2192            return new ChoiceReifier(route, definition);\n   215\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof CircuitBreakerDefinition) {\n   216\u2192            return new CircuitBreakerReifier(route, definition);\n   217\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ClaimCheckDefinition) {\n   218\u2192            return new ClaimCheckReifier(route, definition);\n   219\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ConvertBodyDefinition) {\n   220\u2192            return new ConvertBodyReifier(route, definition);\n   221\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ConvertHeaderDefinition) {\n   222\u2192            return new ConvertHeaderReifier(route, definition);\n   223\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ConvertVariableDefinition) {\n   224\u2192            return new ConvertVariableReifier(route, definition);\n   225\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof DelayDefinition) {\n   226\u2192            return new DelayReifier(route, definition);\n   227\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof DynamicRouterDefinition) {\n   228\u2192            return new DynamicRouterReifier(route, definition);\n   229\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof EnrichDefinition) {\n   230\u2192            return new EnrichReifier(route, definition);\n   231\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof FilterDefinition) {\n   232\u2192            return new FilterReifier(route, definition);\n   233\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof FinallyDefinition) {\n   234\u2192            return new FinallyReifier(route, definition);\n   235\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof IdempotentConsumerDefinition) {\n   236\u2192            return new IdempotentConsumerReifier(route, definition);\n   237\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof InterceptFromDefinition) {\n   238\u2192            return new InterceptFromReifier(route, definition);\n   239\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof InterceptDefinition) {\n   240\u2192            return new InterceptReifier(route, definition);\n   241\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof InterceptSendToEndpointDefinition) {\n   242\u2192            return new InterceptSendToEndpointReifier(route, definition);\n   243\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof KameletDefinition) {\n   244\u2192            return new KameletReifier(route, definition);\n   245\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof LoadBalanceDefinition) {\n   246\u2192            return new LoadBalanceReifier(route, definition);\n   247\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof LogDefinition) {\n   248\u2192            return new LogReifier(route, definition);\n   249\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof LoopDefinition) {\n   250\u2192            return new LoopReifier(route, definition);\n   251\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof MarshalDefinition) {\n   252\u2192            return new MarshalReifier(route, definition);\n   253\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof MulticastDefinition) {\n   254\u2192            return new MulticastReifier(route, definition);\n   255\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof OnCompletionDefinition) {\n   256\u2192            return new OnCompletionReifier(route, definition);\n   257\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof OnExceptionDefinition) {\n   258\u2192            return new OnExceptionReifier(route, definition);\n   259\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof PipelineDefinition) {\n   260\u2192            return new PipelineReifier(route, definition);\n   261\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof PolicyDefinition) {\n   262\u2192            return new PolicyReifier(route, definition);\n   263\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof PollDefinition) {\n   264\u2192            return new PollReifier(route, definition);\n   265\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof PollEnrichDefinition) {\n   266\u2192            return new PollEnrichReifier(route, definition);\n   267\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ProcessDefinition) {\n   268\u2192            return new ProcessReifier(route, definition);\n   269\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof RecipientListDefinition) {\n   270\u2192            return new RecipientListReifier(route, definition);\n   271\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof RemoveHeaderDefinition) {\n   272\u2192            return new RemoveHeaderReifier(route, definition);\n   273\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof RemoveHeadersDefinition) {\n   274\u2192            return new RemoveHeadersReifier(route, definition);\n   275\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof RemovePropertyDefinition) {\n   276\u2192            return new RemovePropertyReifier(route, definition);\n   277\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof RemovePropertiesDefinition) {\n   278\u2192            return new RemovePropertiesReifier(route, definition);\n   279\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof RemoveVariableDefinition) {\n   280\u2192            return new RemoveVariableReifier(route, definition);\n   281\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ResequenceDefinition) {\n   282\u2192            return new ResequenceReifier(route, definition);\n   283\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof RollbackDefinition) {\n   284\u2192            return new RollbackReifier(route, definition);\n   285\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof RoutingSlipDefinition) {\n   286\u2192            return new RoutingSlipReifier(route, definition);\n   287\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof SagaDefinition) {\n   288\u2192            return new SagaReifier(route, definition);\n   289\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof SamplingDefinition) {\n   290\u2192            return new SamplingReifier(route, definition);\n   291\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ScriptDefinition) {\n   292\u2192            return new ScriptReifier(route, definition);\n   293\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ServiceCallDefinition) {\n   294\u2192            return new ServiceCallReifier(route, definition);\n   295\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof SetBodyDefinition) {\n   296\u2192            return new SetBodyReifier(route, definition);\n   297\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof SetExchangePatternDefinition) {\n   298\u2192            return new SetExchangePatternReifier(route, definition);\n   299\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof SetHeaderDefinition) {\n   300\u2192            return new SetHeaderReifier(route, definition);\n   301\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof SetHeadersDefinition) {\n   302\u2192            return new SetHeadersReifier(route, definition);\n   303\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof SetPropertyDefinition) {\n   304\u2192            return new SetPropertyReifier(route, definition);\n   305\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof SetVariableDefinition) {\n   306\u2192            return new SetVariableReifier(route, definition);\n   307\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof SetVariablesDefinition) {\n   308\u2192            return new SetVariablesReifier(route, definition);\n   309\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof SortDefinition) {\n   310\u2192            return new SortReifier<>(route, definition);\n   311\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof SplitDefinition) {\n   312\u2192            return new SplitReifier(route, definition);\n   313\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof StepDefinition) {\n   314\u2192            return new StepReifier(route, definition);\n   315\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof StopDefinition) {\n   316\u2192            return new StopReifier(route, definition);\n   317\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ThreadsDefinition) {\n   318\u2192            return new ThreadsReifier(route, definition);\n   319\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ThrottleDefinition) {\n   320\u2192            return new ThrottleReifier(route, definition);\n   321\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ThrowExceptionDefinition) {\n   322\u2192            return new ThrowExceptionReifier(route, definition);\n   323\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ToDefinition) {\n   324\u2192            return new SendReifier(route, definition);\n   325\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof WireTapDefinition) {\n   326\u2192            return new WireTapReifier(route, definition);\n   327\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ToDynamicDefinition) {\n   328\u2192            return new ToDynamicReifier<>(route, definition);\n   329\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof TransactedDefinition) {\n   330\u2192            return new TransactedReifier(route, definition);\n   331\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof TransformDefinition) {\n   332\u2192            return new TransformReifier(route, definition);\n   333\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof TransformDataTypeDefinition) {\n   334\u2192            return new TransformDataTypeReifier(route, definition);\n   335\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof TryDefinition) {\n   336\u2192            return new TryReifier(route, definition);\n   337\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof UnmarshalDefinition) {\n   338\u2192            return new UnmarshalReifier(route, definition);\n   339\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ValidateDefinition) {\n   340\u2192            return new ValidateReifier(route, definition);\n   341\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof ResumableDefinition) {\n   342\u2192            return new ResumableReifier(route, definition);\n   343\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof PausableDefinition) {\n   344\u2192            return new PausableReifier(route, definition);\n   345\u2192        } else if (definition instanceof TokenizerDefinition td) {\n   346\u2192            return new TokenizerReifier<>(route, td);\n   347\u2192        }\n   348\u2192        return null;\n   349\u2192    }\n   350\u2192\n   351\u2192    /**\n   352\u2192     * Determines whether a new thread pool will be created or not.\n   353\u2192     * <p/>\n   354\u2192     * This is used to know if a new thread pool will be created, and therefore is not shared by others, and therefore\n   355\u2192     * exclusive to the definition.\n   356\u2192     *\n   357\u2192     * @param  definition the node definition which may leverage executor service.\n   358\u2192     * @param  useDefault whether to fallback and use a default thread pool, if no explicit configured\n   359\u2192     * @return            <tt>true</tt> if a new thread pool will be created, <tt>false</tt> if not\n   360\u2192     * @see               #getConfiguredExecutorService(String, ExecutorServiceAwareDefinition, boolean)\n   361\u2192     */\n   362\u2192    public boolean willCreateNewThreadPool(ExecutorServiceAwareDefinition<?> definition, boolean useDefault) {\n   363\u2192        ExecutorServiceManager manager = camelContext.getExecutorServiceManager();\n   364\u2192        ObjectHelper.notNull(manager, \"ExecutorServiceManager\", camelContext);\n   365\u2192\n   366\u2192        if (definition.getExecutorServiceBean() != null) {\n   367\u2192            // no there is a custom thread pool configured\n   368\u2192            return false;\n   369\u2192        } else if (definition.getExecutorServiceRef() != null) {\n   370\u2192            ExecutorService answer = lookupByNameAndType(definition.getExecutorServiceRef(), ExecutorService.class);\n   371\u2192            // if no existing thread pool, then we will have to create a new\n   372\u2192            // thread pool\n   373\u2192            return answer == null;\n   374\u2192        } else if (useDefault) {\n   375\u2192            return true;\n   376\u2192        }\n   377\u2192\n   378\u2192        return false;\n   379\u2192    }\n   380\u2192\n   381\u2192    /**\n   382\u2192     * Will look up and get the configured {@link ExecutorService} from the given definition.\n   383\u2192     * <p/>\n   384\u2192     * This method will look up for configured thread pool in the following order\n   385\u2192     * <ul>\n   386\u2192     * <li>from the definition if any explicit configured executor service.</li>\n   387\u2192     * <li>from the {@link org.apache.camel.spi.Registry} if found</li>\n   388\u2192     * <li>from the known list of {@link org.apache.camel.spi.ThreadPoolProfile ThreadPoolProfile(s)}.</li>\n   389\u2192     * <li>if none found, then <tt>null</tt> is returned.</li>\n   390\u2192     * </ul>\n   391\u2192     * The various {@link ExecutorServiceAwareDefinition} should use this helper method to ensure they support\n   392\u2192     * configured executor services in the same coherent way.\n   393\u2192     *\n   394\u2192     * @param  name                     name which is appended to the thread name, when the {@link ExecutorService} is\n   395\u2192     *                                  created based on a {@link org.apache.camel.spi.ThreadPoolProfile}.\n   396\u2192     * @param  definition               the node definition which may leverage executor service.\n   397\u2192     * @param  useDefault               whether to fallback and use a default thread pool, if no explicit configured\n   398\u2192     * @return                          the configured executor service, or <tt>null</tt> if none was configured.\n   399\u2192     * @throws IllegalArgumentException is thrown if lookup of executor service in {@link org.apache.camel.spi.Registry}\n   400\u2192     *                                  was not found\n   401\u2192     */\n   402\u2192    public ExecutorService getConfiguredExecutorService(\n   403\u2192            String name, ExecutorServiceAwareDefinition<?> definition, boolean useDefault)\n   404\u2192            throws IllegalArgumentException {\n   405\u2192        ExecutorServiceManager manager = camelContext.getExecutorServiceManager();\n   406\u2192        ObjectHelper.notNull(manager, \"ExecutorServiceManager\", camelContext);\n   407\u2192\n   408\u2192        // prefer to use explicit configured executor on the definition\n   409\u2192        String ref = parseString(definition.getExecutorServiceRef());\n   410\u2192        if (definition.getExecutorServiceBean() != null) {\n   411\u2192            return definition.getExecutorServiceBean();\n   412\u2192        } else if (ref != null) {\n   413\u2192            // lookup in registry first and use existing thread pool if exists\n   414\u2192            ExecutorService answer = lookupExecutorServiceRef(name, definition, ref);\n   415\u2192            if (answer == null) {\n   416\u2192                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\n   417\u2192                        \"ExecutorServiceRef \" + definition.getExecutorServiceRef()\n   418\u2192                                                   + \" not found in registry (as an ExecutorService instance) or as a thread pool profile.\");\n   419\u2192            }\n   420\u2192            return answer;\n   421\u2192        } else if (useDefault) {\n   422\u2192            return manager.newDefaultThreadPool(definition, name);\n   423\u2192        }\n   424\u2192\n   425\u2192        return null;\n   426\u2192    }\n   427\u2192\n   428\u2192    /**\n   429\u2192     * Will look up and get the configured {@link java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService} from the given\n   430\u2192     * definition.\n   431\u2192     * <p/>\n   432\u2192     * This method will look up for configured thread pool in the following order\n   433\u2192     * <ul>\n   434\u2192     * <li>from the definition if any explicit configured executor service.</li>\n   435\u2192     * <li>from the {@link org.apache.camel.spi.Registry} if found</li>\n   436\u2192     * <li>from the known list of {@link org.apache.camel.spi.ThreadPoolProfile ThreadPoolProfile(s)}.</li>\n   437\u2192     * <li>if none found, then <tt>null</tt> is returned.</li>\n   438\u2192     * </ul>\n   439\u2192     * The various {@link ExecutorServiceAwareDefinition} should use this helper method to ensure they support\n   440\u2192     * configured executor services in the same coherent way.\n   441\u2192     *\n   442\u2192     * @param  name                     name which is appended to the thread name, when the {@link ExecutorService} is\n   443\u2192     *                                  created based on a {@link org.apache.camel.spi.ThreadPoolProfile}.\n   444\u2192     * @param  definition               the node definition which may leverage executor service.\n   445\u2192     * @param  useDefault               whether to fallback and use a default thread pool, if no explicit configured\n   446\u2192     * @return                          the configured executor service, or <tt>null</tt> if none was configured.\n   447\u2192     * @throws IllegalArgumentException is thrown if the found instance is not a ScheduledExecutorService type, or\n   448\u2192     *                                  lookup of executor service in {@link org.apache.camel.spi.Registry} was not\n   449\u2192     *                                  found\n   450\u2192     */\n   451\u2192    public ScheduledExecutorService getConfiguredScheduledExecutorService(\n   452\u2192            String name, ExecutorServiceAwareDefinition<?> definition,\n   453\u2192            boolean useDefault)\n   454\u2192            throws IllegalArgumentException {\n   455\u2192        ExecutorServiceManager manager = camelContext.getExecutorServiceManager();\n   456\u2192        ObjectHelper.notNull(manager, \"ExecutorServiceManager\", camelContext);\n   457\u2192\n   458\u2192        // prefer to use explicit configured executor on the definition\n   459\u2192        if (definition.getExecutorServiceBean() != null) {\n   460\u2192            ExecutorService executorService = definition.getExecutorServiceBean();\n   461\u2192            if (executorService instanceof ScheduledExecutorService scheduledExecutorService) {\n   462\u2192                return scheduledExecutorService;\n   463\u2192            }\n   464\u2192            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\n   465\u2192                    \"ExecutorServiceRef \" + definition.getExecutorServiceRef()\n   466\u2192                                               + \" is not an ScheduledExecutorService instance\");\n   467\u2192        } else if (definition.getExecutorServiceRef() != null) {\n   468\u2192            ScheduledExecutorService answer\n   469\u2192                    = lookupScheduledExecutorServiceRef(name, definition, definition.getExecutorServiceRef());\n   470\u2192            if (answer == null) {\n   471\u2192                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\n   472\u2192                        \"ExecutorServiceRef \" + definition.getExecutorServiceRef()\n   473\u2192                                                   + \" not found in registry (as an ScheduledExecutorService instance) or as a thread pool profile.\");\n   474\u2192            }\n   475\u2192            return answer;\n   476\u2192        } else if (useDefault) {\n   477\u2192            return manager.newDefaultScheduledThreadPool(definition, name);\n   478\u2192        }\n   479\u2192\n   480\u2192        return null;\n   481\u2192    }\n   482\u2192\n   483\u2192    /**\n   484\u2192     * Will lookup in {@link org.apache.camel.spi.Registry} for a {@link ScheduledExecutorService} registered with the\n   485\u2192     * given <tt>executorServiceRef</tt> name.\n   486\u2192     * <p/>\n   487\u2192     * This method will lookup for configured thread pool in the following order\n   488\u2192     * <ul>\n   489\u2192     * <li>from the {@link org.apache.camel.spi.Registry} if found</li>\n   490\u2192     * <li>from the known list of {@link org.apache.camel.spi.ThreadPoolProfile ThreadPoolProfile(s)}.</li>\n   491\u2192     * <li>if none found, then <tt>null</tt> is returned.</li>\n   492\u2192     * </ul>\n   493\u2192     *\n   494\u2192     * @param  name               name which is appended to the thread name, when the {@link ExecutorService} is created\n   495\u2192     *                            based on a {@link org.apache.camel.spi.ThreadPoolProfile}.\n   496\u2192     * @param  source             the source to use the thread pool\n   497\u2192     * @param  executorServiceRef reference name of the thread pool\n   498\u2192     * @return                    the executor service, or <tt>null</tt> if none was found.\n   499\u2192     */\n   500\u2192    public ScheduledExecutorService lookupScheduledExecutorServiceRef(String name, Object source, String executorServiceRef) {\n   501\u2192        ExecutorServiceManager manager = camelContext.getExecutorServiceManager();\n   502\u2192        ObjectHelper.notNull(manager, \"ExecutorServiceManager\", camelContext);\n   503\u2192        ObjectHelper.notNull(executorServiceRef, \"executorServiceRef\");\n   504\u2192\n   505\u2192        // lookup in registry first and use existing thread pool if exists\n   506\u2192        ScheduledExecutorService answer = lookupByNameAndType(executorServiceRef, ScheduledExecutorService.class);\n   507\u2192        if (answer == null) {\n   508\u2192            // then create a thread pool assuming the ref is a thread pool\n   509\u2192            // profile id\n   510\u2192            answer = manager.newScheduledThreadPool(source, name, executorServiceRef);\n   511\u2192        }\n   512\u2192        return answer;\n   513\u2192    }\n   514\u2192\n   515\u2192    /**\n   516\u2192     * Will lookup in {@link org.apache.camel.spi.Registry} for a {@link ExecutorService} registered with the given\n   517\u2192     * <tt>executorServiceRef</tt> name.\n   518\u2192     * <p/>\n   519\u2192     * This method will lookup for configured thread pool in the following order\n   520\u2192     * <ul>\n   521\u2192     * <li>from the {@link org.apache.camel.spi.Registry} if found</li>\n   522\u2192     * <li>from the known list of {@link org.apache.camel.spi.ThreadPoolProfile ThreadPoolProfile(s)}.</li>\n   523\u2192     * <li>if none found, then <tt>null</tt> is returned.</li>\n   524\u2192     * </ul>\n   525\u2192     *\n   526\u2192     * @param  name               name which is appended to the thread name, when the {@link ExecutorService} is created\n   527\u2192     *                            based on a {@link org.apache.camel.spi.ThreadPoolProfile}.\n   528\u2192     * @param  source             the source to use the thread pool\n   529\u2192     * @param  executorServiceRef reference name of the thread pool\n   530\u2192     * @return                    the executor service, or <tt>null</tt> if none was found.\n   531\u2192     */\n   532\u2192    public ExecutorService lookupExecutorServiceRef(String name, Object source, String executorServiceRef) {\n   533\u2192        ExecutorServiceManager manager = camelContext.getExecutorServiceManager();\n   534\u2192        ObjectHelper.notNull(manager, \"ExecutorServiceManager\", camelContext);\n   535\u2192        ObjectHelper.notNull(executorServiceRef, \"executorServiceRef\");\n   536\u2192\n   537\u2192        // lookup in registry first and use existing thread pool if exists\n   538\u2192        ExecutorService answer = lookupByNameAndType(executorServiceRef, ExecutorService.class);\n   539\u2192        if (answer == null) {\n   540\u2192            // then create a thread pool assuming the ref is a thread pool\n   541\u2192            // profile id\n   542\u2192            answer = manager.newThreadPool(source, name, executorServiceRef);\n   543\u2192        }\n   544\u2192        return answer;\n   545\u2192    }\n   546\u2192\n   547\u2192    /**\n   548\u2192     * Is there any outputs in the given list.\n   549\u2192     * <p/>\n   550\u2192     * Is used for check if the route output has any real outputs (non abstracts)\n   551\u2192     *\n   552\u2192     * @param  outputs         the outputs\n   553\u2192     * @param  excludeAbstract whether or not to exclude abstract outputs (e.g. skip onException etc.)\n   554\u2192     * @return                 <tt>true</tt> if has outputs, otherwise <tt>false</tt> is returned\n   555\u2192     */\n   556\u2192    @SuppressWarnings({ \"unchecked\", \"rawtypes\" })\n   557\u2192    public boolean hasOutputs(List<ProcessorDefinition<?>> outputs, boolean excludeAbstract) {\n   558\u2192        if (outputs == null || outputs.isEmpty()) {\n   559\u2192            return false;\n   560\u2192        }\n   561\u2192        if (!excludeAbstract) {\n   562\u2192            return true;\n   563\u2192        }\n   564\u2192        for (ProcessorDefinition output : outputs) {\n   565\u2192            if (output.isWrappingEntireOutput()) {\n   566\u2192                // special for those as they wrap entire output, so we should\n   567\u2192                // just check its output\n   568\u2192                return hasOutputs(output.getOutputs(), excludeAbstract);\n   569\u2192            }\n   570\u2192            if (!output.isAbstract()) {\n   571\u2192                return true;\n   572\u2192            }\n   573\u2192        }\n   574\u2192        return false;\n   575\u2192    }\n   576\u2192\n   577\u2192    /**\n   578\u2192     * Override this in definition class and implement logic to create the processor based on the definition model.\n   579\u2192     */\n   580\u2192    public abstract Processor createProcessor() throws Exception;\n   581\u2192\n   582\u2192    /**\n   583\u2192     * Prefer to use {#link #createChildProcessor}.\n   584\u2192     */\n   585\u2192    protected Processor createOutputsProcessor() throws Exception {\n   586\u2192        Collection<ProcessorDefinition<?>> outputs = definition.getOutputs();\n   587\u2192        return createOutputsProcessor(outputs);\n   588\u2192    }\n   589\u2192\n   590\u2192    /**\n   591\u2192     * Creates the child processor (outputs) from the current definition\n   592\u2192     *\n   593\u2192     * @param  mandatory whether or not children is mandatory (ie the definition should have outputs)\n   594\u2192     * @return           the created children, or <tt>null</tt> if definition had no output\n   595\u2192     * @throws Exception is thrown if error creating the child or if it was mandatory and there was no output defined on\n   596\u2192     *                   definition\n   597\u2192     */\n   598\u2192    protected Processor createChildProcessor(boolean mandatory) throws Exception {\n   599\u2192        Processor children = null;\n   600\u2192        // at first use custom factory\n   601\u2192        final ProcessorFactory processorFactory = PluginHelper.getProcessorFactory(camelContext);\n   602\u2192        if (processorFactory != null) {\n   603\u2192            children = processorFactory.createChildProcessor(route,\n   604\u2192                    definition, mandatory);\n   605\u2192        }\n   606\u2192        // fallback to default implementation if factory did not create the\n   607\u2192        // child\n   608\u2192        if (children == null) {\n   609\u2192            children = createOutputsProcessor();\n   610\u2192        }\n   611\u2192\n   612\u2192        if (children == null && mandatory) {\n   613\u2192            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Definition has no children on \" + definition);\n   614\u2192        }\n   615\u2192        return children;\n   616\u2192    }\n   617\u2192\n   618\u2192    public void addRoutes() throws Exception {\n   619\u2192        Channel processor = makeProcessor();\n   620\u2192        if (processor == null) {\n   621\u2192            // no processor to add\n   622\u2192            return;\n   623\u2192        }\n   624\u2192\n   625\u2192        // are we routing to an endpoint interceptor, if so we should not\n   626\u2192        // add it as an event driven\n   627\u2192        // processor as we use the producer to trigger the interceptor\n   628\u2192        boolean endpointInterceptor = processor.getNextProcessor() instanceof InterceptEndpointProcessor;\n   629\u2192\n   630\u2192        // only add regular processors as event driven\n   631\u2192        if (endpointInterceptor) {\n   632\u2192            LOG.debug(\"Endpoint interceptor should not be added as an event driven consumer route: {}\", processor);\n   633\u2192        } else {\n   634\u2192            LOG.trace(\"Adding event driven processor: {}\", processor);\n   635\u2192            route.getEventDrivenProcessors().add(processor);\n   636\u2192        }\n   637\u2192    }\n   638\u2192\n   639\u2192    /**\n   640\u2192     * Wraps the child processor in whatever necessary interceptors and error handlers\n   641\u2192     */\n   642\u2192    public Channel wrapProcessor(Processor processor) throws Exception {\n   643\u2192        // don't double wrap\n   644\u2192        if (processor instanceof Channel channel) {\n   645\u2192            return channel;\n   646\u2192        }\n   647\u2192        return wrapChannel(processor, null);\n   648\u2192    }\n   649\u2192\n   650\u2192    protected Channel wrapChannel(Processor processor, ProcessorDefinition<?> child) throws Exception {\n   651\u2192        return wrapChannel(processor, child, definition.getInheritErrorHandler());\n   652\u2192    }\n   653\u2192\n   654\u2192    protected Channel wrapChannel(Processor processor, ProcessorDefinition<?> child, Boolean inheritErrorHandler)\n   655\u2192            throws Exception {\n   656\u2192        // put a channel in between this and each output to control the route flow logic\n   657\u2192        Channel channel = PluginHelper.getInternalProcessorFactory(camelContext)\n   658\u2192                .createChannel(camelContext);\n   659\u2192\n   660\u2192        // add interceptor strategies to the channel must be in this order:\n   661\u2192        // camel context, route context, local\n   662\u2192        List<InterceptStrategy> interceptors = new ArrayList<>();\n   663\u2192        interceptors.addAll(camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getInterceptStrategies());\n   664\u2192        interceptors.addAll(route.getInterceptStrategies());\n   665\u2192        interceptors.addAll(definition.getInterceptStrategies());\n   666\u2192\n   667\u2192        // force the creation of an id\n   668\u2192        RouteDefinitionHelper.forceAssignIds(camelContext, definition);\n   669\u2192\n   670\u2192        // fix parent/child relationship. This will be the case of the routes\n   671\u2192        // has been\n   672\u2192        // defined using XML DSL or end user may have manually assembled a route\n   673\u2192        // from the model.\n   674\u2192        // Background note: parent/child relationship is assembled on-the-fly\n   675\u2192        // when using Java DSL (fluent builders)\n   676\u2192        // where as when using XML DSL (JAXB) then it fixed after, but if people\n   677\u2192        // are using custom interceptors\n   678\u2192        // then we need to fix the parent/child relationship beforehand, and\n   679\u2192        // thus we can do it here\n   680\u2192        // ideally we need the design time route -> runtime route to be a\n   681\u2192        // 2-phase pass (scheduled work for Camel 3.0)\n   682\u2192        if (child != null && definition != child) {\n   683\u2192            child.setParent(definition);\n   684\u2192        }\n   685\u2192\n   686\u2192        // set the child before init the channel\n   687\u2192        RouteDefinition route = ProcessorDefinitionHelper.getRoute(definition);\n   688\u2192        boolean first = false;\n   689\u2192        if (route != null && !route.getOutputs().isEmpty()) {\n   690\u2192            first = route.getOutputs().get(0) == definition;\n   691\u2192        }\n   692\u2192        // special for aggregate which output are regarded as a new first\n   693\u2192        NamedNode targetOutputDef = child != null ? child : definition;\n   694\u2192        if (!first && targetOutputDef.getParent() instanceof AggregateDefinition agg) {\n   695\u2192            first = agg.getOutputs().get(0) == targetOutputDef;\n   696\u2192        }\n   697\u2192        // initialize the channel\n   698\u2192        channel.initChannel(this.route, definition, child, interceptors, processor, route, first);\n   699\u2192\n   700\u2192        // set the error handler, must be done after init as we can set the\n   701\u2192        // error handler as first in the chain\n   702\u2192        boolean wrap = ProcessorDefinitionHelper.shouldWrapInErrorHandler(camelContext, definition, child, inheritErrorHandler);\n   703\u2192        if (wrap) {\n   704\u2192            wrapChannelInErrorHandler(channel, inheritErrorHandler);\n   705\u2192        }\n   706\u2192\n   707\u2192        // do post init at the end\n   708\u2192        channel.postInitChannel();\n   709\u2192        LOG.trace(\"{} wrapped in Channel: {}\", definition, channel);\n   710\u2192\n   711\u2192        return channel;\n   712\u2192    }\n   713\u2192\n   714\u2192    /**\n   715\u2192     * Wraps the given channel in error handler (if error handler is inherited)\n   716\u2192     *\n   717\u2192     * @param  channel             the channel\n   718\u2192     * @param  inheritErrorHandler whether to inherit error handler\n   719\u2192     * @throws Exception           can be thrown if failed to create error handler builder\n   720\u2192     */\n   721\u2192    private void wrapChannelInErrorHandler(Channel channel, Boolean inheritErrorHandler) throws Exception {\n   722\u2192        if (inheritErrorHandler == null || inheritErrorHandler) {\n   723\u2192            LOG.trace(\"{} is configured to inheritErrorHandler\", definition);\n   724\u2192            Processor output = channel.getOutput();\n   725\u2192            Processor errorHandler = wrapInErrorHandler(output);\n   726\u2192            // set error handler on channel\n   727\u2192            channel.setErrorHandler(errorHandler);\n   728\u2192        } else {\n   729\u2192            LOG.debug(\"{} is configured to not inheritErrorHandler.\", definition);\n   730\u2192        }\n   731\u2192    }\n   732\u2192\n   733\u2192    /**\n   734\u2192     * Wraps the given output in an error handler\n   735\u2192     *\n   736\u2192     * @param  output    the output\n   737\u2192     * @return           the output wrapped with the error handler\n   738\u2192     * @throws Exception can be thrown if failed to create error handler builder\n   739\u2192     */\n   740\u2192    protected Processor wrapInErrorHandler(Processor output) throws Exception {\n   741\u2192        ErrorHandlerFactory builder = route.getErrorHandlerFactory();\n   742\u2192\n   743\u2192        // create error handler\n   744\u2192        Processor errorHandler = ((ModelCamelContext) camelContext).getModelReifierFactory().createErrorHandler(route,\n   745\u2192                builder, output);\n   746\u2192\n   747\u2192        if (output instanceof ErrorHandlerAware errorHandlerAware) {\n   748\u2192            errorHandlerAware.setErrorHandler(errorHandler);\n   749\u2192        }\n   750\u2192\n   751\u2192        return errorHandler;\n   752\u2192    }\n   753\u2192\n   754\u2192    /**\n   755\u2192     * Creates a new instance of some kind of composite processor which defaults to using a {@link Pipeline} but derived\n   756\u2192     * classes could change the behaviour\n   757\u2192     */\n   758\u2192    protected Processor createCompositeProcessor(List<Processor> list) throws Exception {\n   759\u2192        return Pipeline.newInstance(camelContext, list);\n   760\u2192    }\n   761\u2192\n   762\u2192    protected Processor createOutputsProcessor(Collection<ProcessorDefinition<?>> outputs) throws Exception {\n   763\u2192        return createOutputsProcessor(outputs, true);\n   764\u2192    }\n   765\u2192\n   766\u2192    protected Processor createOutputsProcessor(Collection<ProcessorDefinition<?>> outputs, boolean optimize) throws Exception {\n   767\u2192        List<Processor> list = new ArrayList<>();\n   768\u2192        for (ProcessorDefinition<?> output : outputs) {\n   769\u2192\n   770\u2192            // allow any custom logic before we create the processor\n   771\u2192            reifier(route, output).preCreateProcessor();\n   772\u2192\n   773\u2192            Processor processor = createProcessor(output);\n   774\u2192\n   775\u2192            // inject id\n   776\u2192            if (processor instanceof IdAware idAware) {\n   777\u2192                String id = getId(output);\n   778\u2192                idAware.setId(id);\n   779\u2192            }\n   780\u2192            if (processor instanceof RouteIdAware routeIdAware) {\n   781\u2192                routeIdAware.setRouteId(route.getRouteId());\n   782\u2192            }\n   783\u2192\n   784\u2192            if (output instanceof Channel && processor == null) {\n   785\u2192                continue;\n   786\u2192            }\n   787\u2192\n   788\u2192            Processor channel = wrapChannel(processor, output);\n   789\u2192            list.add(channel);\n   790\u2192        }\n   791\u2192\n   792\u2192        // if more than one output wrap than in a composite processor else just\n   793\u2192        // keep it as is\n   794\u2192        Processor processor = null;\n   795\u2192        if (!list.isEmpty()) {\n   796\u2192            if (optimize && list.size() == 1) {\n   797\u2192                processor = list.get(0);\n   798\u2192            } else {\n   799\u2192                processor = createCompositeProcessor(list);\n   800\u2192            }\n   801\u2192        }\n   802\u2192\n   803\u2192        return processor;\n   804\u2192    }\n   805\u2192\n   806\u2192    protected Processor createProcessor(ProcessorDefinition<?> output) throws Exception {\n   807\u2192        // ensure node has id assigned\n   808\u2192        String outputId = output.idOrCreate(camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getContextPlugin(NodeIdFactory.class));\n   809\u2192        StartupStep step = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder().beginStep(ProcessorReifier.class,\n   810\u2192                outputId, \"Create processor\");\n   811\u2192\n   812\u2192        camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().createProcessor(outputId);\n   813\u2192        Processor processor = null;\n   814\u2192        try {\n   815\u2192            // at first use custom factory\n   816\u2192            final ProcessorFactory processorFactory = PluginHelper.getProcessorFactory(camelContext);\n   817\u2192            if (processorFactory != null) {\n   818\u2192                processor = processorFactory.createProcessor(route, output);\n   819\u2192            }\n   820\u2192            // fallback to default implementation if factory did not create the processor\n   821\u2192            if (processor == null) {\n   822\u2192                processor = reifier(route, output).createProcessor();\n   823\u2192            }\n   824\u2192            camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder().endStep(step);\n   825\u2192        } finally {\n   826\u2192            camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().createProcessor(null);\n   827\u2192        }\n   828\u2192        return processor;\n   829\u2192    }\n   830\u2192\n   831\u2192    /**\n   832\u2192     * Creates the processor and wraps it in any necessary interceptors and error handlers\n   833\u2192     */\n   834\u2192    protected Channel makeProcessor() throws Exception {\n   835\u2192        String outputId = definition.idOrCreate(camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getContextPlugin(NodeIdFactory.class));\n   836\u2192        camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().createProcessor(outputId);\n   837\u2192        try {\n   838\u2192            Processor processor = null;\n   839\u2192\n   840\u2192            // allow any custom logic before we create the processor\n   841\u2192            preCreateProcessor();\n   842\u2192\n   843\u2192            // at first use custom factory\n   844\u2192            final ProcessorFactory processorFactory = PluginHelper.getProcessorFactory(camelContext);\n   845\u2192            if (processorFactory != null) {\n   846\u2192                processor = processorFactory.createProcessor(route, definition);\n   847\u2192            }\n   848\u2192            // fallback to default implementation if factory did not create the\n   849\u2192            // processor\n   850\u2192            if (processor == null) {\n   851\u2192                processor = createProcessor();\n   852\u2192            }\n   853\u2192\n   854\u2192            // inject id\n   855\u2192            if (processor instanceof IdAware idAware) {\n   856\u2192                String id = getId(definition);\n   857\u2192                idAware.setId(id);\n   858\u2192            }\n   859\u2192            if (processor instanceof RouteIdAware routeIdAware) {\n   860\u2192                routeIdAware.setRouteId(route.getRouteId());\n   861\u2192            }\n   862\u2192\n   863\u2192            if (processor == null) {\n   864\u2192                // no processor to make\n   865\u2192                return null;\n   866\u2192            }\n   867\u2192            return wrapProcessor(processor);\n   868\u2192        } finally {\n   869\u2192            camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().createProcessor(null);\n   870\u2192        }\n   871\u2192    }\n   872\u2192\n   873\u2192    /**\n   874\u2192     * Strategy to execute any custom logic before the {@link Processor} is created.\n   875\u2192     */\n   876\u2192    protected void preCreateProcessor() {\n   877\u2192        definition.preCreateProcessor();\n   878\u2192    }\n   879\u2192\n   880\u2192    /**\n   881\u2192     * Strategy for children to do any custom configuration\n   882\u2192     *\n   883\u2192     * @param output the child to be added as output to this\n   884\u2192     */\n   885\u2192    public void configureChild(ProcessorDefinition<?> output) {\n   886\u2192        // noop\n   887\u2192    }\n   888\u2192\n   889\u2192    protected String getId(OptionalIdentifiedDefinition<?> def) {\n   890\u2192        String id = def.idOrCreate(camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getContextPlugin(NodeIdFactory.class));\n   891\u2192        id = parseString(id);\n   892\u2192        return id;\n   893\u2192    }\n   894\u2192\n   895\u2192    /**\n   896\u2192     * Will lookup and get the configured {@link AggregationStrategy} from the given definition.\n   897\u2192     * <p/>\n   898\u2192     * This method will lookup for configured aggregation strategy in the following order\n   899\u2192     * <ul>\n   900\u2192     * <li>from the definition if any explicit configured aggregation strategy.</li>\n   901\u2192     * <li>from the {@link org.apache.camel.spi.Registry} if found</li>\n   902\u2192     * <li>if none found, then <tt>null</tt> is returned.</li>\n   903\u2192     * </ul>\n   904\u2192     * The various {@link AggregationStrategyAwareDefinition} should use this helper method to ensure they support\n   905\u2192     * configured executor services in the same coherent way.\n   906\u2192     *\n   907\u2192     * @param  definition               the node definition which may leverage aggregation strategy\n   908\u2192     * @throws IllegalArgumentException is thrown if lookup of aggregation strategy in\n   909\u2192     *                                  {@link org.apache.camel.spi.Registry} was not found\n   910\u2192     */\n   911\u2192    public AggregationStrategy getConfiguredAggregationStrategy(AggregationStrategyAwareDefinition<?> definition) {\n   912\u2192        AggregationStrategy strategy = definition.getAggregationStrategyBean();\n   913\u2192        if (strategy == null && definition.getAggregationStrategyRef() != null) {\n   914\u2192            Object aggStrategy = lookupByName(definition.getAggregationStrategyRef());\n   915\u2192            if (aggStrategy instanceof AggregationStrategy aggregationStrategy) {\n   916\u2192                strategy = aggregationStrategy;\n   917\u2192            } else if (aggStrategy instanceof BiFunction biFunction) {\n   918\u2192                AggregationStrategyBiFunctionAdapter adapter\n   919\u2192                        = new AggregationStrategyBiFunctionAdapter(biFunction);\n   920\u2192                if (definition.getAggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull() != null) {\n   921\u2192                    adapter.setAllowNullNewExchange(parseBoolean(definition.getAggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull(), false));\n   922\u2192                    adapter.setAllowNullOldExchange(parseBoolean(definition.getAggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull(), false));\n   923\u2192                }\n   924\u2192                strategy = adapter;\n   925\u2192            } else if (aggStrategy != null) {\n   926\u2192                @SuppressWarnings(\"resource\")\n   927\u2192                // NOTE: the adapter holds no leaking resources, so we can safely ignore its closure.\n   928\u2192                AggregationStrategyBeanAdapter adapter\n   929\u2192                        = new AggregationStrategyBeanAdapter(aggStrategy, definition.getAggregationStrategyMethodName());\n   930\u2192                if (definition.getAggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull() != null) {\n   931\u2192                    adapter.setAllowNullNewExchange(parseBoolean(definition.getAggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull(), false));\n   932\u2192                    adapter.setAllowNullOldExchange(parseBoolean(definition.getAggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull(), false));\n   933\u2192                }\n   934\u2192                strategy = adapter;\n   935\u2192            } else {\n   936\u2192                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\n   937\u2192                        \"Cannot find AggregationStrategy in Registry with name: \" + definition.getAggregationStrategyRef());\n   938\u2192            }\n   939\u2192        }\n   940\u2192\n   941\u2192        CamelContextAware.trySetCamelContext(strategy, camelContext);\n   942\u2192        return strategy;\n   943\u2192    }\n   944\u2192\n   945\u2192    /**\n   946\u2192     * Is the given node marked as disabled\n   947\u2192     */\n   948\u2192    public static boolean isDisabled(CamelContext camelContext, NamedNode definition) {\n   949\u2192        Boolean disabled = null;\n   950\u2192        if (definition instanceof DisabledAwareDefinition def) {\n   951\u2192            disabled = CamelContextHelper.parseBoolean(camelContext, def.getDisabled());\n   952\u2192        }\n   953\u2192        if (disabled == null) {\n   954\u2192            String sn = definition.getShortName();\n   955\u2192            if (\"process\".equals(sn) || \"bean\".equals(sn)) {\n   956\u2192                disabled = \"true\"\n   957\u2192                        .equalsIgnoreCase(camelContext.getGlobalOption(DISABLE_BEAN_OR_PROCESS_PROCESSORS));\n   958\u2192            }\n   959\u2192        }\n   960\u2192        if (disabled == null) {\n   961\u2192            disabled = \"true\".equalsIgnoreCase(camelContext.getGlobalOption(DISABLE_ALL_PROCESSORS));\n   962\u2192        }\n   963\u2192        return disabled;\n   964\u2192    }\n   965\u2192\n   966\u2192}\n   967\u2192"

You may obtain a copy of the License at\n     8\u2192 *\n     9\u2192 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n    10\u2192 *\n    11\u2192 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n    12\u2192 * distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n    13\u2192 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n    14\u2192 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n    15\u2192 * limitations under the License.\n    16\u2192 */\n    17\u2192package org.apache.camel.reifier;\n    18\u2192\n    19\u2192import org.apache.camel.DisabledAware;\n    20\u2192import org.apache.camel.Processor;\n    21\u2192import org.apache.camel.Route;\n    22\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.PipelineDefinition;\n    23\u2192import org.apache.camel.model.ProcessorDefinition;\n    24\u2192\n    25\u2192public class PipelineReifier extends ProcessorReifier<PipelineDefinition> {\n    26\u2192\n    27\u2192    public PipelineReifier(Route route, ProcessorDefinition<?> definition) {\n    28\u2192        super(route, PipelineDefinition.class.cast(definition));\n    29\u2192    }\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192    @Override\n    32\u2192    public Processor createProcessor() throws Exception {\n    33\u2192        Processor answer = this.createChildProcessor(true);\n    34\u2192        if (answer instanceof DisabledAware da) {\n    35\u2192            da.setDisabled(isDisabled(camelContext, definition));\n    36\u2192        }\n    37\u2192        return answer;\n    38\u2192    }\n    39\u2192}\n    40\u2192"

org.apache.camel.spi.RouteError;\n    31\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.RoutePolicy;\n    32\u2192\n    33\u2192/**\n    34\u2192 * A <a href=\"http://camel.apache.org/routes.html\">Route</a> 37\u2192 * Use the API from {@link org.apache.camel.CamelContext} to control the lifecycle of a route, such as starting and\n    38\u2192 * stopping using the {@link org.apache.camel.spi.RouteController#startRoute(String)} and\n    39\u2192 * {@link org.apache.camel.spi.RouteController#stopRoute(String)} methods.\n    40\u2192 */\n    41\u2192public interface Route extends RuntimeConfiguration {\n    42\u2192\n    43\u2192    String ID_PROPERTY = \"id\";\n    44\u2192    String CUSTOM_ID_PROPERTY = \"customId\";\n    45\u2192    String PARENT_PROPERTY = \"parent\";\n    46\u2192    String GROUP_PROPERTY = \"group\";\n    47\u2192    String NODE_PREFIX_ID_PROPERTY = \"nodePrefixId\";\n    48\u2192    String REST_PROPERTY = \"rest\";\n    49\u2192    String TEMPLATE_PROPERTY = \"template\";\n    50\u2192    String KAMELET_PROPERTY = \"kamelet\";\n    51\u2192    String DESCRIPTION_PROPERTY = \"description\";\n    52\u2192    String NOTE_PROPERTY = \"note\";\n    53\u2192    String CONFIGURATION_ID_PROPERTY = \"configurationId\";\n    54\u2192    String SUPERVISED = \"supervised\";\n    55\u2192\n    56\u2192    /**\n    57\u2192     * Gets the route id\n    58\u2192     *\n    59\u2192     * @return the route id\n    60\u2192     */\n    61\u2192    String getId();\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192    /**\n    64\u2192     * Gets the node prefix id\n    65\u2192     */\n    66\u2192    String getNodePrefixId();\n    67\u2192\n    68\u2192    /**\n    69\u2192     * Whether the route id is custom assigned or auto assigned\n    70\u2192     *\n    71\u2192     * @return true if custom id, false if auto assigned id\n    72\u2192     */\n    73\u2192    boolean isCustomId();\n    74\u2192\n    75\u2192    /**\n    76\u2192     * Whether this route is a Rest DSL route.\n    77\u2192     */\n    78\u2192    boolean isCreatedByRestDsl();\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192    /**\n    81\u2192     * Whether this route was created from a route template (or a Kamelet).\n    82\u2192     */\n    83\u2192    boolean isCreatedByRouteTemplate();\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192    /**\n    86\u2192     * Whether this route was created from a Kamelet.\n    87\u2192     */\n    88\u2192    boolean isCreatedByKamelet();\n    89\u2192\n    90\u2192    /**\n    91\u2192     * Gets the route group\n    92\u2192     *\n    93\u2192     * @return the route group\n    94\u2192     */\n    95\u2192    String getGroup();\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192    /**\n    98\u2192     * Gets the uptime in a human-readable format\n    99\u2192     *\n   100\u2192     * @return the uptime in days/hours/minutes\n   101\u2192     */\n   102\u2192    String getUptime();\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192    /**\n   105\u2192     * Gets the uptime in milliseconds\n   106\u2192     *\n   107\u2192     * @return the uptime in milliseconds\n   108\u2192     */\n   109\u2192    long getUptimeMillis();\n   110\u2192\n   111\u2192    /**\n   112\u2192     * Gets the inbound {@link Consumer}\n   113\u2192     *\n   114\u2192     * @return the inbound consumer\n   115\u2192     */\n   116\u2192    Consumer getConsumer();\n   117\u2192\n   118\u2192 125\u2192    /**\n   126\u2192     * Sets the {@link Processor}\n   127\u2192     */\n   128\u2192    void setProcessor(Processor processor);\n   129\u2192\n   130\u2192    /**\n   131\u2192     * Whether or not the route supports suspension (suspend and resume)\n   132\u2192     *\n   133\u2192     * @return <tt>true</tt> if this route supports suspension\n   134\u2192     */\n   135\u2192    boolean supportsSuspension();\n   136\u2192\n   137\u2192    /**\n   138\u2192     * This property map is used to associate information about the route.\n   139\u2192     *\n   140\u2192     * @return properties\n   141\u2192     */\n   142\u2192    Map<String, Object> getProperties();\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192    /**\n   145\u2192     * Gets the route description (if any has been configured).\n   146\u2192     * <p/>\n   147\u2192     * The description is configured using the {@link #DESCRIPTION_PROPERTY} as key in the {@link #getProperties()}.\n   148\u2192     *\n   149\u2192     * @return the description, or <tt>null</tt> if no description has been configured.\n   150\u2192     */\n   151\u2192    String getDescription();\n   152\u2192\n   153\u2192    /**\n   154\u2192     * Gets the route note (if any has been configured).\n   155\u2192     * <p/>\n   156\u2192     * The note is configured using the {@link #NOTE_PROPERTY} as key in the {@link #getProperties()}.\n   157\u2192     *\n   158\u2192     * @return the note, or <tt>null</tt> if no note has been configured.\n   159\u2192     */\n   160\u2192    String getNote();\n   161\u2192\n   162\u2192    /**\n   163\u2192     * Gets the route configuration id(s) the route has been applied with. Multiple ids is separated by comma.\n   164\u2192     * <p/>\n   165\u2192     * The configuration ids is configured using the {@link #CONFIGURATION_ID_PROPERTY} as key in the\n   166\u2192     * {@link #getProperties()}.\n   167\u2192     *\n   168\u2192     * @return the configuration, or <tt>null</tt> if no configuration has been configured.\n   169\u2192     */\n   170\u2192    String getConfigurationId();\n   171\u2192\n   172\u2192    /**\n   173\u2192     * Gets the source resource that this route is located from\n   174\u2192     *\n   175\u2192     * @return the source, or null if this route is not loaded from a resource\n   176\u2192     */\n   177\u2192    Resource getSourceResource();\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192    /**\n   180\u2192     * The source:line-number where the route input is located in the source code\n   181\u2192     */\n   182\u2192    String getSourceLocation();\n   183\u2192\n   184\u2192    /**\n   185\u2192     * The source:line-number in short format that can be used for logging or summary purposes.\n   186\u2192     */\n   187\u2192    String getSourceLocationShort();\n   188\u2192\n   189\u2192    /**\n   190\u2192     * Gets the camel context\n   191\u2192     *\n   192\u2192     * @return the camel context\n   193\u2192     */\n   194\u2192    CamelContext getCamelContext();\n   195\u2192\n   196\u2192    /**\n   197\u2192     * Gets the input endpoint for this route.\n   198\u2192     *\n   199\u2192     * @return the endpoint\n   200\u2192     */\n   201\u2192    Endpoint getEndpoint();\n   202\u2192\n   203\u2192    /**\n    */\n   208\u2192    void initializeServices() throws Exception;\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192    /**\n   211\u2192     * Returns the services for this particular route\n   212\u2192     *\n 219\u2192     *\n   220\u2192     * @param service the service\n   221\u2192     */\n   222\u2192    void addService(Service service);\n   223\u2192\n   224\u2192    /**\n   225\u2192     * Adds a service to this route\n   226\u2192     *\n   227\u2192     * @param service   the service\n   228\u2192     * @param forceStop whether to force stopping the service when the route stops\n   229\u2192     */\n   230\u2192    void addService(Service service, boolean forceStop);\n   231\u2192\n   232\u2192    /**\n   233\u2192     * Returns a navigator to navigate this route by navigating all the {@link Processor}s.\n   234\u2192     *\n   235\u2192     * @return a navigator for {@link Processor}.\n   236\u2192     */\n   237\u2192    Navigate<Processor> navigate();\n   238\u2192\n   239\u2192    /**\n   240\u2192     * Returns a list of all the {@link Processor}s from this route that has id's matching the pattern\n   241\u2192     *\n   242\u2192     * @param  pattern the pattern to match by ids\n   243\u2192     * @return         a list of {@link Processor}, is never <tt>null</tt>.\n   244\u2192     */\n   245\u2192    List<Processor> filter(String pattern);\n   246\u2192\n   247\u2192    /**\n   248\u2192     * Callback preparing the route to be started, by warming up the route.\n   249\u2192     */\n   250\u2192    void warmUp();\n   251\u2192\n   252\u2192    /**\n   253\u2192     * Gets the last error that happened during changing the route lifecycle, i.e. such as when an exception was thrown\n   254\u2192     * during starting the route.\n   255\u2192     * <p/>\n   256\u2192     * This is only errors for route lifecycle changes, it is not exceptions thrown during routing exchanges by the\n   257\u2192     * Camel routing engine.\n   258\u2192     *\n   259\u2192     * @return the error or <tt>null</tt> if no error\n   260\u2192     */\n   261\u2192    RouteError getLastError();\n   262\u2192\n   263\u2192    /**\n   264\u2192     * Sets the last only errors for route lifecycle changes, it is not exceptions thrown during routing exchanges by the\n   268\u2192     * Camel routing engine.\n   269\u2192     *\n   270\u2192     * @param error the created.\n   337\u2192     */\n   338\u2192    NamedNode getRoute();\n   339\u2192\n   340\u2192    /**\n   341\u2192     * Clears the route model when its no longer needed.\n   342\u2192     */\n   343\u2192    void clearRouteModel();\n   344\u2192\n   345\u2192    //\n   346\u2192    // CREATION TIME\n   347\u2192    //\n   348\u2192\n   349\u2192    /**\n   350\u2192     * This method retrieves the event driven Processors on this route context.\n   351\u2192     */\n   352\u2192    List<Processor> getEventDrivenProcessors();\n   353\u2192\n   354\u2192    /**\n   355\u2192     * getInterceptStrategies();\n   360\u2192\n   361\u2192    /**\n   362\u2192     * Sets a special intercept strategy for management.\n   363\u2192     * <p/>\n   364\u2192     * Is by default used to correlate managed performance counters with processors when the runtime route is being\n   365\u2192     * constructed\n   366\u2192     *\n   367\u2192     * @param interceptStrategy the managed intercept strategy\n   368\u2192     */\n   369\u2192    void setManagementInterceptStrategy(ManagementInterceptStrategy interceptStrategy);\n   370\u2192\n   371\u2192    /**\n   372\u2192     * Gets the special managed intercept strategy if any\n   373\u2192     *\n   374\u2192     * @return the managed intercept strategy, or <tt>null</tt> if not managed\n   375\u2192     */\n   376\u2192    ManagementInterceptStrategy getManagementInterceptStrategy();\n   377\u2192\n   378\u2192    /**\n   379\u2192     * Gets the route policy List\n   380\u2192     *\n   381\u2192     * @return the route policy list if any\n   382\u2192     */\n   383\u2192    List<RoutePolicy> getRoutePolicyList();\n   384\u2192\n   385\u2192    // called at completion time\n   386\u2192    void setErrorHandlerFactory(ErrorHandlerFactory errorHandlerFactory);\n   387\u2192\n   388\u2192    // called at runtime\n   389\u2192    ErrorHandlerFactory getErrorHandlerFactory();\n   390\u2192\n   391\u2192    // called at runtime\n   392\u2192    Collection<Processor> getOnCompletions();\n   393\u2192\n   394\u2192    // called at completion time\n   395\u2192    void setOnCompletion(String onCompletionId, Processor processor);\n   396\u2192\n   397\u2192    // called at runtime\n   398\u2192    Collection<Processor> getOnExceptions();\n   399\u2192\n   400\u2192    // called at Processor processor);\n   405\u2192\n   406\u2192    /**\n   407\u2192     * Adds error handler for the given exception type\n   408\u2192     *\n   409\u2192     * @param factory   the error handler factory\n   410\u2192     * @param exception the exception to handle\n   411\u2192     */\n   412\u2192    void addErrorHandler(ErrorHandlerFactory factory, NamedNode exception);\n   413\u2192\n   414\u2192    /**\n   415\u2192     * Gets the error handlers\n   416\u2192     *\n   417\u2192     * @param factory the error handler factory\n   418\u2192     */\n   419\u2192    Set<NamedNode> getErrorHandlers(ErrorHandlerFactory factory);\n   420\u2192\n   421\u2192    /**\n   422\u2192     * Link the error handlers from a factory to another\n   423\u2192     *\n   424\u2192     * @param 18\u2192\n    19\u2192import java.util.Collection;\n    20\u2192import java.util.Collections;\n    21\u2192import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;\n    22\u2192\n    23\u2192import org.apache.camel.CamelContext;\n    24\u2192import org.apache.camel.LoggingLevel;\n    25\u2192import org.apache.camel.NonManagedService;\n    26\u2192import org.apache.camel.Route;\n
