org.apache.camel.support.service.ServiceSupport;\n    31\u2192\n    32\u2192/**\n    33\u2192 * A default {@link RouteController} that starts the routes in a fail-fast mode, which means if any of the routes fail\n    34\u2192 * to startup then this causes Camel to fail to startup as well.\n    35\u2192 *\n    36\u2192 * @see DefaultSupervisingRouteController\n    37\u2192 */\n    38\u2192public class DefaultRouteController extends ServiceSupport implements RouteController, NonManagedService {\n    39\u2192\n    40\u2192    // mark this as non managed service as its registered specially as a route controller\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192    private CamelContext camelContext;\n    43\u2192\n    44\u2192    private LoggingLevel loggingLevel = LoggingLevel.DEBUG;\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192    public DefaultRouteController() {\n    47\u2192        this(null);\n    48\u2192    }\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192    public DefaultRouteController(CamelContext camelContext) {\n    51\u2192        this.camelContext = camelContext;\n    52\u2192    }\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192    // ***************************************************\n    55\u2192    // Properties\n    56\u2192    // ***************************************************\n    57\u2192\n    58\u2192    @Override\n    59\u2192    public void setCamelContext(CamelContext camelContext) {\n    60\u2192        this.camelContext = camelContext;\n    61\u2192    }\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192    @Override\n    64\u2192    public CamelContext getCamelContext() {\n    65\u2192        return camelContext;\n    66\u2192    }\n    67\u2192\n    68\u2192    @Override\n    69\u2192    public LoggingLevel getLoggingLevel() {\n    70\u2192        return loggingLevel;\n    71\u2192    }\n    72\u2192\n    73\u2192    @Override\n    74\u2192    public void setLoggingLevel(LoggingLevel loggingLevel) {\n    75\u2192        this.loggingLevel = loggingLevel;\n    76\u2192    }\n    77\u2192\n    78\u2192    @Override\n    79\u2192    public boolean isSupervising() {\n    80\u2192        return this instanceof SupervisingRouteController;\n    81\u2192    }\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192    // ***************************************************\n    84\u2192    // Route management\n    85\u2192    // ***************************************************\n    86\u2192\n    87\u2192    protected RouteController getInternalRouteController() {\n    88\u2192        return camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getInternalRouteController();\n    89\u2192    }\n    90\u2192\n    91\u2192    @Override\n    92\u2192    public void startAllRoutes() throws Exception {\n    93\u2192        getInternalRouteController().startAllRoutes();\n    94\u2192    }\n    95\u2192\n void initChannel(\n    36\u2192            Route route,\n    37\u2192            NamedNode definition,\n    38\u2192            NamedNode childDefinition,\n    39\u2192 @return the output to route the {@link Exchange} to\n    70\u2192     */\n    71\u2192    Processor getOutput();\n    72\u2192\n    73\u2192    /**\n    74\u2192     * Gets the next {@link Processor} org.apache.camel.AsyncProcessor;\n    25\u2192import org.apache.camel.CamelContext;\n    26\u2192import org.apache.camel.CamelContextAware;\n    27\u2192import org.apache.camel.Channel;\n    28\u2192import org.apache.camel.Exchange;\n    29\u2192import org.apache.camel.NamedNode;\n    30\u2192import org.apache.camel.NamedRoute;\n    31\u2192import org.apache.camel.Processor;\n    32\u2192import org.apache.camel.Route;\n    33\u2192import org.apache.camel.impl.debugger.BacklogTracer;\n    34\u2192import org.apache.camel.impl.debugger.DefaultBacklogDebugger;\n    35\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.InterceptStrategy;\n    39\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.InterceptableProcessor;\n    40\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.ManagementInterceptStrategy;\n    41\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.MessageHistoryFactory;\n    42\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.Tracer;\n    43\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.WrapAwareProcessor;\n    44\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.OrderedComparator;\n    45\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.PatternHelper;\n    46\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.PluginHelper;\n    47\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.service.ServiceHelper;\n    48\u2192import org.apache.camel.util.StringHelper;\n    49\u2192import org.slf4j.Logger;\n    50\u2192import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\n    51\u2192\n    52\u2192/**\n    53\u2192 * DefaultChannel is the default {@link Channel}.\n    54\u2192 * <p/>\n    55\u2192 * The current implementation is just a composite containing the interceptors and error handler that beforehand was\n    56\u2192 * added to the route graph directly. <br/>\n    57\u2192 * With this {@link Channel} we can in the future implement better strategies for routing the {@link Exchange} in the\n    58\u2192 * route graph, as we have a {@link Channel} between each and every node in the graph.\n    59\u2192 */\n    60\u2192public class DefaultChannel extends CamelInternalProcessor implements Channel {\n    61\u2192\n    62\u2192    private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DefaultChannel.class);\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192    private Processor errorHandler;\n    65\u2192    // the next processor (non wrapped)\n    66\u2192    private Processor nextProcessor;\n    67\u2192    // the real output to invoke that has been wrapped\n    68\u2192    private Processor output;\n    69\u2192    private ManagementInterceptStrategy.InstrumentationProcessor<?> instrumentationProcessor;\n    70\u2192    private Route route;\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192    public DefaultChannel(CamelContext camelContext) {\n    73\u2192        super(camelContext);\n    74\u2192    }\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192    @Override\n    77\u2192    public Processor getOutput() {\n    78\u2192        // the errorHandler is already decorated with interceptors\n    79\u2192        // so it contain the entire chain of processors, so we can safely use it directly as output\n    80\u2192        // if no error handler provided we use the output\n    81\u2192        // the error handlers, interceptors, etc. woven in at design time\n    82\u2192        return errorHandler != null ? errorHandler : output;\n    83\u2192    }\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192    @Override\n    86\u2192    public boolean hasNext() {\n    87\u2192        return nextProcessor != null;\n    88\u2192    }\n    89\u2192\n    90\u2192    @Override\n    91\u2192    public List<Processor> next() {\n    92\u2192        if (!hasNext()) {\n    93\u2192            return null;\n    94\u2192        }\n    95\u2192        List<Processor> answer = new ArrayList<>(1);\n    96\u2192        answer.add(nextProcessor);\n    97\u2192        return answer;\n    98\u2192    }\n    99\u2192\n   100\u2192    public void setOutput(Processor output) {\n   101\u2192        this.output = output;\n   102\u2192    }\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192    @Override\n   105\u2192    public Processor getNextProcessor() {\n   106\u2192        return nextProcessor;\n   107\u2192    }\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192    @Override\n   110\u2192    public void setErrorHandler(Processor errorHandler) {\n   111\u2192        this.errorHandler = errorHandler;\n   112\u2192    }\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192    @Override\n   115\u2192    public Processor getErrorHandler() {\n   116\u2192        return errorHandler;\n   117\u2192    }\n   118\u2192\n   119\u2192    @Override\n   120\u2192    public Route getRoute() {\n   121\u2192        return route;\n   122\u2192    }\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192    @Override\n   125\u2192    protected void doStart() throws Exception {\n   126\u2192        // do not call super as we want to be in control here of the lifecycle\n   127\u2192\n   128\u2192        // the output has now been created, so assign the output as the processor\n   129\u2192        setProcessor(getOutput());\n   130\u2192        ServiceHelper.startService(errorHandler, output);\n   131\u2192    }\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192    @Override\n   134\u2192    protected void doStop() throws Exception {\n   135\u2192        // do not call super as we want to be in control here of the lifecycle\n   136\u2192\n   137\u2192        // only stop services if not context scoped (as context scoped is reused by others)\n   138\u2192        ServiceHelper.stopService(output, errorHandler);\n   139\u2192    }\n   140\u2192\n   141\u2192    @Override\n   142\u2192    protected void doShutdown() throws Exception {\n   143\u2192        // do not call super as we want to be in control here of the lifecycle\n   144\u2192\n   145\u2192        ServiceHelper.stopAndShutdownServices(output, errorHandler);\n   146\u2192    }\n   147\u2192\n   148\u2192    @Override\n   149\u2192    public void initChannel(\n   150\u2192            Route route,\n   151\u2192            NamedNode definition,\n   152\u2192            NamedNode childDefinition,\n   153\u2192            List<InterceptStrategy> interceptors,\n   154\u2192            Processor nextProcessor,\n   155\u2192            NamedRoute routeDefinition,\n   156\u2192            boolean first)\n   157\u2192            throws Exception {\n   158\u2192        this.route = route;\n   159\u2192        this.nextProcessor = nextProcessor;\n   160\u2192\n   161\u2192        // init CamelContextAware as early as possible on nextProcessor\n   162\u2192        CamelContextAware.trySetCamelContext(nextProcessor, camelContext);\n   163\u2192\n   164\u2192        // the definition to wrap should be the fine grained,\n   165\u2192        // so if a child is set then use it, if not then its the original output used\n   166\u2192        NamedNode targetOutputDef = childDefinition != null ? childDefinition : definition;\n   167\u2192        LOG.trace(\"Initialize channel for target: {}\", targetOutputDef);\n   168\u2192\n   169\u2192        // setup instrumentation processor for management (jmx)\n   170\u2192        // this is later used in postInitChannel as we need to setup the error handler later as well\n   171\u2192        ManagementInterceptStrategy managed = route.getManagementInterceptStrategy();\n   172\u2192        if (managed != null) {\n   173\u2192            instrumentationProcessor = managed.createProcessor(targetOutputDef, nextProcessor);\n   174\u2192        }\n   175\u2192\n   176\u2192        // then wrap the output with the tracer and debugger (debugger first,\n   177\u2192        // as we do not want regular tracer to trace the debugger)\n   178\u2192        if (camelContext.isDebugStandby() || route.isDebugging()) {\n   179\u2192            final Debugger customDebugger = camelContext.getDebugger();\n   180\u2192            final MessageHistoryFactory messageHistoryFactory = camelContext.getMessageHistoryFactory();\n   181\u2192            if (customDebugger != null) {\n   182\u2192                // use custom debugger\n   183\u2192                addAdvice(new MessageHistoryAdvice(messageHistoryFactory, targetOutputDef));\n   184\u2192                addAdvice(new DebuggerAdvice(customDebugger, nextProcessor, targetOutputDef));\n   185\u2192            }\n   186\u2192            BacklogDebugger debugger = getBacklogDebugger(camelContext, customDebugger == null);\n   187\u2192            if (debugger != null) {\n   188\u2192                // use backlog debugger\n   189\u2192                if (!camelContext.hasService(debugger)) {\n   190\u2192                    camelContext.addService(debugger);\n   191\u2192                }\n   192\u2192                // skip debugging inside rest-dsl (just a tiny facade) or kamelets / route-templates\n   193\u2192                boolean skip = routeDefinition != null\n   194\u2192                        && (routeDefinition.isCreatedFromRest() || routeDefinition.isCreatedFromTemplate());\n   195\u2192                if (!skip && routeDefinition != null) {\n   196\u2192                    backlogDebuggerSetupInitialBreakpoints(definition, routeDefinition, first, debugger, targetOutputDef);\n   197\u2192                    if (first && debugger.isSingleStepIncludeStartEnd()) {\n   198\u2192                        // debugger captures message history, and we need to capture history of incoming\n   199\u2192                        addAdvice(\n   200\u2192                                new MessageHistoryAdvice(camelContext.getMessageHistoryFactory(), routeDefinition.getInput()));\n   201\u2192                        // add breakpoint on route input instead of first node\n   202\u2192                        addAdvice(new BacklogDebuggerAdvice(debugger, nextProcessor, routeDefinition.getInput()));\n   203\u2192                    }\n   204\u2192                    addAdvice(new MessageHistoryAdvice(messageHistoryFactory, targetOutputDef));\n   205\u2192                    addAdvice(new BacklogDebuggerAdvice(debugger, nextProcessor, targetOutputDef));\n   206\u2192                }\n   207\u2192            }\n   208\u2192        }\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192        if (camelContext.isBacklogTracingStandby() || route.isBacklogTracing()) {\n   211\u2192            // add jmx backlog tracer\n   212\u2192            BacklogTracer backlogTracer = getOrCreateBacklogTracer(camelContext);\n   213\u2192            addAdvice(new BacklogTracerAdvice(camelContext, backlogTracer, targetOutputDef, routeDefinition));\n   214\u2192        }\n   215\u2192        if (route.isTracing() || camelContext.isTracingStandby()) {\n   216\u2192            // add logger tracer\n   217\u2192            Tracer tracer = camelContext.getTracer();\n   218\u2192            addAdvice(new TracingAdvice(camelContext, tracer, targetOutputDef, routeDefinition, first));\n   219\u2192        }\n   220\u2192\n   221\u2192        // debugger will automatically include message history\n   222\u2192        boolean debugging = camelContext.isDebugStandby() || route.isDebugging();\n   223\u2192        if (!debugging && route.isMessageHistory()) {\n   224\u2192            final MessageHistoryFactory messageHistoryFactory = camelContext.getMessageHistoryFactory();\n   225\u2192            // add message history advice (when not debugging)\n   226\u2192            addAdvice(new MessageHistoryAdvice(messageHistoryFactory, targetOutputDef));\n   227\u2192        }\n   228\u2192        // add advice that keeps track of which node is processing\n   229\u2192        addAdvice(new NodeHistoryAdvice(targetOutputDef));\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192        // sort interceptors according to ordered\n   232\u2192        interceptors.sort(OrderedComparator.get());\n   233\u2192        // reverse list so the first will be wrapped last, as it would then be first being invoked\n   234\u2192        Collections.reverse(interceptors);\n   235\u2192        // wrap the output with the configured interceptors\n   236\u2192        Processor target = nextProcessor;\n   237\u2192        boolean skip = target instanceof InterceptableProcessor ip && !ip.canIntercept();\n   238\u2192        if (!skip) {\n   239\u2192            for (InterceptStrategy strategy : interceptors) {\n   240\u2192                Processor next = target == nextProcessor ? null : nextProcessor;\n   241\u2192                // use the fine grained definition (eg the child if available). Its always possible to get back to the parent\n   242\u2192                Processor wrapped\n   243\u2192                        = strategy.wrapProcessorInInterceptors(route.getCamelContext(), targetOutputDef, target, next);\n   244\u2192                if (!(wrapped instanceof AsyncProcessor)) {\n   245\u2192                    LOG.warn(\"Interceptor: {} at: {} does not return an AsyncProcessor instance.\"\n   246\u2192                             + \" This causes the asynchronous routing engine to not work as optimal as possible.\"\n   247\u2192                             + \" See more details at the InterceptStrategy javadoc.\"\n   248\u2192                             + \" Camel will use a bridge to adapt the interceptor to the asynchronous routing engine,\"\n   249\u2192                             + \" but its not the most optimal solution. Please consider changing your interceptor to comply.\",\n   250\u2192                            strategy, definition);\n   251\u2192                }\n   252\u2192                if (!(wrapped instanceof WrapAwareProcessor)) {\n   253\u2192                    // wrap the target so it becomes a service and we can manage its lifecycle\n   254\u2192                    wrapped = PluginHelper.getInternalProcessorFactory(camelContext)\n   255\u2192                            .createWrapProcessor(wrapped, target);\n   256\u2192                }\n   257\u2192                target = wrapped;\n   258\u2192            }\n   259\u2192        }\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192        if (route.isStreamCaching()) {\n   262\u2192            addAdvice(new StreamCachingAdvice(camelContext.getStreamCachingStrategy()));\n   263\u2192        }\n   264\u2192\n   265\u2192        if (route.getDelayer() != null && route.getDelayer() > 0) {\n   266\u2192            addAdvice(new DelayerAdvice(route.getDelayer()));\n   267\u2192        }\n   268\u2192\n   269\u2192        // sets the delegate to our wrapped output\n   270\u2192        output = target;\n   271\u2192    }\n   272\u2192\n   273\u2192    @Override\n   274\u2192    public void postInitChannel() throws Exception {\n   275\u2192        // if jmx was enabled for the processor then either add as advice or wrap and change the processor\n   276\u2192        // on the error handler. See more details in the class javadoc of InstrumentationProcessor\n   277\u2192        if (instrumentationProcessor != null) {\n   278\u2192            boolean redeliveryPossible = false;\n   279\u2192            if (errorHandler instanceof ErrorHandlerRedeliveryCustomizer erh) {\n   280\u2192                redeliveryPossible = erh.determineIfRedeliveryIsEnabled();\n   281\u2192                if (redeliveryPossible) {\n   282\u2192                    // okay we can redeliver then we need to change the output in the error handler\n   283\u2192                    // to use us which we then wrap the call so we can capture before/after for redeliveries as well\n   284\u2192                    Processor currentOutput = erh.getOutput();\n   285\u2192                    instrumentationProcessor.setProcessor(currentOutput);\n   286\u2192                    erh.changeOutput(instrumentationProcessor);\n   287\u2192                }\n   288\u2192            }\n   289\u2192            if (!redeliveryPossible) {\n   290\u2192                // optimise to use advice as we cannot redeliver\n   291\u2192                addAdvice(CamelInternalProcessor.wrap(instrumentationProcessor));\n   292\u2192            }\n   293\u2192        }\n   294\u2192    }\n   295\u2192\n   296\u2192    static BacklogTracer getOrCreateBacklogTracer(CamelContext camelContext) {\n   297\u2192        BacklogTracer tracer = null;\n   298\u2192        if (camelContext.getRegistry() != null) {\n   299\u2192            // lookup in registry\n   300\u2192            Map<String, BacklogTracer> map = camelContext.getRegistry().findByTypeWithName(BacklogTracer.class);\n   301\u2192            if (map.size() == 1) {\n   302\u2192                tracer = map.values().iterator().next();\n   303\u2192            }\n   304\u2192        }\n   305\u2192        if (tracer == null) {\n   306\u2192            tracer = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getContextPlugin(BacklogTracer.class);\n   307\u2192        }\n   308\u2192        if (tracer == null) {\n   309\u2192            tracer = BacklogTracer.createTracer(camelContext);\n   310\u2192            tracer.setEnabled(camelContext.isBacklogTracing() != null && camelContext.isBacklogTracing());\n   311\u2192            tracer.setStandby(camelContext.isBacklogTracingStandby());\n   312\u2192            tracer.setTraceTemplates(camelContext.isBacklogTracingTemplates());\n   313\u2192            tracer.setTraceRests(camelContext.isBacklogTracingRests());\n   314\u2192            camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().addContextPlugin(BacklogTracer.class, tracer);\n   315\u2192        }\n   316\u2192        return tracer;\n   317\u2192    }\n   318\u2192\n   319\u2192    /**\n   320\u2192     * @param  camelContext   the camel context from which the {@link BacklogDebugger} should be found.\n   321\u2192     * @param  createIfAbsent indicates whether a {@link BacklogDebugger} should be created if it cannot be found\n   322\u2192     * @return                the instance of {@link BacklogDebugger} that could be found in the context or that was\n   323\u2192     *                        created if {@code createIfAbsent} is set to {@code true}, {@code null} otherwise.\n   324\u2192     */\n   325\u2192    private static BacklogDebugger getBacklogDebugger(CamelContext camelContext, boolean createIfAbsent) {\n   326\u2192        BacklogDebugger debugger = null;\n   327\u2192        if (camelContext.getRegistry() != null) {\n   328\u2192            // lookup in registry\n   329\u2192            Map<String, BacklogDebugger> map = camelContext.getRegistry().findByTypeWithName(BacklogDebugger.class);\n   330\u2192            if (map.size() == 1) {\n   331\u2192                debugger = map.values().iterator().next();\n   332\u2192            }\n   333\u2192        }\n   334\u2192        if (debugger == null) {\n   335\u2192            debugger = camelContext.hasService(BacklogDebugger.class);\n   336\u2192        }\n   337\u2192        if (debugger == null && createIfAbsent) {\n   338\u2192            // fallback to use the default backlog debugger\n   339\u2192            debugger = DefaultBacklogDebugger.createDebugger(camelContext);\n   340\u2192        }\n   341\u2192        return debugger;\n   342\u2192    }\n   343\u2192\n   344\u2192    private void backlogDebuggerSetupInitialBreakpoints(\n   345\u2192            NamedNode definition, NamedRoute routeDefinition, boolean first,\n   346\u2192            BacklogDebugger debugger, NamedNode targetOutputDef) {\n   347\u2192        // setup initial breakpoints\n   348\u2192        if (debugger.getInitialBreakpoints() != null) {\n   349\u2192            boolean match = false;\n   350\u2192            String id = definition.getId();\n   351\u2192            for (String pattern : debugger.getInitialBreakpoints().split(\",\")) {\n   352\u2192                pattern = pattern.trim();\n   353\u2192                match |= BacklogDebugger.BREAKPOINT_ALL_ROUTES.equals(pattern) && first;\n   354\u2192                if (!match) {\n   355\u2192                    match = PatternHelper.matchPattern(id, pattern);\n   356\u2192                }\n   357\u2192                // eip kind so you can match with (setBody*)\n   358\u2192                if (!match) {\n   359\u2192                    match = PatternHelper.matchPattern(definition.getShortName(), pattern);\n   360\u2192                }\n   361\u2192                // location and line number\n   362\u2192                if (!match && pattern.contains(\":\")) {\n   363\u2192                    // try with line number and location\n   364\u2192                    String pnum = StringHelper.afterLast(pattern, \":\");\n   365\u2192                    if (pnum != null) {\n   366\u2192                        String ploc = StringHelper.beforeLast(pattern, \":\");\n   367\u2192                        String loc = definition.getLocation();\n   368\u2192                        // strip schema\n   369\u2192                        if (loc != null && loc.contains(\":\")) {\n   370\u2192                            loc = StringHelper.after(loc, \":\");\n   371\u2192                        }\n   372\u2192                        String num = String.valueOf(definition.getLineNumber());\n   373\u2192                        if (PatternHelper.matchPattern(loc, ploc) && pnum.equals(num)) {\n   374\u2192                            match = true;\n   375\u2192                        }\n   376\u2192                    }\n   377\u2192                }\n   378\u2192                // line number only\n   379\u2192                if (!match) {\n   380\u2192                    Integer pnum = camelContext.getTypeConverter().tryConvertTo(Integer.class, pattern);\n   381\u2192                    if (pnum != null) {\n   382\u2192                        int num = definition.getLineNumber();\n   383\u2192                        if (num == pnum) {\n   384\u2192                            match = true;\n   385\u2192                        }\n   386\u2192                    }\n   387\u2192                }\n   388\u2192            }\n   389\u2192            if (match) {\n   390\u2192                if (first && debugger.isSingleStepIncludeStartEnd()) {\n   391\u2192                    // we want route to be breakpoint (use input)\n   392\u2192                    id = routeDefinition.getInput().getId();\n   393\u2192                    debugger.addBreakpoint(id);\n   394\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"BacklogDebugger added breakpoint: {}\", id);\n   395\u2192                } else {\n   396\u2192                    // first output should also be breakpoint\n   397\u2192                    id = targetOutputDef.getId();\n   398\u2192                    debugger.addBreakpoint(id);\n   399\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"BacklogDebugger added breakpoint: {}\", id);\n   400\u2192                }"

This factory is\n    32\u2192 * used to have loose coupling between the modules in core.\n    33\u2192 *\n    34\u2192 * Camel end user should NOT use this, but use {@link ProcessorFactory} instead.\n    35\u2192 *\n    36\u2192 * @see ProcessorFactory\n    37\u2192 */\n    38\u2192public interface InternalProcessorFactory {\n    39\u2192\n    40\u2192    /**\n    41\u2192     * Service factory key.\n    42\u2192     */\n    43\u2192    String FACTORY = \"internal-processor-factory\";\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192    InternalProcessor addUnitOfWorkProcessorAdvice(CamelContext camelContext, Processor processor, Route route);\n    46\u2192\n    47\u2192    CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<?> createAggregateBacklogTracerAdvice(CamelContext camelContext, NamedNode definition);\n    48\u2192\n    49\u2192    SharedInternalProcessor createSharedCamelInternalProcessor(CamelContext camelContext);\n    50\u2192\n    51\u2192    Channel createChannel(CamelContext camelContext);\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192    AsyncProducer createInterceptSendToEndpointProcessor(\n    54\u2192            InterceptSendToEndpoint endpoint, Endpoint delegate, AsyncProducer producer, boolean skip, Predicate onWhen);\n    55\u2192\n    56\u2192    AsyncProcessor createWrapProcessor(Processor processor, Processor wrapped);\n    57\u2192\n    58\u2192    AsyncProducer createUnitOfWorkProducer(Producer producer);\n    59\u2192\n    60\u2192    AsyncProducer createAsyncProducer(Endpoint endpoint) throws Exception;\n    61\u2192\n    62\u2192    Producer createProducer(Endpoint endpoint) throws Exception;\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192}\n    65\u2192"

org.apache.camel.CamelContextAware;\n    23\u2192import org.apache.camel.Channel;\n    24\u2192import org.apache.camel.Endpoint;\n    25\u2192import org.apache.camel.NamedNode;\n    26\u2192import org.apache.camel.Predicate;\n    27\u2192import org.apache.camel.Processor;\n    28\u2192import org.apache.camel.Producer;\n    29\u2192import org.apache.camel.Route;\n    30\u2192import org.apache.camel.impl.engine.CamelInternalProcessor;\n    31\u2192import org.apache.camel.impl.engine.DefaultChannel;\n    32\u2192import org.apache.camel.impl.engine.SharedCamelInternalProcessor;\n    33\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.CamelInternalProcessorAdvice;\n    34\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.InterceptSendToEndpoint;\n    35\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.InternalProcessor;\n    36\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.InternalProcessorFactory;\n    37\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.SharedInternalProcessor;\n    38\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.annotations.JdkService;\n    39\u2192\n    40\u2192@JdkService(InternalProcessorFactory.FACTORY)\n    41\u2192public class DefaultInternalProcessorFactory implements InternalProcessorFactory {\n    42\u2192\n    43\u2192    @Override\n    44\u2192    public InternalProcessor addUnitOfWorkProcessorAdvice(CamelContext camelContext, Processor processor, Route route) {\n    45\u2192        CamelInternalProcessor internal = new CamelInternalProcessor(camelContext, processor);\n    46\u2192        internal.addAdvice(new CamelInternalProcessor.UnitOfWorkProcessorAdvice(route, camelContext));\n    47\u2192        return internal;\n    48\u2192    }\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192    @Override\n    51\u2192    public CamelInternalProcessorAdvice<?> createAggregateBacklogTracerAdvice(CamelContext camelContext, NamedNode definition) {\n    52\u2192        return new CamelInternalProcessor.BacklogTracerAggregateAdvice(camelContext, definition);\n    53\u2192    }\n    54\u2192\n    55\u2192    @Override\n    56\u2192 new CamelInternalProcessor.UnitOfWorkProcessorAdvice(null, camelContext));\n    59\u2192    }\n    60\u2192\n    61\u2192    public Channel createChannel(CamelContext camelContext) {\n    62\u2192        return new DefaultChannel(camelContext);\n    63\u2192    }\n    64\u2192\n    65\u2192    @Override\n    66\u2192    public AsyncProducer createInterceptSendToEndpointProcessor(\n    67\u2192            InterceptSendToEndpoint endpoint, Endpoint delegate, AsyncProducer producer, boolean skip, Predicate onWhen) {\n    68\u2192        return new InterceptSendToEndpointProcessor(endpoint, delegate, producer, skip, onWhen);\n    69\u2192    }\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192    @Override\n    72\u2192    public AsyncProcessor createWrapProcessor(Processor processor, Processor wrapped) {\n    73\u2192        return new WrapProcessor(processor, wrapped);\n    74\u2192    }\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192    @Override\n    77\u2192    public AsyncProducer createUnitOfWorkProducer(Producer producer) {\n    78\u2192        return new UnitOfWorkProducer(producer);\n    79\u2192    }\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192    @Override\n    82\u2192    public AsyncProducer createAsyncProducer(Endpoint endpoint) throws Exception {\n    83\u2192        AsyncProducer answer = endpoint.createAsyncProducer();\n    84\u2192        CamelContextAware.trySetCamelContext(answer, endpoint.getCamelContext());\n    85\u2192        // is auto mocked intercepting enabled?\n    86\u2192        if (!endpoint.getCamelContext().getCamelContextExtension().getAutoMockInterceptStrategies().isEmpty()) {\n    87\u2192            answer = new AutoMockInterceptProducer(answer);\n    88\u2192        }\n    89\u2192        return answer;\n    90\u2192    }\n    91\u2192\n    92\u2192    @Override\n    93\u2192    public Producer createProducer(Endpoint endpoint) throws Exception {\n    94\u2192 enabled?\n    97\u2192        if (!endpoint.getCamelContext().getCamelContextExtension().getAutoMockInterceptStrategies().isEmpty()) {\n    98\u2192            answer = new AutoMockInterceptProducer(answer);\n    99\u2192        }\n   100\u2192        return answer;\n   101\u2192    }\n   102\u2192}\n   103\u2192"

85. Task @ -
Input
{
  "description": "Read RoutePipeline and route startup",
  "prompt": "In /workspace, I need to read a few specific files to understand the final wiring of the route. Please read these files thoroughly:\n\n1. `/workspace/core/camel-core-processor/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/processor/RoutePipeline.java` - How does this differ from Pipeline? How does it connect to the route?\n\n2. Find and read the file that implements `DefaultRoute` or the runtime Route object - likely in `core/camel-base-engine/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/impl/engine/DefaultRoute.java`. Particularly focus on:\n   - How the Consumer is created and started\n   - How the processor chain is connected to the consumer\n   - The warmUp() and start() sequence\n\n3. Find the code that actually starts a route - where the Consumer is created from the Endpoint and given the route's processor. This might be in DefaultCamelContext, AbstractCamelContext, or an InternalRouteStartupManager. Search for where `endpoint.createConsumer(processor)` is called during route startup.\n\n4. Also read `/workspace/core/camel-core-processor/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/processor/SendProcessor.java` - this is the processor that sends to a \"to\" endpoint (Producer invocation).\n\nBe thorough - read the full content of each file.",
  "subagent_type": "Explore"
}
Output
{
  "agentId": "a7d896d",
  "content": [
    {
      "text": "Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me create a comprehensive summary document:\n\n## Summary: Complete Route Wiring Flow in Apache Camel\n\nBased on my thorough analysis of the Camel codebase, here's how routes are wired and started:\n\n### 1. **RoutePipeline vs Pipeline: Key Differences**\n\n**File:** `/workspace/core/camel-core-processor/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/processor/RoutePipeline.java`\n\n- **RoutePipeline** (lines 27-33): A marker subclass of Pipeline with only a simple constructor\n- **Pipeline** (lines 45-259 in Pipeline.java): The actual implementation that chains processors\n- **Key difference:** RoutePipeline is a \"starting point for Route\" (line 25 javadoc), used to clearly identify the root of a route's processor chain\n- RoutePipeline extends Pipeline and inherits all its behavior - it processes exchanges through a sequence of processors, passing output of one as input to the next\n\n**Pipeline mechanics:**\n- Converts all processors to AsyncProcessors (line 123)\n- Uses a reactive executor to schedule tasks\n- Processes exchanges through PipelineTask which iterates through processors sequentially\n- Manages pre-out-to-in message conversion between steps (line 96)\n\n### 2. **DefaultRoute: How It Ties Everything Together**\n\n**File:** `/workspace/core/camel-base-engine/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/impl/engine/DefaultRoute.java`\n\n**Key fields:**\n- `endpoint` (line 109): The input endpoint for this route\n- `processor` (line 117): The route processor chain (RoutePipeline at root)\n- `consumer` (line 118): Created from endpoint when services are initialized\n\n**Critical method - gatherRootServices (lines 683-718):**\n```java\nprivate void gatherRootServices(List<Service> services) throws Exception {\n    Endpoint endpoint = getEndpoint();\n    consumer = endpoint.createConsumer(processor);  // LINE 685: Consumer created HERE\n    if (consumer != null) {\n        services.add(consumer);\n        if (consumer instanceof RouteAware routeAware) {\n            routeAware.setRoute(this);\n        }\n        // ... resume strategy setup ...\n    }\n    // ... add other services ...\n}\n```\n\n**Lifecycle:**\n- `warmUp()` (line 262): Empty in DefaultRoute - actual work done elsewhere\n- `doStart()` (line 285): Restarts stopwatch for uptime tracking\n- `doStop()` (line 290): Stops stopwatch\n\n### 3. **RouteService: Orchestrating the Startup Sequence**\n\n**File:** `/workspace/core/camel-base-engine/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/impl/engine/RouteService.java`\n\nThis is the critical orchestrator that manages the full route lifecycle:\n\n**Setup Phase (doSetup, lines 161-199):**\n1. Initializes the endpoint\n2. Calls `route.initializeServices()` which triggers `gatherRootServices()`\n3. At this point, the Consumer is **created** via `endpoint.createConsumer(processor)`\n4. Separates Consumer from other services (line 188)\n5. Initializes all child services but **doesn't start them yet**\n\n**Warmup Phase (doWarmUp, lines 201-237):**\n1. Starts the endpoint (once, reused across routes - line 207-208)\n2. Calls `route.warmUp()` (no-op in DefaultRoute)\n3. Starts all child services (processors, error handlers, etc.)\n4. Notifies lifecycle strategies\n5. Adds route to camel context and inflight registry\n\n**Start Phase (doStart, lines 240-259):**\n1. Calls warmUp() to ensure it's done\n2. Starts the route service itself\n3. Invokes route policy callbacks\n4. Fires route started event\n\n### 4. **InternalRouteStartupManager: Coordinating Route Startup**\n\n**File:** `/workspace/core/camel-base-engine/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/impl/engine/InternalRouteStartupManager.java`\n\nThis manager orchestrates safe, ordered startup of multiple routes:\n\n**Initialization (doInitRoutes, lines 77-101):**\n- Calls `routeService.setUp()` on each route\n\n**Safe startup orchestration (safelyStartRouteServices, lines 174-243):**\n1. **Prepare phase** (line 189): `doPrepareRouteToBeStarted()` - assigns startup order\n2. **Warm up phase** (line 198): `doWarmUpRoutes()` - starts all route services (processors)\n3. **Pre-start listeners** (lines 203-206): Notifies startup listeners that routes are ready\n4. **Consumer start phase** (lines 214-224): `doStartRouteConsumers()` - starts the actual Consumers\n\n**doStartOrResumeRouteConsumers (lines 353-478):**\n- Gets consumer via `routeService.getInput()` (line 379)\n- Validates multiple consumer support (lines 383-406)\n- **Starts the consumer** (line 430): `camelContext.startService(consumer)`\n- This is where the Consumer actually starts listening for messages\n\n### 5. **SendProcessor: Producer Invocation**\n\n**File:** `/workspace/core/camel-core-processor/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/processor/SendProcessor.java`\n\nRepresents a `.to()` endpoint in a route:\n\n**Key behavior:**\n- Holds reference to destination endpoint (line 63)\n- Caches producers for efficient reuse (line 60)\n- On process (lines 124-163):\n  - Preserves existing message exchange pattern\n  - Optionally handles variable substitution\n  - Either uses optimized singleton producer or producer cache\n  - Sends exchange to destination endpoint\n\n**Initialization (doStart, lines 319-337):**\n1. Starts the destination endpoint\n2. If singleton producer: creates and starts it via InternalProcessorFactory\n3. If pooled producer: uses producer cache\n\n### 6. **Route Processor Assembly (RouteReifier)**\n\n**File:** `/workspace/core/camel-core-reifier/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/reifier/RouteReifier.java`\n\nThis builds the complete route structure:\n\n**Key assembly code (lines 252-268):**\n```java\n// Collect all event-driven processors from outputs (all .to() processors)\nList<Processor> eventDrivenProcessors = route.getEventDrivenProcessors();\n\n// Create RoutePipeline as the root processor\nRoutePipeline target = new RoutePipeline(camelContext, eventDrivenProcessors);\ntarget.setRouteId(id);\n\n// Wrap in UnitOfWork for transactional boundaries\nInternalProcessor internal = PluginHelper.getInternalProcessorFactory(camelContext)\n    .addUnitOfWorkProcessorAdvice(camelContext, target, route);\n\n// Set as route's processor\nroute.setProcessor(internal);  // The route now knows its processor\n```\n\nThis creates a hierarchy:\n```\nUnitOfWorkProcessor (outermost)\n    \u2514\u2500\u2500 RoutePipeline (root, also marks route start)\n        \u2514\u2500\u2500 SendProcessor (first .to() endpoint)\n            \u2514\u2500\u2500 SendProcessor (next .to() endpoint)\n            \u2514\u2500\u2500 ... more processors\n```\n\n### 7. **Complete Message Flow During Route Startup**\n\n```\n1. RouteReifier.createRoute()\n   \u2514\u2500\u2500 Creates RoutePipeline from route definition outputs\n   \u2514\u2500\u2500 Wraps in InternalProcessor with UnitOfWork advice\n   \u2514\u2500\u2500 Sets as route.processor\n\n2. InternalRouteStartupManager.doInitRoutes()\n   \u2514\u2500\u2500 Calls RouteService.setUp()\n       \u2514\u2500\u2500 Calls route.initializeServices()\n           \u2514\u2500\u2500 Calls DefaultRoute.gatherRootServices()\n               \u2514\u2500\u2500 Creates Consumer: endpoint.createConsumer(processor)\n                   (processor = the RoutePipeline created above)\n               \u2514\u2500\u2500 Adds Consumer to services list\n\n3. InternalRouteStartupManager.safelyStartRouteServices()\n   a. Warmup routes\n      \u2514\u2500\u2500 RouteService.warmUp()\n          \u2514\u2500\u2500 Starts endpoint\n          \u2514\u2500\u2500 Starts child services (ProcessingGroup, SendProcessors, etc.)\n   \n   b. Notify startup listeners (route ready)\n   \n   c. Start route consumers\n      \u2514\u2500\u2500 RouteService.getInput() returns the Consumer\n      \u2514\u2500\u2500 InternalRouteStartupManager.doStartOrResumeRouteConsumers()\n          \u2514\u2500\u2500 camelContext.startService(consumer)\n              \u2514\u2500\u2500 Consumer starts listening on its endpoint\n              \u2514\u2500\u2500 Consumer will call processor.process(exchange, callback)\n\n4. Message arrives at endpoint\n   \u2514\u2500\u2500 Consumer receives message\n   \u2514\u2500\u2500 Creates/Gets Exchange\n   \u2514\u2500\u2500 Calls: processor.process(exchange, callback)\n       (processor = RoutePipeline)\n       \u2514\u2500\u2500 RoutePipeline processes through each SendProcessor\n           \u2514\u2500\u2500 Each SendProcessor sends to destination via ProducerCache\n           \u2514\u2500\u2500 Results flow back through pipeline\n       \u2514\u2500\u2500 Callback invoked when complete\n```\n\n### 8. **Critical Connection Points**\n\n1. **Consumer \u2190 Processor connection** (DefaultRoute.gatherRootServices line 685):\n   ```java\n   consumer = endpoint.createConsumer(processor);\n   ```\n   The Processor (RoutePipeline) is **passed to the endpoint** which creates a Consumer that will invoke it.\n\n2. **Processor \u2190 Route connection** (RouteReifier line 268):\n   ```java\n   route.setProcessor(internal);\n   ```\n   The route is given its processor chain after wrapping.\n\n3. **Consumer \u2190 Route connection** (DefaultRoute.gatherRootServices lines 688-689):\n   ```java\n   if (consumer instanceof RouteAware routeAware) {\n       routeAware.setRoute(this);\n   }\n   ```\n   Consumer is made aware of which route it belongs to.\n\n4. **Service startup** (RouteService line 217):\n   ```java\n   startChildServices(route, childServices);\n   ```\n   All processors and supporting services are started during warmup.\n\n5. **Consumer startup** (InternalRouteStartupManager line 430):\n   ```java\n   camelContext.startService(consumer);\n   ```\n   Consumer is started last, after all processors are ready.\n\nThis design ensures processors are ready before the Consumer starts consuming messages, preventing race conditions during startup.",
      "type": "text"
    }
  ],
  "prompt": "In /workspace, I need to read a few specific files to understand the final wiring of the route. Please read these files thoroughly:\n\n1. `/workspace/core/camel-core-processor/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/processor/RoutePipeline.java` - How does this differ from Pipeline? How does it connect to the route?\n\n2. Find and read the file that implements `DefaultRoute` or the runtime Route object - likely in `core/camel-base-engine/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/impl/engine/DefaultRoute.java`. Particularly focus on:\n   - How the Consumer is created and started\n   - How the processor chain is connected to the consumer\n   - The warmUp() and start() sequence\n\n3. Find the code that actually starts a route - where the Consumer is created from the Endpoint and given the route's processor. org.apache.camel.spi.Resource;\n    53\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.RouteController;\n    54\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.RouteError;\n    55\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.RouteIdAware;\n    56\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.RoutePolicy;\n    57\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.LoggerHelper;\n    58\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.PatternHelper;\n    59\u2192import 67\u2192 * Default implementation of {@link Route}.\n    68\u2192 * <p/>\n    69\u2192 * Use the API from {@link org.apache.camel.CamelContext} to control the lifecycle of a route, such as starting and\n    70\u2192 * stopping using the {@link org.apache.camel.spi.RouteController#startRoute(String)} and\n    71\u2192 * {@link org.apache.camel.spi.RouteController#stopRoute(String)} methods.\n    72\u2192 */\n    73\u2192public class DefaultRoute extends ServiceSupport implements Route {\n    74\u2192\n    75\u2192    private final CamelContext camelContext;\n    76\u2192    private NamedNode route;\n    77\u2192    private final String routeId;\n    78\u2192    private final String routeDescription;\n    79\u2192    private final String routeNote;\n    80\u2192    private final Resource sourceResource;\n    81\u2192    private final String sourceLocation;\n    82\u2192    private final String sourceLocationShort;\n    83\u2192    private final List<Processor> eventDrivenProcessors = new ArrayList<>();\n    84\u2192    private final List<InterceptStrategy> interceptStrategies = new ArrayList<>(0);\n    85\u2192    private ManagementInterceptStrategy managementInterceptStrategy;\n    86\u2192    private Boolean trace;\n    87\u2192    private Boolean backlogTrace;\n    88\u2192    private Boolean debug;\n    89\u2192    private Boolean messageHistory;\n    90\u2192    private Boolean logMask;\n    91\u2192    private Boolean logExhaustedMessageBody;\n    92\u2192    private Boolean streamCache;\n    93\u2192    private Long delay;\n    94\u2192    private Boolean autoStartup = Boolean.TRUE;\n    95\u2192    private final List<RoutePolicy> routePolicyList = new ArrayList<>();\n    96\u2192    private ShutdownRoute shutdownRoute;\n    97\u2192    private ShutdownRunningTask shutdownRunningTask;\n    98\u2192    private final Map<String, Processor> onCompletions = new HashMap<>();\n    99\u2192    private final Map<String, Processor> onExceptions = new HashMap<>();\n   100\u2192    private ResumeStrategy resumeStrategy;\n   101\u2192    private ConsumerListener<?, ?> consumerListener;\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192    // camel-core-model\n   104\u2192    @Deprecated(since = \"3.17.0\")\n   105\u2192    private ErrorHandlerFactory errorHandlerFactory;\n   106\u2192    // camel-core-model: must be concurrent as error handlers can be mutated concurrently via multicast/recipientlist EIPs\n   107\u2192    private final ConcurrentMap<ErrorHandlerFactory, Set<NamedNode>> errorHandlers = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192    private final Endpoint endpoint;\n   110\u2192    private final Map<String, Object> properties = new HashMap<>();\n   111\u2192    private final List<Service> services = new ArrayList<>();\n   112\u2192    private final List<Service> servicesToStop = new ArrayList<>();\n   113\u2192    private final StopWatch stopWatch = new StopWatch(false);\n   114\u2192    private RouteError routeError;\n   115\u2192    private Integer startupOrder;\n   116\u2192    private RouteController routeController;\n   117\u2192    private Processor processor;\n   118\u2192    private Consumer consumer;\n   119\u2192\n   120\u2192    public DefaultRoute(CamelContext camelContext, NamedNode route, String routeId,\n   121\u2192                        String routeDescription, String routeNote,\n   122\u2192                        Endpoint endpoint, Resource resource) {\n   123\u2192        this.camelContext = camelContext;\n   124\u2192        this.route = route;\n   125\u2192        this.routeId = routeId;\n   126\u2192        this.routeDescription = routeDescription;\n   127\u2192        this.routeNote = routeNote;\n   128\u2192        this.endpoint = endpoint;\n   129\u2192        this.sourceResource = resource;\n   130\u2192        this.sourceLocation = LoggerHelper.getSourceLocation(route);\n   131\u2192        this.sourceLocationShort = LoggerHelper.getLineNumberLoggerName(route);\n   132\u2192    }\n   133\u2192\n   134\u2192    @Override\n   135\u2192    public String getId() {\n   136\u2192        return routeId;\n   137\u2192    }\n   138\u2192\n   139\u2192    @Override\n   140\u2192    public String getNodePrefixId() {\n   141\u2192        return (String) properties.get(Route.NODE_PREFIX_ID_PROPERTY);\n   142\u2192    }\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192    @Override\n   145\u2192    public boolean isCustomId() {\n   146\u2192        return \"true\".equals(properties.get(Route.CUSTOM_ID_PROPERTY));\n   147\u2192    }\n   148\u2192\n   149\u2192    @Override\n   150\u2192    public boolean isCreatedByRestDsl() {\n   151\u2192        return \"true\".equals(properties.get(Route.REST_PROPERTY));\n   152\u2192    }\n   153\u2192\n   154\u2192    @Override\n   155\u2192    public boolean isCreatedByRouteTemplate() {\n   156\u2192        return \"true\".equals(properties.get(Route.TEMPLATE_PROPERTY));\n   157\u2192    }\n   158\u2192\n   159\u2192    @Override\n   160\u2192    public boolean isCreatedByKamelet() {\n   161\u2192        return \"true\".equals(properties.get(Route.KAMELET_PROPERTY));\n   162\u2192    }\n   163\u2192\n   164\u2192    @Override\n   165\u2192    public String getGroup() {\n   166\u2192        return (String) properties.get(Route.GROUP_PROPERTY);\n   167\u2192    }\n   168\u2192\n   169\u2192    @Override\n   170\u2192    public String getUptime() {\n   171\u2192        long delta = getUptimeMillis();\n   172\u2192        if (delta == 0) {\n   173\u2192            return \"\";\n   174\u2192        }\n   175\u2192        return TimeUtils.printDuration(delta);\n   176\u2192    }\n   177\u2192\n   178\u2192    @Override\n   179\u2192    public long getUptimeMillis() {\n   180\u2192        return stopWatch.taken();\n   181\u2192    }\n   182\u2192\n   183\u2192    @Override\n   184\u2192    public Endpoint getEndpoint() {\n   185\u2192        return endpoint;\n   186\u2192    }\n   187\u2192\n   188\u2192    @Override\n   189\u2192    public CamelContext getCamelContext() {\n   190\u2192        return camelContext;\n   191\u2192    }\n   192\u2192\n   193\u2192    @Override\n   194\u2192    public Map<String, Object> getProperties() {\n   195\u2192        return properties;\n   196\u2192    }\n   197\u2192\n   198\u2192    @Override\n   199\u2192    public String getDescription() {\n   200\u2192        Object value = properties.get(Route.DESCRIPTION_PROPERTY);\n   201\u2192        return value != null ? (String) value : null;\n   202\u2192    }\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192    @Override\n   205\u2192    public String getNote() {\n   206\u2192        Object value = properties.get(Route.NOTE_PROPERTY);\n   207\u2192        return value != null ? (String) value : null;\n   208\u2192    }\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192    @Override\n   211\u2192    public String getConfigurationId() {\n   212\u2192        Object value = properties.get(Route.CONFIGURATION_ID_PROPERTY);\n   213\u2192        return value != null ? (String) value : null;\n   214\u2192    }\n   215\u2192\n   216\u2192    @Override\n   217\u2192    public Resource getSourceResource() {\n   218\u2192        return sourceResource;\n   219\u2192    }\n   220\u2192\n   221\u2192    @Override\n   222\u2192    public String getSourceLocation() {\n   223\u2192        return sourceLocation;\n   224\u2192    }\n   225\u2192\n   226\u2192    @Override\n   227\u2192    public String getSourceLocationShort() {\n   228\u2192        return sourceLocationShort;\n   229\u2192    }\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192    @Override\n   232\u2192    public void initializeServices() throws Exception {\n   233\u2192        services.clear();\n   234\u2192        // gather all the services for this route\n   235\u2192        gatherServices(services);\n   236\u2192    }\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192    @Override\n   239\u2192    public List<Service> getServices() {\n   240\u2192        return services;\n   241\u2192    }\n   242\u2192\n   243\u2192    @Override\n   244\u2192    public void addService(Service service) {\n   245\u2192        if (!services.contains(service)) {\n   246\u2192            services.add(service);\n   247\u2192        }\n   248\u2192    }\n   249\u2192\n   250\u2192    @Override\n   251\u2192    public void addService(Service service, boolean forceStop) {\n   252\u2192        if (forceStop) {\n   253\u2192            if (!servicesToStop.contains(service)) {\n   254\u2192                servicesToStop.add(service);\n   255\u2192            }\n   256\u2192        } else {\n   257\u2192            addService(service);\n   258\u2192        }\n   259\u2192    }\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192    @Override\n   262\u2192    public void warmUp() {\n   263\u2192        // noop\n   264\u2192    }\n   265\u2192\n   266\u2192    /**\n   267\u2192     * Do not invoke this method directly, use {@link org.apache.camel.spi.RouteController#startRoute(String)} to start\n   268\u2192     * a route.\n   269\u2192     */\n   270\u2192    @Override\n   271\u2192    public void start() {\n   272\u2192        super.start();\n   273\u2192    }\n   274\u2192\n   275\u2192    /**\n   276\u2192     * Do not invoke this method directly, use {@link org.apache.camel.spi.RouteController#stopRoute(String)} to stop a\n   277\u2192     * route.\n   278\u2192     */\n   279\u2192    @Override\n   280\u2192    public void stop() {\n   281\u2192        super.stop();\n   282\u2192    }\n   283\u2192\n   284\u2192    @Override\n   285\u2192    protected void doStart() throws Exception {\n   286\u2192        stopWatch.restart();\n   287\u2192    }\n   288\u2192\n   289\u2192    @Override\n   290\u2192    protected void doStop() throws Exception {\n   291\u2192        // and clear start date\n   292\u2192        stopWatch.stop();\n   293\u2192    }\n   294\u2192\n   295\u2192    @Override\n   296\u2192    protected void doShutdown() throws Exception {\n   297\u2192        // clear services when shutting down\n   298\u2192        services.clear();\n   299\u2192        // shutdown forced services\n   300\u2192        ServiceHelper.stopAndShutdownService(servicesToStop);\n   301\u2192        servicesToStop.clear();\n   302\u2192    }\n   303\u2192\n   304\u2192    @Override\n   305\u2192    public RouteError getLastError() {\n   306\u2192        return routeError;\n   307\u2192    }\n routeController) {\n   331\u2192        this.routeController = routeController;\n   332\u2192    }\n   333\u2192\n   334\u2192    @Override\n   335\u2192    public Boolean isAutoStartup() {\n else {\n   594\u2192            // fallback to the option from camel context\n   595\u2192            return camelContext.getShutdownRunningTask();\n   596\u2192        }\n   597\u2192    }\n   598\u2192\n   599\u2192    @Override\n   600\u2192    public List<RoutePolicy> getRoutePolicyList() {\n   601\u2192        return routePolicyList;\n   602\u2192    }\n   603\u2192\n   604\u2192    @Override\n   605\u2192    public Collection<Processor> getOnCompletions() {\n   606\u2192        return onCompletions.values();\n   607\u2192    }\n   608\u2192\n   609\u2192    @Override\n   610\u2192    public void setOnCompletion(String onCompletionId, Processor processor) {\n   611\u2192        onCompletions.put(onCompletionId, processor);\n   612\u2192    }\n   613\u2192\n   614\u2192    @Override\n   615\u2192    public Collection<Processor> getOnExceptions() {\n   616\u2192        return onExceptions.values();\n   617\u2192    }\n   618\u2192\n   619\u2192    @Override\n   620\u2192    public Processor getOnException(String onExceptionId) {\n   621\u2192        return onExceptions.get(onExceptionId);\n   622\u2192    }\n   623\u2192\n   624\u2192    @Override\n   625\u2192    public void setOnException(String onExceptionId, Processor processor) {\n   626\u2192        onExceptions.put(onExceptionId, processor);\n   627\u2192    }\n   628\u2192\n   629\u2192    @Override\n   630\u2192    public Set<NamedNode> getErrorHandlers(ErrorHandlerFactory factory) {\n   631\u2192        return errorHandlers.computeIfAbsent(factory, f -> new LinkedHashSet<>());\n   632\u2192    }\n   633\u2192\n   634\u2192    @Override\n   635\u2192    public void addErrorHandler(ErrorHandlerFactory factory, NamedNode onException) {\n   636\u2192        errorHandlers.computeIfAbsent(factory, f -> new LinkedHashSet<>()).add(onException);\n   637\u2192    }\n   638\u2192\n   639\u2192    @Override\n   640\u2192    public void addErrorHandlerFactoryReference(ErrorHandlerFactory source, ErrorHandlerFactory target) {\n   641\u2192        Set<NamedNode> list = errorHandlers.computeIfAbsent(source, f -> new LinkedHashSet<>());\n   642\u2192        Set<NamedNode> previous = errorHandlers.put(target, list);\n   643\u2192        if (list != previous && ObjectHelper.isNotEmpty(previous) && ObjectHelper.isNotEmpty(list)) {\n   644\u2192            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Multiple references with different handlers\");\n   645\u2192        }\n   646\u2192    }\n   647\u2192\n   648\u2192    @Override\n   649\u2192    public String toString() {\n   650\u2192        return \"Route[\" + getEndpoint() + \" -> \" + processor + \"]\";\n   651\u2192    }\n   652\u2192\n   653\u2192    @Override\n   654\u2192    public Processor getProcessor() {\n   655\u2192        return processor;\n   656\u2192    }\n   657\u2192\n   658\u2192    @Override\n   659\u2192    public void setProcessor(Processor processor) {\n   660\u2192        this.processor = processor;\n   661\u2192    }\n   662\u2192\n   663\u2192    /**\n   664\u2192     * Factory method to lazily create the complete list of services required for this route such as adding the\n   665\u2192     * processor or consumer\n   666\u2192     */\n   667\u2192    protected void gatherServices(List<Service> services) throws Exception {\n   668\u2192        // first gather the root services\n   669\u2192        gatherRootServices(services);\n   670\u2192        // and then all the child services\n   671\u2192        List<Service> children = new ArrayList<>();\n   672\u2192        for (Service service : services) {\n   673\u2192            Set<Service> extra = ServiceHelper.getChildServices(service);\n   674\u2192            children.addAll(extra);\n   675\u2192        }\n   676\u2192        for (Service extra : children) {\n   677\u2192            if (!services.contains(extra)) {\n   678\u2192                services.add(extra);\n   679\u2192            }\n   680\u2192        }\n   681\u2192    }\n   682\u2192\n   683\u2192    private void gatherRootServices(List<Service> services) throws Exception {\n   684\u2192        Endpoint endpoint = getEndpoint();\n   685\u2192        consumer = endpoint.createConsumer(processor);\n   686\u2192        if (consumer != null) {\n   687\u2192            services.add(consumer);\n   688\u2192            if (consumer instanceof RouteAware routeAware) {\n   689\u2192                routeAware.setRoute(this);\n   690\u2192            }\n   691\u2192            if (consumer instanceof RouteIdAware routeIdAware) {\n   692\u2192                routeIdAware.setRouteId(this.getId());\n   693\u2192            }\n   694\u2192\n   695\u2192            if (consumer instanceof ResumeAware resumeAware && resumeStrategy != null) {\n   696\u2192                ResumeAdapter resumeAdapter = AdapterHelper.eval(getCamelContext(), resumeAware, resumeStrategy);\n   697\u2192                resumeStrategy.setAdapter(resumeAdapter);\n   698\u2192                resumeAware.setResumeStrategy(resumeStrategy);\n   699\u2192            }\n   700\u2192\n   701\u2192            if (consumer instanceof ConsumerListenerAware consumerListenerAware) {\n   702\u2192                consumerListenerAware.setConsumerListener(consumerListener);\n   703\u2192            }\n   704\u2192        }\n   705\u2192        if (processor instanceof Service service) {\n   706\u2192            services.add(service);\n   707\u2192        }\n   708\u2192        for (Processor p : onCompletions.values()) {\n   709\u2192            if (p instanceof Service service) {\n   710\u2192                services.add(service);\n   711\u2192            }\n   712\u2192        }\n   713\u2192        for (Processor p : onExceptions.values()) {\n   714\u2192            if (p instanceof Service service) {\n   715\u2192                services.add(service);\n   716\u2192            }\n   717\u2192        }\n   718\u2192    }\n   719\u2192\n   720\u2192    @Override\n   721\u2192    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n   722\u2192    public Navigate<Processor> navigate() {\n   723\u2192        Processor answer = getProcessor();\n   724\u2192\n   725\u2192        // we want to navigate routes to be easy, so skip the initial channel\n   726\u2192        // and navigate to its output where it all starts from end user point of view\n   727\u2192        if (answer instanceof Navigate nav) {\n   728\u2192            if (nav.next().size() == 1) {\n   729\u2192                Object first = nav.next().get(0);\n   730\u2192                if (first instanceof Navigate) {\n   731\u2192                    return (Navigate<Processor>) first;\n   732\u2192                }\n   733\u2192            }\n   734\u2192            return (Navigate<Processor>) answer;\n   735\u2192        }\n   736\u2192        return null;\n   737\u2192    }\n   738\u2192\n   739\u2192    @Override\n   740\u2192    public List<Processor> filter(String pattern) {\n   741\u2192        List<Processor> match = new ArrayList<>();\n   742\u2192        doFilter(pattern.split(\",\"), navigate(), match);\n   743\u2192        return match;\n   744\u2192    }\n   745\u2192\n   746\u2192    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n   747\u2192    private void doFilter(String[] patterns, Navigate<Processor> nav, List<Processor> match) {\n   748\u2192        List<Processor> list = nav.next();\n   749\u2192        if (list != null) {\n   750\u2192            for (Processor proc : list) {\n   751\u2192                if (proc instanceof Channel channel) {\n   752\u2192                    proc = channel.getNextProcessor();\n   753\u2192                }\n   754\u2192                String id = null;\n   755\u2192                if (proc instanceof IdAware idAware) {\n   756\u2192                    id = idAware.getId();\n   757\u2192                }\n   758\u2192                if (PatternHelper.matchPatterns(id, patterns)) {\n   759\u2192                    match.add(proc);\n   760\u2192                }\n   761\u2192                if (proc instanceof Navigate) {\n   762\u2192                    Navigate<Processor> child = (Navigate<Processor>) proc;\n   763\u2192                    doFilter(patterns, child, match);\n   764\u2192                }\n   765\u2192            }\n   766\u2192        }\n   767\u2192    }\n   768\u2192\n   769\u2192    @Override\n   770\u2192    public Consumer getConsumer() {\n   771\u2192        return consumer;\n   772\u2192    }\n   773\u2192\n   774\u2192    @Override\n   775\u2192    public boolean supportsSuspension() {\n   776\u2192        return consumer instanceof Suspendable && consumer instanceof SuspendableService;\n   777\u2192    }\n   778\u2192\n   779\u2192    @Override\n   780\u2192 org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\n    47\u2192\n    48\u2192/**\n    49\u2192 * Processor for forwarding exchanges to a static endpoint destination.\n    50\u2192 *\n    51\u2192 * @see SendDynamicProcessor\n    52\u2192 */\n    53\u2192public class SendProcessor extends BaseProcessorSupport implements Traceable, EndpointAware, IdAware, RouteIdAware {\n    54\u2192\n    55\u2192    private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(SendProcessor.class);\n    56\u2192\n    57\u2192    protected transient String traceLabelToString;\n    58\u2192    protected final CamelContext camelContext;\n    59\u2192    protected final ExchangePattern pattern;\n    60\u2192    protected ProducerCache producerCache;\n    61\u2192    protected AsyncProducer producer;\n    62\u2192    protected HeadersMapFactory headersMapFactory;\n    63\u2192    protected final Endpoint destination;\n    64\u2192    protected String variableSend;\n    65\u2192    protected String variableReceive;\n    66\u2192    protected ExchangePattern destinationExchangePattern;\n    67\u2192    protected String id;\n    68\u2192    protected String routeId;\n    69\u2192    protected boolean extendedStatistics;\n    70\u2192    protected final AtomicLong counter = new AtomicLong();\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192    public SendProcessor(Endpoint destination) {\n    73\u2192        this(destination, null);\n    74\u2192    }\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192    public SendProcessor(Endpoint destination, ExchangePattern pattern) {\n    77\u2192        ObjectHelper.notNull(destination, \"destination\");\n    78\u2192        this.destination = destination;\n    79\u2192        this.camelContext = destination.getCamelContext();\n    80\u2192        ObjectHelper.notNull(this.camelContext, \"camelContext\");\n    81\u2192        this.pattern = pattern;\n    82\u2192        this.destinationExchangePattern = null;\n    83\u2192        this.destinationExchangePattern = EndpointHelper.resolveExchangePatternFromUrl(destination.getEndpointUri());\n    84\u2192    }\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192    @Override\n    87\u2192    public String toString() {\n    88\u2192        return destination != null ? destination.toString() : id;\n    89\u2192    }\n    90\u2192\n    91\u2192    @Override\n    92\u2192    public String getId() {\n    93\u2192        return id;\n    94\u2192    }\n    95\u2192\n    96\u2192    @Override\n    97\u2192    public void setId(String id) {\n    98\u2192        this.id = id;\n    99\u2192    }\n   100\u2192\n   101\u2192    public String getRouteId() {\n   102\u2192        return routeId;\n   103\u2192    }\n   104\u2192\n   105\u2192    @Override\n   106\u2192    public void setRouteId(String routeId) {\n   107\u2192        this.routeId = routeId;\n   108\u2192    }\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192    @Override\n   111\u2192    public String getTraceLabel() {\n   112\u2192        if (traceLabelToString == null) {\n   113\u2192            traceLabelToString = URISupport.sanitizeUri(destination.getEndpointUri());\n   114\u2192        }\n   115\u2192        return traceLabelToString;\n   116\u2192    }\n   117\u2192\n   118\u2192    @Override\n   119\u2192    public Endpoint getEndpoint() {\n   120\u2192        return destination;\n   121\u2192    }\n   122\u2192\n   123\u2192    @Override\n   124\u2192    public boolean process(Exchange exchange, final AsyncCallback callback) {\n   125\u2192        if (!isStarted()) {\n   126\u2192            exchange.setException(new IllegalStateException(\"SendProcessor has not been started: \" + this));\n   127\u2192            callback.done(true);\n   128\u2192            return true;\n   129\u2192        }\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192        // we should preserve existing MEP so remember old MEP\n   132\u2192        // if you want to permanently to change the MEP then use .setExchangePattern in the DSL\n   133\u2192        final ExchangePattern existingPattern = exchange.getPattern();\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192        // when using variables then we need to remember original data\n   136\u2192        Object body = null;\n   137\u2192        Map<String, Object> headers = null;\n   138\u2192        if (variableSend != null || variableReceive != null) {\n   139\u2192            try {\n   140\u2192                body = exchange.getMessage().getBody();\n   141\u2192                // do a defensive copy of the headers\n   142\u2192                headers = headersMapFactory.newMap(exchange.getMessage().getHeaders());\n   143\u2192            } catch (Exception throwable) {\n   144\u2192                exchange.setException(throwable);\n   145\u2192                callback.done(true);\n   146\u2192                return true;\n   147\u2192            }\n   148\u2192        }\n   149\u2192        final Object originalBody = body;\n   150\u2192        final Map<String, Object> originalHeaders = headers;\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192        if (extendedStatistics) {\n   153\u2192            counter.incrementAndGet();\n   154\u2192        }\n   155\u2192\n   156\u2192        // if we have a producer then use that as its optimized\n   157\u2192        if (producer != null) {\n   158\u2192            return sendUsingProducer(exchange, callback, existingPattern, originalBody, originalHeaders);\n   159\u2192        } else {\n   160\u2192            // we can send with a different MEP pattern\n   161\u2192            return sendUsingPattern(exchange, callback, existingPattern, originalBody, originalHeaders);\n   162\u2192        }\n   163\u2192    }\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192    private boolean sendUsingPattern(\n   166\u2192            Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback callback, ExchangePattern existingPattern, Object originalBody,\n   167\u2192            Map<String, Object> originalHeaders) {\n   168\u2192        if (destinationExchangePattern != null || pattern != null) {\n   169\u2192            exchange.setPattern(destinationExchangePattern != null ? destinationExchangePattern : pattern);\n   170\u2192        }\n   171\u2192        // set property which endpoint we send to\n   172\u2192        exchange.setProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.TO_ENDPOINT, destination.getEndpointUri());\n   173\u2192\n   174\u2192        // replace message body with variable\n   175\u2192        if (variableSend != null) {\n   176\u2192            Object value = ExchangeHelper.getVariable(exchange, variableSend);\n   177\u2192            exchange.getMessage().setBody(value);\n   178\u2192        }\n   179\u2192\n   180\u2192        LOG.debug(\">>>> {} {}\", destination, exchange);\n   181\u2192\n   182\u2192        // send the exchange to the destination using the producer cache for the non optimized producers\n   183\u2192        return producerCache.doInAsyncProducer(destination, exchange, callback,\n   184\u2192                (producer, ex, cb) -> producer.process(ex, doneSync -> {\n   185\u2192                    // restore previous MEP\n   186\u2192                    exchange.setPattern(existingPattern);\n   187\u2192                    // result should be stored in variable instead of message body/headers\n   188\u2192                    if (ExchangeHelper.shouldSetVariableResult(exchange, variableReceive)) {\n   189\u2192                        ExchangeHelper.setVariableFromMessageBodyAndHeaders(exchange, variableReceive,\n   190\u2192                                exchange.getMessage());\n   191\u2192                        exchange.getMessage().setBody(originalBody);\n   192\u2192                        exchange.getMessage().setHeaders(originalHeaders);\n   193\u2192                    }\n   194\u2192                    // signal we are done\n   195\u2192                    cb.done(doneSync);\n   196\u2192                }));\n   197\u2192    }\n   198\u2192\n   199\u2192    private boolean sendUsingProducer(\n   200\u2192            Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback callback, ExchangePattern existingPattern, Object originalBody,\n   201\u2192            Map<String, Object> originalHeaders) {\n   202\u2192        final Exchange target = exchange;\n   203\u2192        // we can send with a different MEP pattern\n   204\u2192        if (destinationExchangePattern != null || pattern != null) {\n   205\u2192            target.setPattern(destinationExchangePattern != null ? destinationExchangePattern : pattern);\n   206\u2192        }\n   207\u2192        // set property which endpoint we send to\n   208\u2192        exchange.setProperty(ExchangePropertyKey.TO_ENDPOINT, destination.getEndpointUri());\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192        final boolean sending = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().isEventNotificationApplicable()\n   211\u2192                && EventHelper.notifyExchangeSending(exchange.getContext(), target, destination);\n   212\u2192        // record timing for sending the exchange using the producer\n   213\u2192        StopWatch watch;\n   214\u2192        if (sending) {\n   215\u2192            watch = new StopWatch();\n   216\u2192        } else {\n   217\u2192            watch = null;\n   218\u2192        }\n   219\u2192\n   220\u2192        // optimize to only create a new callback if really needed, otherwise we can use the provided callback as-is\n   221\u2192        AsyncCallback ac = callback;\n   222\u2192        boolean newCallback = watch != null || existingPattern != target.getPattern() || variableReceive != null;\n   223\u2192        if (newCallback) {\n   224\u2192            ac = doneSync -> {\n   225\u2192                try {\n   226\u2192                    // result should be stored in variable instead of message body/headers\n   227\u2192                    if (ExchangeHelper.shouldSetVariableResult(target, variableReceive)) {\n   228\u2192                        ExchangeHelper.setVariableFromMessageBodyAndHeaders(target, variableReceive,\n   229\u2192                                target.getMessage());\n   230\u2192                        target.getMessage().setBody(originalBody);\n   231\u2192                        target.getMessage().setHeaders(originalHeaders);\n   232\u2192                    }\n   233\u2192                    // restore previous MEP\n   234\u2192                    target.setPattern(existingPattern);\n   235\u2192                    // emit event that the exchange was sent to the endpoint\n   236\u2192                    if (watch != null) {\n   237\u2192                        long timeTaken = watch.taken();\n   238\u2192                        EventHelper.notifyExchangeSent(target.getContext(), target, destination, timeTaken);\n   239\u2192                    }\n   240\u2192                } finally {\n   241\u2192                    callback.done(doneSync);\n   242\u2192                }\n   243\u2192            };\n   244\u2192        }\n   245\u2192        try {\n   246\u2192            // replace message body with variable\n   247\u2192            if (variableSend != null) {\n   248\u2192                Object value = ExchangeHelper.getVariable(exchange, variableSend);\n   249\u2192                exchange.getMessage().setBody(value);\n   250\u2192            }\n   251\u2192\n   252\u2192            LOG.debug(\">>>> {} {}\", destination, exchange);\n   253\u2192            boolean sync = producer.process(exchange, ac);\n   254\u2192            if (!sync) {\n   255\u2192                EventHelper.notifyExchangeAsyncProcessingStartedEvent(camelContext, exchange);\n   256\u2192            }\n   257\u2192            return sync;\n   258\u2192        } catch (Exception throwable) {\n   259\u2192            exchange.setException(throwable);\n   260\u2192            callback.done(true);\n   261\u2192        }\n   262\u2192\n   263\u2192        return true;\n   264\u2192    }\n   265\u2192\n   266\u2192    public String getVariableSend() {\n   267\u2192        return variableSend;\n   268\u2192    }\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192    public void setVariableSend(String variableSend) {\n   271\u2192        this.variableSend = variableSend;\n   272\u2192    }\n   273\u2192\n   274\u2192    public String getVariableReceive() {\n   275\u2192        return variableReceive;\n   276\u2192    }\n   277\u2192\n   278\u2192    public void setVariableReceive(String variableReceive) {\n   279\u2192        this.variableReceive = variableReceive;\n   280\u2192    }\n   281\u2192\n   282\u2192    public Endpoint getDestination() {\n   283\u2192        return destination;\n   284\u2192    }\n   285\u2192\n   286\u2192    public ExchangePattern getPattern() {\n   287\u2192        return pattern;\n   288\u2192    }\n   289\u2192\n   290\u2192    public long getCounter() {\n   291\u2192        return counter.get();\n   292\u2192    }\n   293\u2192\n   294\u2192    public void reset() {\n   295\u2192        counter.set(0);\n   296\u2192    }\n   297\u2192\n   298\u2192    @Override\n   299\u2192    protected void doInit() throws Exception {\n   300\u2192        // only if JMX is enabled\n   301\u2192        if (camelContext.getManagementStrategy() != null && camelContext.getManagementStrategy().getManagementAgent() != null) {\n   302\u2192            this.extendedStatistics\n   303\u2192                    = camelContext.getManagementStrategy().getManagementAgent().getStatisticsLevel().isExtended();\n   304\u2192        } else {\n   305\u2192            this.extendedStatistics = false;\n   306\u2192        }\n   307\u2192\n   308\u2192        // if the producer is not singleton we need to use a producer cache\n   309\u2192        if (!destination.isSingletonProducer() && producerCache == null) {\n   310\u2192            // use a single producer cache as we need to only hold reference for one destination\n   311\u2192            producerCache = new DefaultProducerCache(this, camelContext, 0);\n   312\u2192            // do not add as service as we do not want to manage the producer cache\n   313\u2192        }\n   314\u2192\n   315\u2192        headersMapFactory = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getHeadersMapFactory();\n   316\u2192    }\n   317\u2192\n   318\u2192    @Override\n   319\u2192    protected void doStart() throws Exception {\n   320\u2192        // warm up the producer by starting it so we can fail fast if there was a problem\n   321\u2192        // however must start endpoint first\n   322\u2192        ServiceHelper.startService(destination);\n   323\u2192\n   324\u2192        // yes we can optimize and use the producer directly for sending\n   325\u2192        if (destination.isSingletonProducer()) {\n   326\u2192            InternalProcessorFactory pf = PluginHelper.getInternalProcessorFactory(camelContext);\n   327\u2192            this.producer = pf.createAsyncProducer(destination);\n   328\u2192            if (this.producer instanceof RouteIdAware ria) {\n   329\u2192                ria.setRouteId(getRouteId());\n   330\u2192            }\n   331\u2192            // ensure the producer is managed and started\n   332\u2192            camelContext.addService(this.producer, true, true);\n   333\u2192        } else {\n   334\u2192            // no we need the producer cache for pooled non-singleton producers\n   335\u2192            ServiceHelper.startService(producerCache);\n   336\u2192        }\n   337\u2192    }\n   338\u2192\n   339\u2192    @Override\n   340\u2192    protected void doStop() throws Exception {\n   341\u2192        // ensure the producer is removed before its stopped\n   342\u2192        if (this.producer != null) {\n   343\u2192            camelContext.removeService(this.producer);\n   344\u2192        }\n   345\u2192        ServiceHelper.stopService(producerCache, producer);\n   346\u2192    }\n   347\u2192\n   348\u2192    @Override\n   349\u2192    protected void doShutdown() throws Exception {\n   350\u2192        ServiceHelper.stopAndShutdownServices(producerCache, producer);\n   351\u2192    }\n   352\u2192}\n   353\u2192"
