org.apache.camel.spi.LifecycleStrategy;\n    42\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.RouteStartupOrder;\n    43\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.OrderedComparator;\n    44\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.service.ServiceHelper;\n    45\u2192import org.apache.camel.util.URISupport;\n    46\u2192import org.slf4j.Logger;\n    47\u2192import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\n    48\u2192\n    49\u2192/**\n    50\u2192 * Internal route startup manager used by {@link AbstractCamelContext} to safely start internal route services during\n    51\u2192 * starting routes.\n    52\u2192 * <p>\n    53\u2192 * This code has been refactored out of {@link AbstractCamelContext} to its own class.\n    54\u2192 */\n    55\u2192final class InternalRouteStartupManager {\n    56\u2192\n    57\u2192    private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(InternalRouteStartupManager.class);\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192    private final Lock lock = new ReentrantLock();\n    60\u2192    private final ThreadLocal<Route> setupRoute = new ThreadLocal<>();\n    61\u2192    private final CamelLogger routeLogger = new CamelLogger(LOG);\n    62\u2192    private int defaultRouteStartupOrder = 1000;\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192    /**\n    65\u2192     * If Camel is currently starting up a route then this returns the route.\n    66\u2192     */\n    67\u2192    public Route getSetupRoute() {\n    68\u2192        return setupRoute.get();\n    69\u2192    }\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192    /**\n    72\u2192     * Initializes the routes\n    73\u2192     *\n    74\u2192     * @param  routeServices the routes to initialize\n    75\u2192     * @throws Exception     is thrown if error initializing routes\n    76\u2192     */\n    77\u2192    public void doInitRoutes(AbstractCamelContext camelContext, Map<String, RouteService> routeServices)\n    78\u2192            throws Exception {\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192        camelContext.setStartingRoutes(true);\n    81\u2192        try {\n    82\u2192            for (RouteService routeService : routeServices.values()) {\n    83\u2192                StartupStep step = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder().beginStep(Route.class,\n    84\u2192                        routeService.getId(),\n    85\u2192                        \"Init Route\");\n    86\u2192                try {\n    87\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"Initializing route id: {}\", routeService.getId());\n    88\u2192                    setupRoute.set(routeService.getRoute());\n    89\u2192                    // initializing route is called doSetup as we do not want to change the service state on the RouteService\n    90\u2192                    // so it can remain as stopped, when Camel is booting as this was the previous behavior - otherwise its state\n    91\u2192                    // would be initialized\n    92\u2192                    routeService.setUp();\n    93\u2192                } finally {\n    94\u2192                    setupRoute.remove();\n    95\u2192                    camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder().endStep(step);\n    96\u2192                }\n    97\u2192            }\n    98\u2192        } finally {\n    99\u2192            camelContext.setStartingRoutes(false);\n   100\u2192        }\n   101\u2192    }\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192    /**\n   104\u2192     * Starts or resumes the routes\n   105\u2192     *\n   106\u2192     * @param  routeServices  the routes to start (will only start a route if its not already started)\n   107\u2192     * @param  checkClash     whether to check for startup ordering clash\n   108\u2192     * @param  startConsumer  whether the route consumer should be started. Can be used to warmup the route without\n   109\u2192     *                        starting the consumer.\n   110\u2192     * @param  resumeConsumer whether the route consumer should be resumed.\n   111\u2192     * @param  addingRoutes   whether we are adding new routes\n   112\u2192     * @throws Exception      is thrown if error starting routes\n   113\u2192     */\n   114\u2192    public void doStartOrResumeRoutes(\n   115\u2192            AbstractCamelContext camelContext,\n   116\u2192            Map<String, RouteService> routeServices, boolean checkClash, boolean startConsumer, boolean resumeConsumer,\n   117\u2192            boolean addingRoutes)\n   118\u2192            throws Exception {\n   119\u2192        camelContext.setStartingRoutes(true);\n   120\u2192        try {\n   121\u2192            // filter out already started routes\n   122\u2192            Map<String, RouteService> filtered = new LinkedHashMap<>();\n   123\u2192            for (Map.Entry<String, RouteService> entry : routeServices.entrySet()) {\n   124\u2192                final boolean startable = isStartable(entry);\n   125\u2192\n   126\u2192                if (startable) {\n   127\u2192                    filtered.put(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue());\n   128\u2192                }\n   129\u2192            }\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192            // the context is in last phase of staring, so lets start the routes\n   132\u2192            safelyStartRouteServices(camelContext, checkClash, startConsumer, resumeConsumer, addingRoutes, filtered.values());\n   133\u2192\n   134\u2192        } finally {\n   135\u2192            camelContext.setStartingRoutes(false);\n   136\u2192        }\n   137\u2192    }\n   138\u2192\n   139\u2192    private static boolean isStartable(Map.Entry<String, RouteService> entry) {\n   140\u2192        boolean startable = false;\n   141\u2192\n   142\u2192        Consumer consumer = entry.getValue().getRoute().getConsumer();\n   143\u2192        if (consumer instanceof SuspendableService suspendableService) {\n   144\u2192            // consumer could be suspended, which is not reflected in\n   145\u2192            // the BaseRouteService status\n   146\u2192            startable = suspendableService.isSuspended();\n   147\u2192        }\n   148\u2192\n   149\u2192        if (!startable && consumer instanceof StatefulService statefulService) {\n   150\u2192            // consumer could be stopped, which is not reflected in the\n   151\u2192            // BaseRouteService status\n   152\u2192            startable = statefulService.getStatus().isStartable();\n   153\u2192        } else if (!startable) {\n   154\u2192            // no consumer so use state from route service\n   155\u2192            startable = entry.getValue().getStatus().isStartable();\n   156\u2192        }\n   157\u2192        return startable;\n   158\u2192    }\n   159\u2192\n   160\u2192    /**\n   161\u2192     * Starts the routes services in a proper manner which ensures the routes will be started in correct order, check\n   162\u2192     * for clash and that the routes will also be shutdown in correct order as well.\n   163\u2192     * <p/>\n   164\u2192     * This method <b>must</b> be used to start routes in a safe manner.\n   165\u2192     *\n   166\u2192     * @param  checkClash     whether to check for startup order clash\n   167\u2192     * @param  startConsumer  whether the route consumer should be started. Can be used to warmup the route without\n   168\u2192     *                        starting the consumer.\n   169\u2192     * @param  resumeConsumer whether the route consumer should be resumed.\n   170\u2192     * @param  addingRoutes   whether we are adding new routes\n   171\u2192     * @param  routeServices  the routes\n   172\u2192     * @throws Exception      is thrown if error starting the routes\n   173\u2192     */\n   174\u2192    private void safelyStartRouteServices(\n   175\u2192            AbstractCamelContext camelContext,\n   176\u2192            boolean checkClash, boolean startConsumer, boolean resumeConsumer, boolean addingRoutes,\n   177\u2192            Collection<RouteService> routeServices)\n   178\u2192            throws Exception {\n   179\u2192        lock.lock();\n   180\u2192        try {\n   181\u2192            // list of inputs to start when all the routes have been prepared for\n   182\u2192            // starting\n   183\u2192            // we use a tree map so the routes will be ordered according to startup\n   184\u2192            // order defined on the route\n   185\u2192            Map<Integer, DefaultRouteStartupOrder> inputs = new TreeMap<>();\n   186\u2192\n   187\u2192            // figure out the order in which the routes should be started\n   188\u2192            for (RouteService routeService : routeServices) {\n   189\u2192                DefaultRouteStartupOrder order = doPrepareRouteToBeStarted(camelContext, routeService);\n   190\u2192                // check for clash before we add it as input\n   191\u2192                if (checkClash) {\n   192\u2192                    doCheckStartupOrderClash(camelContext, order, inputs);\n   193\u2192                }\n   194\u2192                inputs.put(order.getStartupOrder(), order);\n   195\u2192            }\n   196\u2192\n   197\u2192            // warm up routes before we start them\n   198\u2192            doWarmUpRoutes(camelContext, inputs, startConsumer);\n   199\u2192\n   200\u2192            // sort the startup listeners so they are started in the right order\n   201\u2192            camelContext.getStartupListeners().sort(OrderedComparator.get());\n   202\u2192            // now call the startup listeners where the routes has been warmed up\n   203\u2192            // (only the actual route consumer has not yet been started)\n   204\u2192            for (StartupListener startup : camelContext.getStartupListeners()) {\n   205\u2192                startup.onCamelContextStarted(camelContext.getCamelContextReference(), camelContext.isStarted());\n   206\u2192            }\n   207\u2192            // because the consumers may also register startup listeners we need to\n   208\u2192            // reset\n   209\u2192            // the already started listeners\n   210\u2192            List<StartupListener> backup = new ArrayList<>(camelContext.getStartupListeners());\n   211\u2192            camelContext.getStartupListeners().clear();\n   212\u2192\n   213\u2192            // now start the consumers\n   214\u2192            if (startConsumer) {\n   215\u2192                if (resumeConsumer) {\n   216\u2192                    // and now resume the routes\n   217\u2192                    doResumeRouteConsumers(camelContext, inputs, addingRoutes);\n   218\u2192                } else {\n   219\u2192                    // and now start the routes\n   220\u2192                    // and check for clash with multiple consumers of the same\n   221\u2192                    // endpoints which is not allowed\n   222\u2192                    doStartRouteConsumers(camelContext, inputs, addingRoutes);\n   223\u2192                }\n   224\u2192            }\n   225\u2192\n   226\u2192            // sort the startup listeners so they are started in the right order\n   227\u2192            camelContext.getStartupListeners().sort(OrderedComparator.get());\n   228\u2192            // now the consumers that was just started may also add new\n   229\u2192            // StartupListeners (such as timer)\n   230\u2192            // so we need to ensure they get started as well\n   231\u2192            for (StartupListener startup : camelContext.getStartupListeners()) {\n   232\u2192                startup.onCamelContextStarted(camelContext.getCamelContextReference(), camelContext.isStarted());\n   233\u2192            }\n   234\u2192            // and add the previous started startup listeners to the list so we have\n   235\u2192            // them all\n   236\u2192            camelContext.getStartupListeners().addAll(0, backup);\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192            // inputs no longer needed\n   239\u2192            inputs.clear();\n   240\u2192        } finally {\n   241\u2192            lock.unlock();\n   242\u2192        }\n   243\u2192    }\n   244\u2192\n   245\u2192    /**\n   246\u2192     * @see #safelyStartRouteServices(AbstractCamelContext, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, Collection)\n   247\u2192     */\n   248\u2192    public void safelyStartRouteServices(\n   249\u2192            AbstractCamelContext camelContext,\n   250\u2192            boolean forceAutoStart, boolean checkClash, boolean startConsumer, boolean resumeConsumer, boolean addingRoutes,\n   251\u2192            RouteService... routeServices)\n   252\u2192            throws Exception {\n   253\u2192        lock.lock();\n   254\u2192        try {\n   255\u2192            safelyStartRouteServices(camelContext, checkClash, startConsumer, resumeConsumer, addingRoutes,\n   256\u2192                    Arrays.asList(routeServices));\n   257\u2192        } finally {\n   258\u2192            lock.unlock();\n   259\u2192        }\n   260\u2192    }\n   261\u2192\n   262\u2192    DefaultRouteStartupOrder doPrepareRouteToBeStarted(AbstractCamelContext camelContext, RouteService routeService) {\n   263\u2192        // add the inputs from this route service to the list to start\n   264\u2192        // afterwards\n   265\u2192        // should be ordered according to the startup number\n   266\u2192        Integer startupOrder = routeService.getRoute().getStartupOrder();\n   267\u2192        if (startupOrder == null) {\n   268\u2192            // auto assign a default startup order\n   269\u2192            startupOrder = defaultRouteStartupOrder++;\n   270\u2192        }\n   271\u2192\n   272\u2192        // create holder object that contains information about this route to be\n   273\u2192        // started\n   274\u2192        Route route = routeService.getRoute();\n   275\u2192        return new DefaultRouteStartupOrder(startupOrder, route, routeService);\n   276\u2192    }\n   277\u2192\n   278\u2192    boolean doCheckStartupOrderClash(\n   279\u2192            AbstractCamelContext camelContext, DefaultRouteStartupOrder answer, Map<Integer, DefaultRouteStartupOrder> inputs)\n   280\u2192            throws FailedToStartRouteException {\n   281\u2192        // check for clash by startupOrder id\n   282\u2192        DefaultRouteStartupOrder other = inputs.get(answer.getStartupOrder());\n   283\u2192        if (other != null && answer != other) {\n   284\u2192            String otherId = other.getRoute().getId();\n   285\u2192            throw new FailedToStartRouteException(\n   286\u2192                    answer.getRoute().getId(), \"Route startup order clash. Route \" + otherId + \" already has startupOrder \"\n   287\u2192                                               + answer\n   288\u2192                                                       .getStartupOrder()\n   289\u2192                                               + \" configured which this route have as well. Please correct startupOrder to be unique among all your routes.\");\n   290\u2192        }\n   291\u2192        // check in existing already started as well\n   292\u2192        for (RouteStartupOrder order : camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getRouteStartupOrder()) {\n   293\u2192            String otherId = order.getRoute().getId();\n   294\u2192            // skip clash check if it's the same route id, as it's the same\n   295\u2192            // route (can happen when using suspend/resume)\n   296\u2192            if (!answer.getRoute().getId().equals(otherId)\n   297\u2192                    && answer.getStartupOrder() == order.getStartupOrder()) {\n   298\u2192                throw new FailedToStartRouteException(\n   299\u2192                        answer.getRoute().getId(), \"Route startup order clash. Route \" + otherId + \" already has startupOrder \"\n   300\u2192                                                   + answer.getStartupOrder()\n   301\u2192                                                   + \" configured which this route have as well. Please correct startupOrder to be unique among all your routes.\");\n   302\u2192            }\n   303\u2192        }\n   304\u2192        return true;\n   305\u2192    }\n   306\u2192\n   307\u2192    void doWarmUpRoutes(AbstractCamelContext camelContext, Map<Integer, DefaultRouteStartupOrder> inputs, boolean autoStartup)\n   308\u2192            throws FailedToStartRouteException {\n   309\u2192        // now prepare the routes by starting its services before we start the\n   310\u2192        // input\n   311\u2192        for (Map.Entry<Integer, DefaultRouteStartupOrder> entry : inputs.entrySet()) {\n   312\u2192            // defer starting inputs till later as we want to prepare the routes\n   313\u2192            // by starting\n   314\u2192            // all their processors and child services etc.\n   315\u2192            // then later we open the floods to Camel by starting the inputs\n   316\u2192            // what this does is to ensure Camel is more robust on starting\n   317\u2192            // routes as all routes\n   318\u2192            // will then be prepared in time before we start inputs which will\n   319\u2192            // consume messages to be routed\n   320\u2192            RouteService routeService = entry.getValue().getRouteService();\n   321\u2192            StartupStep step = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder().beginStep(Route.class,\n   322\u2192                    routeService.getId(),\n   323\u2192                    \"Warump Route\");\n   324\u2192            try {\n   325\u2192                LOG.debug(\"Warming up route id: {} having autoStartup={}\", routeService.getId(), autoStartup);\n   326\u2192                setupRoute.set(routeService.getRoute());\n   327\u2192                // ensure we setup before warmup\n   328\u2192                routeService.setUp();\n   329\u2192                routeService.warmUp();\n   330\u2192            } finally {\n   331\u2192                setupRoute.remove();\n   332\u2192                camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder().endStep(step);\n   333\u2192            }\n   334\u2192        }\n   335\u2192    }\n   336\u2192\n   337\u2192    void doResumeRouteConsumers(\n   338\u2192            AbstractCamelContext camelContext, Map<Integer, DefaultRouteStartupOrder> inputs, boolean addingRoutes)\n   339\u2192            throws Exception {\n   340\u2192        doStartOrResumeRouteConsumers(camelContext, inputs, true, addingRoutes);\n   341\u2192    }\n   342\u2192\n   343\u2192    void doStartRouteConsumers(\n   344\u2192            AbstractCamelContext camelContext, Map<Integer, DefaultRouteStartupOrder> inputs, boolean addingRoutes)\n   345\u2192            throws Exception {\n   346\u2192        doStartOrResumeRouteConsumers(camelContext, inputs, false, addingRoutes);\n   347\u2192    }\n   348\u2192\n   349\u2192    private LoggingLevel getRouteLoggerLogLevel(AbstractCamelContext camelContext) {\n   350\u2192        return camelContext.getRouteController().getLoggingLevel();\n   351\u2192    }\n   352\u2192\n   353\u2192    private void doStartOrResumeRouteConsumers(\n   354\u2192            AbstractCamelContext camelContext,\n   355\u2192            Map<Integer, DefaultRouteStartupOrder> inputs, boolean resumeOnly, boolean addingRoute)\n   356\u2192            throws Exception {\n   357\u2192        List<Endpoint> routeInputs = new ArrayList<>();\n   358\u2192\n   359\u2192        for (Map.Entry<Integer, DefaultRouteStartupOrder> entry : inputs.entrySet()) {\n   360\u2192            Integer order = entry.getKey();\n   361\u2192            Route route = entry.getValue().getRoute();\n   362\u2192            RouteService routeService = entry.getValue().getRouteService();\n   363\u2192\n   364\u2192            // if we are starting camel, then skip routes which are configured\n   365\u2192            // to not be auto started\n   366\u2192            boolean autoStartup = routeService.isAutoStartup();\n   367\u2192            if (addingRoute && !autoStartup) {\n   368\u2192                routeLogger.log(\n   369\u2192                        \"Skipping starting of route \" + routeService.getId() + \" as it's configured with autoStartup=false\",\n   370\u2192                        getRouteLoggerLogLevel(camelContext));\n   371\u2192                continue;\n   372\u2192            }\n   373\u2192\n   374\u2192            StartupStep step = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder().beginStep(Route.class,\n   375\u2192                    route.getRouteId(),\n   376\u2192                    \"Start Route\");\n   377\u2192\n   378\u2192            // do some preparation before starting the consumer on the route\n   379\u2192            Consumer consumer = routeService.getInput();\n   380\u2192            if (consumer != null) {\n   381\u2192                Endpoint endpoint = consumer.getEndpoint();\n   382\u2192\n   383\u2192                // check multiple consumer violation, with the other routes to be started\n   384\u2192                if (!doCheckMultipleConsumerSupportClash(endpoint, routeInputs)) {\n   385\u2192                    throw new FailedToStartRouteException(\n   386\u2192                            routeService.getId(), \"Multiple consumers for the same endpoint is not allowed: \" + endpoint);\n   387\u2192                }\n   388\u2192\n   389\u2192                // check for multiple consumer violations with existing routes\n   390\u2192                // which have already been started, or is currently starting\n   391\u2192                List<Endpoint> existingEndpoints = new ArrayList<>();\n   392\u2192                for (Route existingRoute : camelContext.getRoutes()) {\n   393\u2192                    if (route.getId().equals(existingRoute.getId())) {\n   394\u2192                        // skip ourselves\n   395\u2192                        continue;\n   396\u2192                    }\n   397\u2192                    Endpoint existing = existingRoute.getEndpoint();\n   398\u2192                    ServiceStatus status = camelContext.getRouteStatus(existingRoute.getId());\n   399\u2192                    if (status != null && (status.isStarted() || status.isStarting())) {\n   400\u2192                        existingEndpoints.add(existing);\n   401\u2192                    }\n   402\u2192                }\n   403\u2192                if (!doCheckMultipleConsumerSupportClash(endpoint, existingEndpoints)) {\n   404\u2192                    throw new FailedToStartRouteException(\n   405\u2192                            routeService.getId(), \"Multiple consumers for the same endpoint is not allowed: \" + endpoint);\n   406\u2192                }\n   407\u2192\n   408\u2192                // start the consumer on the route\n   409\u2192                LOG.debug(\"Route: {} >>> {}\", route.getId(), route);\n   410\u2192                if (resumeOnly) {\n   411\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"Resuming consumer (order: {}) on route: {}\", order, route.getId());\n   412\u2192                } else {\n   413\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"Starting consumer (order: {}) on route: {}\", order, route.getId());\n   414\u2192                }\n   415\u2192\n   416\u2192                if (resumeOnly && route.supportsSuspension()) {\n   417\u2192                    // if we are resuming and the route can be resumed\n   418\u2192                    ServiceHelper.resumeService(consumer);\n   419\u2192                    // use basic endpoint uri to not log verbose details or potential sensitive data\n   420\u2192                    String uri = endpoint.getEndpointBaseUri();\n   421\u2192                    uri = URISupport.sanitizeUri(uri);\n   422\u2192                    routeLogger.log(\"Route: \" + route.getId() + \" resumed and consuming from: \" + uri,\n   423\u2192                            getRouteLoggerLogLevel(camelContext));\n   424\u2192                } else {\n   425\u2192                    // when starting we should invoke the lifecycle strategies\n   426\u2192                    for (LifecycleStrategy strategy : camelContext.getLifecycleStrategies()) {\n   427\u2192                        strategy.onServiceAdd(camelContext.getCamelContextReference(), consumer, route);\n   428\u2192                    }\n   429\u2192                    try {\n   430\u2192                        camelContext.startService(consumer);\n   431\u2192                        route.getProperties().remove(\"route.start.exception\");\n   432\u2192                    } catch (Exception e) {\n   433\u2192                        route.getProperties().put(\"route.start.exception\", e);\n   434\u2192                        throw e;\n   435\u2192                    }\n   436\u2192\n   437\u2192                    // use basic endpoint uri to not log verbose details or potential sensitive data\n   438\u2192                    String uri = endpoint.getEndpointBaseUri();\n   439\u2192                    uri = URISupport.sanitizeUri(uri);\n   440\u2192                    routeLogger.log(\"Route: \" + route.getId() + \" started and consuming from: \" + uri,\n   441\u2192                            getRouteLoggerLogLevel(camelContext));\n   442\u2192                }\n   443\u2192\n   444\u2192                routeInputs.add(endpoint);\n   445\u2192\n   446\u2192                // add to the order which they was started, so we know how to\n   447\u2192                // stop them in reverse order\n   448\u2192                // but only add if we haven't already registered it before (we\n   449\u2192                // dont want to double add when restarting)\n   450\u2192                boolean found = false;\n   451\u2192                for (RouteStartupOrder other : camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getRouteStartupOrder()) {\n   452\u2192                    if (other.getRoute().getId().equals(route.getId())) {\n   453\u2192                        found = true;\n   454\u2192                        break;\n   455\u2192                    }\n   456\u2192                }\n   457\u2192                if (!found) {\n   458\u2192                    camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getRouteStartupOrder().add(entry.getValue());\n   459\u2192                }\n   460\u2192            }\n   461\u2192\n   462\u2192            if (resumeOnly) {\n   463\u2192                routeService.resume();\n   464\u2192            } else {\n   465\u2192                // and start the route service (no need to start children as\n   466\u2192                // they are already warmed up)\n   467\u2192                try {\n   468\u2192                    routeService.start();\n   469\u2192                    route.getProperties().remove(\"route.start.exception\");\n   470\u2192                } catch (Exception e) {\n   471\u2192                    route.getProperties().put(\"route.start.exception\", e);\n   472\u2192                    throw e;\n   473\u2192                }\n   474\u2192            }\n   475\u2192\n   476\u2192            camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder().endStep(step);\n   477\u2192        }\n   478\u2192    }\n   479\u2192\n   480\u2192    private boolean doCheckMultipleConsumerSupportClash(Endpoint endpoint, List<Endpoint> routeInputs) {\n   481\u2192        // is multiple consumers supported\n   482\u2192        boolean multipleConsumersSupported = false;\n   483\u2192        if (endpoint instanceof MultipleConsumersSupport consumersSupport) {\n   484\u2192            multipleConsumersSupported = consumersSupport.isMultipleConsumersSupported();\n   485\u2192        }\n   486\u2192\n   487\u2192        if (multipleConsumersSupported) {\n   488\u2192            // multiple consumer allowed, so return true\n   489\u2192            return true;\n   490\u2192        }\n   491\u2192\n   492\u2192        // check in progress list\n   493\u2192        if (routeInputs.contains(endpoint)) {\n   494\u2192            return false;\n   495\u2192        }\n   496\u2192\n   497\u2192        return true;\n   498\u2192    }\n   499\u2192\n   500\u2192    int incrementRouteStartupOrder() {\n   501\u2192        return defaultRouteStartupOrder++;\n   502\u2192    }\n   503\u2192\n   504\u2192}\n   505\u2192"

used internally by {@link AbstractCamelContext}.\n    32\u2192 */\n    33\u2192class InternalRouteController implements RouteController {\n    34\u2192\n    35\u2192    private final AbstractCamelContext abstractCamelContext;\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192    public InternalRouteController(AbstractCamelContext abstractCamelContext) {\n    38\u2192        this.abstractCamelContext = abstractCamelContext;\n    39\u2192    }\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192    @Override\n    42\u2192    public LoggingLevel getLoggingLevel() {\n    43\u2192        throw new UnsupportedOperationException();\n    44\u2192    }\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192    @Override\n    47\u2192    public void setLoggingLevel(LoggingLevel loggingLevel) {\n    48\u2192        throw new UnsupportedOperationException();\n    49\u2192    }\n    50\u2192\n    51\u2192    @Override\n    52\u2192    public boolean isSupervising() {\n    53\u2192        return false;\n    54\u2192    }\n 60\u2192\n    61\u2192    @Override\n    62\u2192    public <T extends RouteController> T adapt(Class<T> type) {\n    63\u2192        return type.cast(this);\n    64\u2192    }\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192    @Override\n    67\u2192    public Collection<Route> getControlledRoutes() {\n    68\u2192        return abstractCamelContext.getRoutes();\n    69\u2192    }\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192    @Override\n    72\u2192    public void startAllRoutes() throws Exception {\n    73\u2192        abstractCamelContext.startAllRoutes();\n    74\u2192    }\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192    @Override\n    77\u2192    public void stopAllRoutes() throws Exception {\n    78\u2192        abstractCamelContext.stopAllRoutes();\n    79\u2192    }\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192    @Override\n    82\u2192    public void removeAllRoutes() throws Exception {\n    83\u2192        abstractCamelContext.removeAllRoutes();\n    84\u2192    }\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192    @Override\n    87\u2192    public void reloadAllRoutes() throws Exception {\n    88\u2192        // lock model as we need to preserve the model definitions\n    89\u2192        // during removing routes because we need to create new processors from the models\n    90\u2192        abstractCamelContext.setLockModel(true);\n    91\u2192        try {\n    92\u2192            abstractCamelContext.removeAllRoutes();\n    93\u2192            // remove endpoints, so we can start on a fresh\n    94\u2192            abstractCamelContext.getEndpointRegistry().clear();\n    95\u2192        } finally {\n    96\u2192            abstractCamelContext.setLockModel(false);\n    97\u2192        }\n    98\u2192        // remove left-over route created from templates (model should not be locked for templates to be removed)\n    99\u2192        abstractCamelContext.removeRouteDefinitionsFromTemplate();\n   100\u2192        // start all routes again\n   101\u2192        abstractCamelContext.startRouteDefinitions();\n   102\u2192    }\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192    @Override\n   105\u2192    public boolean isReloadingRoutes() {\n   106\u2192        return abstractCamelContext.isLockModel();\n   107\u2192    }\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192    @Override\n   110\u2192    public boolean isStartingRoutes() {\n   111\u2192        return abstractCamelContext.isStartingRoutes();\n   112\u2192    }\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192    @Override\n   115\u2192    public boolean hasUnhealthyRoutes() {\n   116\u2192        return false;\n   117\u2192    }\n   118\u2192\n   119\u2192    @Override\n   120\u2192    public ServiceStatus getRouteStatus(String routeId) {\n   121\u2192        return abstractCamelContext.getRouteStatus(routeId);\n   122\u2192    }\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192    @Override\n   125\u2192    public void startRoute(String routeId) throws Exception {\n   126\u2192        abstractCamelContext.startRoute(routeId);\n   127\u2192    }\n   128\u2192\n   129\u2192    @Override\n   130\u2192    public void stopRoute(String routeId) throws Exception {\n   131\u2192        abstractCamelContext.stopRoute(routeId);\n   132\u2192    }\n   133\u2192\n   134\u2192    @Override\n   135\u2192    public void stopRoute(String routeId, Throwable cause) throws Exception {\n   136\u2192        Route route = abstractCamelContext.getRoute(routeId);\n   137\u2192        if (route != null) {\n   138\u2192            abstractCamelContext.stopRoute(routeId);\n   139\u2192            // and mark the route as failed and unhealthy (DOWN)\n   140\u2192            route.setLastError(new DefaultRouteError(RouteError.Phase.STOP, cause, true));\n   141\u2192        }\n   142\u2192    }\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192    @Override\n   145\u2192    public void stopRoute(String routeId, long timeout, TimeUnit timeUnit) throws Exception {\n   146\u2192        abstractCamelContext.stopRoute(routeId, timeout, timeUnit);\n   147\u2192    }\n   148\u2192\n   149\u2192    @Override\n   150\u2192    public boolean stopRoute(String routeId, long timeout, TimeUnit timeUnit, boolean abortAfterTimeout) throws Exception {\n   151\u2192        return abstractCamelContext.stopRoute(routeId, timeout, timeUnit, abortAfterTimeout, LoggingLevel.INFO);\n   152\u2192    }\n   153\u2192\n   154\u2192    @Override\n   155\u2192    public void suspendRoute(String routeId) throws Exception {\n   156\u2192        abstractCamelContext.suspendRoute(routeId);\n   157\u2192    }\n   158\u2192\n   159\u2192    @Override\n   160\u2192    public void suspendRoute(String routeId, long timeout, TimeUnit timeUnit) throws Exception {\n   161\u2192        abstractCamelContext.suspendRoute(routeId, timeout, timeUnit);\n   162\u2192    }\n   163\u2192\n   164\u2192    @Override\n   165\u2192 175\u2192    public void stopRouteGroup(String routeGroup) throws Exception {\n   176\u2192        abstractCamelContext.stopRouteGroup(routeGroup);\n   177\u2192    }\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192 org.apache.camel.Channel;\n    32\u2192import org.apache.camel.Consumer;\n    33\u2192import org.apache.camel.Endpoint;\n    34\u2192import org.apache.camel.EndpointAware;\n    35\u2192import 39\u2192import org.apache.camel.Service;\n    40\u2192import org.apache.camel.StartupStep;\n    41\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.IdAware;\n    42\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.InternalProcessor;\n    43\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.LifecycleStrategy;\n    44\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.RouteIdAware;\n    45\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.RoutePolicy;\n    46\u2192import org.apache.camel.spi.StartupStepRecorder;\n    47\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.ChildServiceSupport;\n    48\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.EventHelper;\n    49\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.PatternHelper;\n    50\u2192import org.apache.camel.support.service.ServiceHelper;\n    51\u2192import org.slf4j.MDC;\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192import static org.apache.camel.spi.UnitOfWork.MDC_CAMEL_CONTEXT_ID;\n    54\u2192import static org.apache.camel.spi.UnitOfWork.MDC_ROUTE_ID;\n    55\u2192\n    56\u2192/**\n    57\u2192 * Represents the runtime objects for a given route so that it can be stopped independently of other routes\n    58\u2192 */\n    59\u2192public class RouteService extends ChildServiceSupport {\n    60\u2192\n    61\u2192    private final CamelContext camelContext;\n    62\u2192    private final StartupStepRecorder startupStepRecorder;\n    63\u2192    private final Route route;\n    64\u2192    private boolean removingRoutes;\n    65\u2192    private Consumer input;\n    66\u2192    private final Lock lock = new ReentrantLock();\n    67\u2192    private final AtomicBoolean setUpDone = new AtomicBoolean();\n    68\u2192    private final AtomicBoolean warmUpDone = new AtomicBoolean();\n    69\u2192    private final AtomicBoolean endpointDone = new AtomicBoolean();\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192    public RouteService(Route route) {\n    72\u2192        this.route = route;\n    73\u2192        this.camelContext = this.route.getCamelContext();\n    74\u2192        this.startupStepRecorder = this.camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder();\n    75\u2192    }\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192    public String getId() {\n    78\u2192        return route.getId();\n    79\u2192    }\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192    public String getLocation() {\n    82\u2192        return route.getSourceLocationShort();\n    83\u2192    }\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192    public CamelContext getCamelContext() {\n    86\u2192        return camelContext;\n    87\u2192    }\n    88\u2192\n    89\u2192    public Route getRoute() {\n    90\u2192        return route;\n    91\u2192    }\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192    /**\n    94\u2192     * Gather all the endpoints this route service uses\n    95\u2192     * <p/>\n    96\u2192     * This implementation finds the endpoints by searching all the child services for {@link EndpointAware} processors\n    97\u2192     * which uses an endpoint.\n    98\u2192     */\n    99\u2192    public Set<Endpoint> gatherEndpoints() {\n   100\u2192        Set<Endpoint> answer = new LinkedHashSet<>();\n   101\u2192        Set<Service> services = gatherChildServices();\n   102\u2192        for (Service service : services) {\n   103\u2192            if (service instanceof EndpointAware endpointAware) {\n   104\u2192                Endpoint endpoint = endpointAware.getEndpoint();\n   105\u2192                if (endpoint != null) {\n   106\u2192                    answer.add(endpoint);\n   107\u2192                }\n   108\u2192            }\n   109\u2192        }\n   110\u2192        return answer;\n   111\u2192    }\n   112\u2192\n   113\u2192    public Consumer getInput() {\n   114\u2192        return input;\n   115\u2192    }\n   116\u2192\n   117\u2192    public boolean isRemovingRoutes() {\n   118\u2192        return removingRoutes;\n   119\u2192    }\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192    public void setRemovingRoutes(boolean removingRoutes) {\n   122\u2192        this.removingRoutes = removingRoutes;\n   123\u2192    }\n   124\u2192\n   125\u2192    public void warmUp() throws FailedToStartRouteException {\n   126\u2192        try {\n   127\u2192            doWarmUp();\n   128\u2192        } catch (Exception e) {\n   129\u2192            throw new FailedToStartRouteException(getId(), getLocation(), e.getLocalizedMessage(), e);\n   130\u2192        }\n   131\u2192    }\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192    public void setUp() throws FailedToStartRouteException {\n   134\u2192        if (setUpDone.compareAndSet(false, true)) {\n   135\u2192            try {\n   136\u2192                doSetup();\n   137\u2192            } catch (Exception e) {\n   138\u2192                throw new FailedToStartRouteException(getId(), getLocation(), e.getLocalizedMessage(), e);\n   139\u2192            }\n   140\u2192        }\n   141\u2192    }\n   142\u2192\n   143\u2192    public boolean isAutoStartup() {\n   144\u2192        if (!getCamelContext().isAutoStartup()) {\n   145\u2192            return false;\n   146\u2192        }\n   147\u2192        if (!getRoute().isAutoStartup()) {\n   148\u2192            return false;\n   149\u2192        }\n   150\u2192        if (getCamelContext().getAutoStartupExcludePattern() != null) {\n   151\u2192            String[] patterns = getCamelContext().getAutoStartupExcludePattern().split(\",\");\n   152\u2192            String id = getRoute().getRouteId();\n   153\u2192            String url = getRoute().getEndpoint().getEndpointUri();\n   154\u2192            if (PatternHelper.matchPatterns(id, patterns) || PatternHelper.matchPatterns(url, patterns)) {\n   155\u2192                return false;\n   156\u2192            }\n   157\u2192        }\n   158\u2192        return true;\n   159\u2192    }\n   160\u2192\n   161\u2192    protected void doSetup() throws Exception {\n   162\u2192        lock.lock();\n   163\u2192        try {\n   164\u2192            // to setup we initialize the services\n   165\u2192            ServiceHelper.initService(route.getEndpoint());\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192            try (MDCHelper mdcHelper = new MDCHelper(route.getId())) {\n   168\u2192\n   169\u2192                // ensure services are initialized first\n   170\u2192                route.initializeServices();\n   171\u2192                List<Service> services = route.getServices();\n   172\u2192\n   173\u2192                // split into consumers and child services as we need to start the consumers\n   174\u2192                // afterwards to avoid them being active while the others start\n   175\u2192                List<Service> list = new ArrayList<>();\n   176\u2192                for (Service service : services) {\n   177\u2192\n   178\u2192                    // inject the route\n   179\u2192                    if (service instanceof RouteAware routeAware) {\n   180\u2192                        routeAware.setRoute(route);\n   181\u2192                    }\n   182\u2192                    if (service instanceof RouteIdAware routeIdAware) {\n   183\u2192                        routeIdAware.setRouteId(route.getId());\n   184\u2192                    }\n   185\u2192                    // inject camel context\n   186\u2192                    CamelContextAware.trySetCamelContext(service, camelContext);\n   187\u2192\n   188\u2192                    if (service instanceof Consumer consumer) {\n   189\u2192                        this.input = consumer;\n   190\u2192                    } else {\n   191\u2192                        list.add(service);\n   192\u2192                    }\n   193\u2192                }\n   194\u2192                initChildServices(list);\n   195\u2192            }\n   196\u2192        } finally {\n   197\u2192            lock.unlock();\n   198\u2192        }\n   199\u2192    }\n   200\u2192\n   201\u2192    protected void doWarmUp() throws Exception {\n   202\u2192        lock.lock();\n   203\u2192        try {\n   204\u2192            if (endpointDone.compareAndSet(false, true)) {\n   205\u2192                // endpoints should only be started once as they can be reused on other routes\n   206\u2192                // and whatnot, thus their lifecycle is to start once, and only to stop when Camel shutdown\n   207\u2192                // ensure endpoint is started first (before the route services, such as the consumer)\n   208\u2192                ServiceHelper.startService(route.getEndpoint());\n   209\u2192            }\n   210\u2192\n   211\u2192            if (warmUpDone.compareAndSet(false, true)) {\n   212\u2192\n   213\u2192                try (MDCHelper mdcHelper = new MDCHelper(route.getId())) {\n   214\u2192                    // warm up the route first\n   215\u2192                    route.warmUp();\n   216\u2192\n   217\u2192                    startChildServices(route, childServices);\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192                    // fire event\n   220\u2192                    EventHelper.notifyRouteAdded(camelContext, route);\n   221\u2192                }\n   222\u2192\n   223\u2192                // ensure lifecycle strategy is invoked which among others enlist the route in JMX\n   224\u2192                for (LifecycleStrategy strategy : camelContext.getLifecycleStrategies()) {\n   225\u2192                    strategy.onRoutesAdd(Collections.singletonList(route));\n   226\u2192                }\n   227\u2192\n   228\u2192                // add routes to camel context\n   229\u2192                camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().addRoute(route);\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192                // add the routes to the inflight registry so they are pre-installed\n   232\u2192                camelContext.getInflightRepository().addRoute(route.getId());\n   233\u2192            }\n   234\u2192        } finally {\n   235\u2192            lock.unlock();\n   236\u2192        }\n   237\u2192    }\n   238\u2192\n   239\u2192    @Override\n   240\u2192    protected void doStart() {\n   241\u2192        try (MDCHelper mdcHelper = new MDCHelper(route.getId())) {\n   242\u2192            // fire event\n   243\u2192            EventHelper.notifyRouteStarting(camelContext, route);\n   244\u2192        }\n   245\u2192\n   246\u2192        // ensure we are warmed up\n   247\u2192        warmUp();\n   248\u2192\n   249\u2192        try (MDCHelper mdcHelper = new MDCHelper(route.getId())) {\n   250\u2192            // start the route itself\n   251\u2192            ServiceHelper.startService(route);\n   252\u2192\n   253\u2192            // invoke callbacks on route policy\n   254\u2192            routePolicyCallback(RoutePolicy::onStart);\n   255\u2192\n   256\u2192            // fire event\n   257\u2192            EventHelper.notifyRouteStarted(camelContext, route);\n   258\u2192        }\n   259\u2192    }\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192    @Override\n   262\u2192    protected void doStop() {\n   263\u2192        try (MDCHelper mdcHelper = new MDCHelper(route.getId())) {\n   264\u2192            // fire event\n   265\u2192            EventHelper.notifyRouteStopping(camelContext, route);\n   266\u2192        }\n   267\u2192\n   268\u2192        // if we are stopping CamelContext then we are shutting down\n   269\u2192        boolean isShutdownCamelContext = camelContext.isStopping();\n   270\u2192\n   271\u2192        if (isShutdownCamelContext || isRemovingRoutes()) {\n   272\u2192            // need to call onRoutesRemove when the CamelContext is shutting down or Route is shutdown\n   273\u2192            for (LifecycleStrategy strategy : camelContext.getLifecycleStrategies()) {\n   274\u2192                strategy.onRoutesRemove(Collections.singletonList(route));\n   275\u2192            }\n   276\u2192        }\n   277\u2192\n   278\u2192        try (MDCHelper mdcHelper = new MDCHelper(route.getId())) {\n   279\u2192            // gather list of services to stop\n   280\u2192            Set<Service> services = gatherChildServices();\n   281\u2192\n   282\u2192            // stop services\n   283\u2192            stopChildServices(route, services, isShutdownCamelContext);\n   284\u2192\n   285\u2192            // stop the route itself\n   286\u2192            if (isShutdownCamelContext) {\n   287\u2192                ServiceHelper.stopAndShutdownServices(route);\n   288\u2192            } else {\n   289\u2192                ServiceHelper.stopService(route);\n   290\u2192            }\n   291\u2192\n   292\u2192            // invoke callbacks on route policy\n   293\u2192            routePolicyCallback(RoutePolicy::onStop);\n   294\u2192\n   295\u2192            // fire event\n   296\u2192            EventHelper.notifyRouteStopped(camelContext, route);\n   297\u2192        }\n   298\u2192        if (isRemovingRoutes()) {\n   299\u2192            camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().removeRoute(route);\n   300\u2192        }\n   301\u2192        // need to redo if we start again after being stopped\n   302\u2192        input = null;\n   303\u2192        childServices = null;\n   304\u2192        warmUpDone.set(false);\n   305\u2192        setUpDone.set(false);\n   306\u2192        endpointDone.set(false);\n   307\u2192        setUpDone.set(false);\n   308\u2192        warmUpDone.set(false);\n   309\u2192    }\n   310\u2192\n   311\u2192    @Override\n   312\u2192    protected void doShutdown() {\n   313\u2192        try (MDCHelper mdcHelper = new MDCHelper(route.getId())) {\n   314\u2192            // gather list of services to shutdown\n   315\u2192            Set<Service> services = gatherChildServices();\n   316\u2192\n   317\u2192            // shutdown services\n   318\u2192            stopChildServices(route, services, true);\n   319\u2192\n   320\u2192            // shutdown the route itself\n   321\u2192            ServiceHelper.stopAndShutdownServices(route);\n   322\u2192\n   323\u2192            // endpoints should only be stopped when Camel is shutting down\n   324\u2192            // see more details in the warmUp method\n   325\u2192            ServiceHelper.stopAndShutdownServices(route.getEndpoint());\n   326\u2192\n   327\u2192            // invoke callbacks on route policy\n   328\u2192            routePolicyCallback(RoutePolicy::onRemove);\n   329\u2192\n   330\u2192            // fire event\n   331\u2192            EventHelper.notifyRouteRemoved(camelContext, route);\n   332\u2192        }\n   333\u2192\n   334\u2192        // need to call onRoutesRemove when the CamelContext is shutting down or Route is shutdown\n   335\u2192        for (LifecycleStrategy strategy : camelContext.getLifecycleStrategies()) {\n   336\u2192            strategy.onRoutesRemove(Collections.singletonList(route));\n   337\u2192        }\n   338\u2192\n   339\u2192        // remove the routes from the inflight registry\n   340\u2192        camelContext.getInflightRepository().removeRoute(route.getId());\n   341\u2192\n   342\u2192        // remove the routes from the collections\n   343\u2192        camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().removeRoute(route);\n   344\u2192\n   345\u2192        // clear inputs on shutdown\n   346\u2192        input = null;\n   347\u2192        childServices = null;\n   348\u2192        warmUpDone.set(false);\n   349\u2192        setUpDone.set(false);\n   350\u2192        endpointDone.set(false);\n   351\u2192    }\n   352\u2192\n   353\u2192    @Override\n   354\u2192    protected void doSuspend() {\n   355\u2192        // suspend and resume logic is provided by DefaultCamelContext which leverages ShutdownStrategy\n   356\u2192        // to safely suspend and resume\n   357\u2192        try (MDCHelper mdcHelper = new MDCHelper(route.getId())) {\n   358\u2192            routePolicyCallback(RoutePolicy::onSuspend);\n   359\u2192        }\n   360\u2192    }\n   361\u2192\n   362\u2192    @Override\n   363\u2192    protected void doResume() {\n   364\u2192        // suspend and resume logic is provided by DefaultCamelContext which leverages ShutdownStrategy\n   365\u2192        // to safely suspend and resume\n   366\u2192        try (MDCHelper mdcHelper = new MDCHelper(route.getId())) {\n   367\u2192            routePolicyCallback(RoutePolicy::onResume);\n   368\u2192        }\n   369\u2192    }\n   370\u2192\n   371\u2192    private void routePolicyCallback(java.util.function.BiConsumer<RoutePolicy, Route> callback) {\n   372\u2192        if (route.getRoutePolicyList() != null) {\n   373\u2192            for (RoutePolicy routePolicy : route.getRoutePolicyList()) {\n   374\u2192                callback.accept(routePolicy, route);\n   375\u2192            }\n   376\u2192        }\n   377\u2192    }\n   378\u2192\n   379\u2192    private StartupStep beginStep(Service service, String description) {\n   380\u2192        Class<?> type = service instanceof Processor ? Processor.class : Service.class;\n   381\u2192        description = description + \" \" + service.getClass().getSimpleName();\n   382\u2192        String id = null;\n   383\u2192        if (service instanceof IdAware idAware) {\n   384\u2192            id = idAware.getId();\n   385\u2192        }\n   386\u2192        return startupStepRecorder.beginStep(type, id, description);\n   387\u2192    }\n   388\u2192\n   389\u2192    protected void initChildServices(List<Service> services) {\n   390\u2192        for (Service service : services) {\n   391\u2192            StartupStep step = null;\n   392\u2192            // skip internal services / route pipeline (starting point for route)\n   393\u2192            boolean shouldRecord\n   394\u2192                    // NOTE: RoutePipeline belong to dependency not visible by this class at build time.\n   395\u2192                    = !(service instanceof InternalProcessor || \"RoutePipeline\".equals(service.getClass().getSimpleName())); // NOSONAR\n   396\u2192            if (shouldRecord) {\n   397\u2192                step = beginStep(service, \"Init\");\n   398\u2192            }\n   399\u2192            ServiceHelper.initService(service);\n   400\u2192            if (step != null) {\n   401\u2192                startupStepRecorder.endStep(step);\n   402\u2192            }\n   403\u2192            // add and remember as child service\n   404\u2192            addChildService(service);\n   405\u2192        }\n   406\u2192    }\n   407\u2192\n   408\u2192    protected void startChildServices(Route route, List<Service> services) {\n   409\u2192        for (Service service : services) {\n   410\u2192            StartupStep step = null;\n   411\u2192            // skip internal services / route pipeline (starting point for route)\n   412\u2192            boolean shouldRecord\n   413\u2192                    // NOTE: RoutePipeline belong to dependency not visible by this class at build time.\n   414\u2192                    = !(service instanceof InternalProcessor || \"RoutePipeline\".equals(service.getClass().getSimpleName())); // NOSONAR\n   415\u2192            if (shouldRecord) {\n   416\u2192                step = beginStep(service, \"Start\");\n   417\u2192            }\n   418\u2192            for (LifecycleStrategy strategy : camelContext.getLifecycleStrategies()) {\n   419\u2192                strategy.onServiceAdd(camelContext, service, route);\n   420\u2192            }\n   421\u2192            ServiceHelper.startService(service);\n   422\u2192            if (step != null) {\n   423\u2192                startupStepRecorder.endStep(step);\n   424\u2192            }\n   425\u2192        }\n   426\u2192    }\n   427\u2192\n   428\u2192    protected void stopChildServices(Route route, Set<Service> services, boolean shutdown) {\n   429\u2192        for (Service service : services) {\n   430\u2192            for (LifecycleStrategy strategy : camelContext.getLifecycleStrategies()) {\n   431\u2192                strategy.onServiceRemove(camelContext, service, route, shutdown);\n   432\u2192            }\n   433\u2192            if (shutdown) {\n   434\u2192                ServiceHelper.stopAndShutdownService(service);\n   435\u2192            } else {\n   436\u2192                ServiceHelper.stopService(service);\n   437\u2192            }\n   438\u2192            removeChildService(service);\n   439\u2192        }\n   440\u2192    }\n   441\u2192\n   442\u2192    /**\n   443\u2192     * Gather all child services\n   444\u2192     */\n   445\u2192    private Set<Service> gatherChildServices() {\n   446\u2192        List<Service> services = new ArrayList<>(route.getServices());\n   447\u2192        // also get route scoped services\n   448\u2192        doGetRouteServices(services);\n   449\u2192        Set<Service> list = new LinkedHashSet<>();\n   450\u2192        for (Service service : services) {\n   451\u2192            list.addAll(ServiceHelper.getChildServices(service));\n   452\u2192        }\n   453\u2192        // also get route scoped error handler (which must be done last)\n   454\u2192        doGetErrorHandler(list);\n   455\u2192        return list;\n   456\u2192    }\n   457\u2192\n   458\u2192    /**\n   459\u2192     * Gather the route scoped error handler from the given route\n   460\u2192     */\n   461\u2192    private void doGetErrorHandler(Set<Service> services) {\n   462\u2192        // only include error handlers if they are route scoped\n   463\u2192        List<Service> extra = new ArrayList<>();\n   464\u2192        for (Service service : services) {\n   465\u2192            if (service instanceof Channel channel) {\n   466\u2192                Processor eh = channel.getErrorHandler();\n   467\u2192                if (eh instanceof Service s) {\n   468\u2192                    extra.add(s);\n   469\u2192                }\n   470\u2192            }\n   471\u2192        }\n   472\u2192        if (!extra.isEmpty()) {\n   473\u2192            services.addAll(extra);\n   474\u2192        }\n   475\u2192    }\n   476\u2192\n   477\u2192    /**\n   478\u2192     * Gather all other kind of route services from the given route, except error handler\n   479\u2192     */\n   480\u2192    protected void doGetRouteServices(List<Service> services) {\n   481\u2192        for (Processor proc : getRoute().getOnExceptions()) {\n   482\u2192            if (proc instanceof Service service) {\n   483\u2192                services.add(service);\n   484\u2192            }\n   485\u2192        }\n   486\u2192        for (Processor proc : getRoute().getOnCompletions()) {\n   487\u2192            if (proc instanceof Service service) {\n   488\u2192                services.add(service);\n   489\u2192            }\n   490\u2192        }\n   491\u2192    }\n   492\u2192\n   493\u2192    class MDCHelper implements AutoCloseable {\n   494\u2192        final Map<String, String> originalContextMap;\n   495\u2192\n   496\u2192        MDCHelper(String routeId) {\n   497\u2192            if (getCamelContext().isUseMDCLogging()) {\n   498\u2192                originalContextMap = MDC.getCopyOfContextMap();\n   499\u2192                MDC.put(MDC_CAMEL_CONTEXT_ID, getCamelContext().getName());\n   500\u2192                MDC.put(MDC_ROUTE_ID, routeId);\n   501\u2192            } else {\n   502\u2192                originalContextMap = null;\n   503\u2192            }\n   504\u2192        }\n   505\u2192\n   506\u2192        @Override\n   507\u2192        public void close() {\n   508\u2192            if (getCamelContext().isUseMDCLogging()) {\n   509\u2192                if (originalContextMap != null) {\n   510\u2192                    MDC.setContextMap(originalContextMap);\n   511\u2192                } else {\n   512\u2192                    MDC.clear();\n   513\u2192                }\n   514\u2192            }\n   515\u2192        }\n   516\u2192\n   517\u2192    }\n   518\u2192\n   519\u2192}\n   520\u2192"

previous step is sent as input to the next step, reusing the same\n    43\u2192 * message exchanges\n    44\u2192 */\n    45\u2192public class Pipeline extends BaseProcessorSupport implements Navigate<Processor>, Traceable, IdAware, RouteIdAware {\n    46\u2192\n    47\u2192    private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(Pipeline.class);\n    48\u2192\n    49\u2192    private final CamelContext camelContext;\n    50\u2192    private final ReactiveExecutor reactiveExecutor;\n    51\u2192    private final List<AsyncProcessor> processors;\n    52\u2192    private final int size;\n    53\u2192    private PooledExchangeTaskFactory taskFactory;\n    54\u2192\n    55\u2192    private String id;\n    56\u2192    private String routeId;\n    57\u2192\n    58\u2192    private final class PipelineTask implements PooledExchangeTask, AsyncCallback {\n    59\u2192\n    60\u2192        private Exchange exchange;\n    61\u2192        private AsyncCallback callback;\n    62\u2192        private int index;\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192        PipelineTask() {\n    65\u2192        }\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192        @Override\n    68\u2192        public void prepare(Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback callback) {\n    69\u2192            this.exchange = exchange;\n    70\u2192            this.callback = callback;\n    71\u2192            this.index = 0;\n    72\u2192        }\n    73\u2192\n    74\u2192        @Override\n    75\u2192        public void reset() {\n    76\u2192            this.exchange = null;\n    77\u2192            this.callback = null;\n    78\u2192            this.index = 0;\n    79\u2192        }\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192        @Override\n    82\u2192        public void done(boolean doneSync) {\n    83\u2192            reactiveExecutor.schedule(this);\n    84\u2192        }\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192        @Override\n    87\u2192        public void run() {\n    88\u2192            boolean stop = exchange.isRouteStop();\n    89\u2192            int num = index;\n    90\u2192            boolean more = num < size;\n    91\u2192            boolean first = num == 0;\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192            if (!stop && more && (first || continueProcessing(exchange, \"so breaking out of pipeline\", LOG))) {\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192                // prepare for next run\n    96\u2192                ExchangeHelper.prepareOutToIn(exchange);\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192                // get the next processor\n    99\u2192                AsyncProcessor processor = processors.get(index++);\n might have altered the payload and since\n   107\u2192                // we are logging the completion it will be confusing if we log the original instead\n   108\u2192                // we could also consider logging the original and the nextExchange then we have *before* and *after* snapshots\n   109\u2192                if (LOG.isTraceEnabled()) {\n   110\u2192                    LOG.trace(\"Processing complete for exchangeId: {} >>> {}\", exchange.getExchangeId(), exchange);\n   111\u2192                }\n   112\u2192\n   113\u2192                AsyncCallback cb = callback;\n   114\u2192                taskFactory.release(this);\n   115\u2192                reactiveExecutor.schedule(cb);\n   116\u2192            }\n   117\u2192        }\n   118\u2192    }\n   119\u2192\n   120\u2192    public Pipeline(CamelContext camelContext, Collection<Processor> processors) {\n   121\u2192        this.camelContext = camelContext;\n   122\u2192        this.reactiveExecutor = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getReactiveExecutor();\n   123\u2192        this.processors = processors.stream().map(AsyncProcessorConverterHelper::convert).toList();\n   124\u2192        this.size = processors.size();\n   125\u2192    }\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192    public static Processor newInstance(CamelContext camelContext, List<Processor> processors) {\n   128\u2192        if (processors.isEmpty()) {\n   129\u2192            return null;\n   130\u2192        } else if (processors.size() == 1) {\n   131\u2192            return processors.get(0);\n   132\u2192        }\n   133\u2192        return new Pipeline(camelContext, processors);\n   134\u2192    }\n   135\u2192\n   136\u2192    public static Processor newInstance(final CamelContext camelContext, final Processor... processors) {\n   137\u2192        if (processors == null || processors.length == 0) {\n   138\u2192            return null;\n   139\u2192        } else if (processors.length == 1) {\n   140\u2192            return processors[0];\n   141\u2192        }\n   142\u2192\n   143\u2192 146\u2192                toBeProcessed.add(processor);\n   147\u2192            }\n   148\u2192        }\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192        return new Pipeline(camelContext, toBeProcessed);\n   151\u2192    }\n   152\u2192\n   153\u2192    @Override\n   154\u2192    public boolean process(Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback callback) {\n   155\u2192        try {\n   156\u2192            // create task which has state used during routing\n   157\u2192            PooledExchangeTask task = taskFactory.acquire(exchange, callback);\n   158\u2192\n   159\u2192            if (exchange.isTransacted()) {\n   160\u2192                reactiveExecutor.scheduleQueue(task);\n   161\u2192            } else {\n   162\u2192                reactiveExecutor.scheduleMain(task);\n   163\u2192            }\n   164\u2192            return false;\n   165\u2192        } catch (Exception e) {\n   166\u2192            exchange.setException(e);\n   167\u2192            callback.done(true);\n   168\u2192            return true;\n   169\u2192        }\n   170\u2192    }\n   171\u2192\n   172\u2192    @Override\n   173\u2192    protected void doBuild() throws Exception {\n   174\u2192        boolean pooled = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getExchangeFactory().isPooled();\n   175\u2192        if (pooled) {\n   176\u2192            taskFactory = new PooledTaskFactory(getId()) {\n   177\u2192                @Override\n   178\u2192                public PooledExchangeTask create(Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback callback) {\n   179\u2192                    return new PipelineTask();\n   180\u2192                }\n   181\u2192            };\n   182\u2192            int capacity = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getExchangeFactory().getCapacity();\n   183\u2192            taskFactory.setCapacity(capacity);\n   184\u2192        } else {\n   185\u2192            taskFactory = new PrototypeTaskFactory() {\n   186\u2192                @Override\n   187\u2192                public PooledExchangeTask create(Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback callback) {\n   188\u2192                    return new PipelineTask();\n   189\u2192                }\n   190\u2192            };\n   191\u2192        }\n   192\u2192        LOG.trace(\"Using TaskFactory: {}\", taskFactory);\n   193\u2192\n   194\u2192        ServiceHelper.buildService(taskFactory, processors);\n   195\u2192    }\n   196\u2192\n   197\u2192    @Override\n   198\u2192    protected void doInit() throws Exception {\n   199\u2192        ServiceHelper.initService(taskFactory, processors);\n   200\u2192    }\n   201\u2192\n   202\u2192    @Override\n   203\u2192    protected void doStart() throws Exception {\n   204\u2192        ServiceHelper.startService(taskFactory, processors);\n   205\u2192    }\n   206\u2192\n   207\u2192    @Override\n   208\u2192    protected void processors != null && !processors.isEmpty();\n   258\u2192    }\n   259\u2192}\n   260\u2192"

protected Route doCreateRoute() throws Exception {\n   103\u2192        // resolve endpoint\n   104\u2192        Endpoint endpoint = definition.getInput().getEndpoint();\n   105\u2192        if 205\u2192        }\n   206\u2192\n   207\u2192        // should inherit the intercept strategies we have defined\n   208\u2192        route.getInterceptStrategies().addAll(definition.getInterceptStrategies());\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192        // notify route context created\n   211\u2192        for (LifecycleStrategy strategy : camelContext.getLifecycleStrategies()) {\n   212\u2192            strategy.onRouteContextCreate(route);\n   213\u2192        }\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192        // validate route has output processors\n   216\u2192        if (!hasOutputs(definition.getOutputs(), true)) {\n   217\u2192            String at = definition.getInput().toString();\n   218\u2192            Exception cause = new IllegalArgumentException(\n   219\u2192                    \"Route \" + definition.getId() + \" has no output processors.\"\n   220\u2192                                                           + \" You need to add outputs to the route such as to(\\\"log:foo\\\").\");\n   221\u2192            // location on route is stored on input\n   222\u2192            ProcessorDefinitionHelper.prepareSourceLocation(definition.getResource(), definition.getInput());\n   223\u2192            String source = LoggerHelper.getSourceLocationOnly(definition.getInput());\n   224\u2192            throw new FailedToCreateRouteException(\n   225\u2192                    definition.getRouteId(), source, definition.toString(), at, cause);\n   226\u2192        }\n   227\u2192\n   228\u2192        List<ProcessorDefinition<?>> list = new ArrayList<>(definition.getOutputs());\n   229\u2192        for (ProcessorDefinition<?> output : list) {\n   230\u2192            try {\n   231\u2192                ProcessorReifier<?> reifier = ProcessorReifier.reifier(route, output);\n   232\u2192\n   233\u2192                // ensure node has id assigned\n   234\u2192                String outputId\n   235\u2192                        = output.idOrCreate(camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getContextPlugin(NodeIdFactory.class));\n   236\u2192                String eip = reifier.getClass().getSimpleName().replace(\"Reifier\", \"\");\n   237\u2192                StartupStep step = camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder()\n   238\u2192                        .beginStep(ProcessorReifier.class, outputId, \"Create \" + eip + \" Processor\");\n   239\u2192\n   240\u2192                reifier.addRoutes();\n   241\u2192\n   242\u2192                camelContext.getCamelContextExtension().getStartupStepRecorder().endStep(step);\n   243\u2192            } catch (Exception e) {\n   244\u2192                // location on route is stored on input\n   245\u2192                String source = LoggerHelper\n   246\u2192                        .getLineNumberLoggerName(definition.getInput() != null ? definition.getInput().getLocation() : null);\n   247\u2192                throw new FailedToCreateRouteException(\n   248\u2192                        definition.getRouteId(), source, definition.toString(), output.toString(), e);\n   249\u2192            }\n   250\u2192        }\n   251\u2192\n   252\u2192        // now lets turn all the event driven consumer processors into a single route\n   253\u2192        List<Processor> eventDrivenProcessors = route.getEventDrivenProcessors();\n   254\u2192        if (eventDrivenProcessors.isEmpty()) {\n   255\u2192            return null;\n   256\u2192        }\n   257\u2192\n   258\u2192        // Set route properties\n   259\u2192        Map<String, Object> routeProperties = computeRouteProperties();\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192        // always use a pipeline even if there are only 1 processor as the pipeline\n   262\u2192        // handles preparing the response from the exchange in regard to IN vs OUT messages etc\n   263\u2192        RoutePipeline target = new RoutePipeline(camelContext, eventDrivenProcessors);\n   264\u2192        target.setRouteId(id);\n   265\u2192\n   266\u2192        // and wrap it in a unit of work so the UoW is on the top, so the entire route will be in the same UoW\n   267\u2192        InternalProcessor internal = PluginHelper.getInternalProcessorFactory(camelContext)\n   268\u2192                .addUnitOfWorkProcessorAdvice(camelContext, target, route);\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192        // configure route policy\n   271\u2192        if (definition.getRoutePolicies() != null && !definition.getRoutePolicies().isEmpty()) {\n   272\u2192            for (RoutePolicy policy : definition.getRoutePolicies()) {\n   273\u2192                LOG.debug(\"RoutePolicy is enabled: {} on route: {}\", policy, definition.getId());\n   274\u2192                route.getRoutePolicyList().add(policy);\n   275\u2192            }\n   276\u2192        }\n   277\u2192        if (definition.getRoutePolicyRef() != null) {\n   278\u2192            StringTokenizer policyTokens = new StringTokenizer(definition.getRoutePolicyRef(), \",\");\n   279\u2192            while (policyTokens.hasMoreTokens()) {\n   280\u2192                String ref = policyTokens.nextToken().trim();\n   281\u2192                RoutePolicy policy = mandatoryLookup(ref, RoutePolicy.class);\n   282\u2192                LOG.debug(\"RoutePolicy is enabled: {} on route: {}\", policy, definition.getId());\n   283\u2192                route.getRoutePolicyList().add(policy);\n   284\u2192            }\n   285\u2192        }\n   286\u2192        if (camelContext.getRoutePolicyFactories() != null) {\n   287\u2192            for (RoutePolicyFactory factory : camelContext.getRoutePolicyFactories()) {\n   288\u2192                RoutePolicy policy = factory.createRoutePolicy(camelContext, definition.getId(), definition);\n   289\u2192                if (policy != null) {\n   290\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"RoutePolicy is enabled: {} on route: {}\", policy, definition.getId());\n   291\u2192                    route.getRoutePolicyList().add(policy);\n   292\u2192                }\n   293\u2192            }\n   294\u2192        }\n   295\u2192        // and then optionally add route policy processor if a custom policy is set\n   296\u2192        List<RoutePolicy> routePolicyList = route.getRoutePolicyList();\n   297\u2192        if (routePolicyList != null && !routePolicyList.isEmpty()) {\n   298\u2192            for (RoutePolicy policy : routePolicyList) {\n   299\u2192                // add policy as service if we have not already done that (eg possible if two routes have the same service)\n   300\u2192                // this ensures Camel can control the lifecycle of the policy\n   301\u2192                if (!camelContext.hasService(policy)) {\n   302\u2192                    try {\n   303\u2192                        // inject route\n   304\u2192                        if (policy instanceof RouteAware ra) {\n   305\u2192                            ra.setRoute(route);\n   306\u2192                        }\n   307\u2192                        camelContext.addService(policy);\n   308\u2192                    } catch (Exception e) {\n   309\u2192                        throw RuntimeCamelException.wrapRuntimeCamelException(e);\n   310\u2192                    }\n   311\u2192                }\n   312\u2192            }\n   313\u2192\n   314\u2192            internal.addRoutePolicyAdvice(routePolicyList);\n   315\u2192        }\n   316\u2192\n   317\u2192        // wrap in route inflight processor to track number of inflight exchanges for the route\n   318\u2192        internal.addRouteInflightRepositoryAdvice(camelContext.getInflightRepository(), route.getRouteId());\n   319\u2192\n   320\u2192        // wrap in JMX instrumentation processor that is used for performance stats\n   321\u2192        ManagementInterceptStrategy managementInterceptStrategy = route.getManagementInterceptStrategy();\n   322\u2192        if (managementInterceptStrategy != null) {\n   323\u2192            internal.addManagementInterceptStrategy(managementInterceptStrategy.createProcessor(\"route\"));\n   324\u2192        }\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192        // wrap in route lifecycle\n   327\u2192        internal.addRouteLifecycleAdvice(camelContext, route, definition);\n   328\u2192\n   329\u2192        // add advices\n   330\u2192        if (definition.getRestBindingDefinition() != null) {\n   331\u2192            try {\n   332\u2192                // when disabling bean or processor we should also disable rest-dsl binding advice\n   333\u2192                boolean disabled\n   334\u2192                        = \"true\".equalsIgnoreCase(route.getCamelContext().getGlobalOption(DISABLE_BEAN_OR_PROCESS_PROCESSORS));\n   335\u2192                if (!disabled) {\n   336\u2192                    internal.addAdvice(\n   337\u2192                            new RestBindingReifier(route, definition.getRestBindingDefinition()).createRestBindingAdvice());\n   338\u2192                }\n   339\u2192            } catch (Exception e) {\n   340\u2192                throw RuntimeCamelException.wrapRuntimeCamelException(e);\n   341\u2192            }\n   342\u2192        }\n   343\u2192\n   344\u2192        // wrap in contract\n   345\u2192        if (definition.getInputType() != null || definition.getOutputType() != null) {\n   346\u2192            Contract contract = new Contract();\n   347\u2192            if (definition.getInputType() != null) {\n   348\u2192                contract.setInputType(parseString(definition.getInputType().getUrn()));\n   349\u2192                contract.setValidateInput(parseBoolean(definition.getInputType().getValidate(), false));"
